subject: I love America 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I am running for United States Senate because I love America. I want to bring us together. |
[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=5a0079cbee3e4bc8a3a790ef25501564&_e=CsmPtJeg4lL7ILuQSyk3WNS_d1G7JhutCaJMN4ZswU1PKoHd6WIdQ62Uwygka-QevG8aO8cJPZBiF5-sf1G9KK_5WNogSch-oYs79y6Uj0tqkFlpfN5yfe1WVaZnlwtfvsqtAG6ZFgTxn8-WbUFGsGzqBpMBT3Tr9p8hP0vp_iIfEcMFxPAIGpYrv-4Y6KpH3jw6Z0cCVZpy1AYKP-mzpWChSPTY4f4-ChR11kC16WcmHUJ3NsKsk4GGxaf28ng4HFAM5VB9Vxg9xYB4zb_gwNw_ahYCGRhz2GhSzNJdUkB9_vO3uVXbwJfD57oYRehqwBQLWXif4bbch-JOkyagPMQ8FiQp7_Nn23OJIWvYlICc74BgZnJOSd-QoZ6JsbTbPoTR-fevAOThcoBGR-etlH2Nksv2R5R1B5s91Fc5PfT4uj9wzqkb8XIiYptMhLji6nLYuw5n5CWZReKDmbPej-9UAxoT6uj2EUIJjxT1cFTo1VmLVQa0SfrRV7N_YAtNfJvqEAo2lyvL45z-tLkcFY-jqYxsLzXqViUEQEmhPDFgh8qIfeduTDB92TG8_Y53sqVSbx00mV_UhronVnWNzg%3D%3D)

Peter,

**I love America!**

I love our country so much that I decided to run for the United States Senate. I knew that, with everything happening in America, I couldn't sit on the sidelines anymore.

I'm blessed to be an American. This country has given me so many great opportunities over the course of my life, including representing the United States in the 1992 Winter Olympics.

I know there are things we need to fix about America, but I still love our country deeply. I can't wait to get to Washington so I can get to work in the Senate.

Peter, I'd love to hear from you on this Independence Day. **[Would you please sign our "I Love America" petition?](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=5a0079cbee3e4bc8a3a790ef25501564&_e=CsmPtJeg4lL7ILuQSyk3WNS_d1G7JhutCaJMN4ZswU1PKoHd6WIdQ62Uwygka-QevG8aO8cJPZBiF5-sf1G9KK_5WNogSch-oYs79y6Uj0tqkFlpfN5yfe1WVaZnlwtfvsqtAG6ZFgTxn8-WbUFGsGzqBpMBT3Tr9p8hP0vp_iIfEcMFxPAIGpYrv-4Y6KpH3jw6Z0cCVZpy1AYKP-mzpWChSPTY4f4-ChR11kC16WcmHUJ3NsKsk4GGxaf28ng4HFAM5VB9Vxg9xYB4zb_gwNw_ahYCGRhz2GhSzNJdUkB9_vO3uVXbwJfD57oYRehqwBQLWXif4bbch-JOkyagPMQ8FiQp7_Nn23OJIWvYlICc74BgZnJOSd-QoZ6JsbTb07J-5BnjUX6LSf_2yR_ejdjfEWqvIi2KTxHvxPJMLU1EUllZ5hEbWBzkzBRR8LK4sr_pbPrB81w3xy6mriCkj3RXhS2O2DT8WNS-ylBScpwOd99TPPnsj4WNi0RdSWwNFhC1ZeTpaBSlh_l9EwbsPDORohlRqqUENhLwP3CpI8LmPnqsQIot-KXqKk5n3cSZgvnZ-MsydDDjYGRv1bUvbA%3D%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtney?=
subject: Happy 4th of July!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9b257b2e1612/happy-4th-of-july?e=20ac8f046f)
---
| |
---
| | Happy Independence Day Peter! We are blessed to live in the greatest country the world has ever seen. What has kept us free has been the sacrifices that selfless men and women have made over the years. Our nation is exceptional because of people understanding that devotion to God and personal liberty will create a better society than Kings and Queens ever could. Today is a time to come together to reflect on the American promise and how we can contribute to continuing to make our country exceptional.

There is no doubt that our nation faces many challenges and struggles, but our nation has overcome hurdles and challenges before and I know we will emerge stronger, but we must do so together.

Join me in celebrating our country today and have a safe and blessed 4th of July!
---
|
---
---
| [Volunteer](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=c3115d120b&e=20ac8f046f "Volunteer")
---

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Happy Independence Day!
body:
[](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qurkytd-yddjllujiu-r/) Friend,**🇺 🇸 Let's join as a nation and celebrate Independence Day! 🇺🇸****Happy 4th of July, Wisconsinites!** Today is a reminder of the challenges our nation faced - _and overcame_ - to win our freedom, establish independence, and build a country Americans can be proud of.We remain the shining city on the hill, but we must be vigilant in protecting what has made America so great: Life, Liberty, and the pursuit of Happiness. As you and your family celebrate this patriotic holiday, I hope we can remember the values America was founded on. Happy Independence Day,
Glenn Grothman [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qurkytd-yddjllujiu-j/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215

subject: America Stands or Falls by our Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Heidi St
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidistjohnforcongress/dishonesty-in-prime-time-16497919?e=b0bcc6b4f9)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi Friends,

The United States Supreme Court is the final arbiter and interpreter of the United States Constitution. It isn’t a legislative body. It isn’t an executive body. And it most assuredly isn’t a barometer of public feelings and emotions. It exists to measure and enforce the breadth and scope of the Constitution and nothing more.

Conservatives have been delighted by several recent decisions of the Supreme Court including the overturning of Roe v. Wade. On the other hand, most conservatives were disappointed by the court’s decision to end President Trump’s “stay in Mexico” order and America now faces even more illegal immigrants flooding our border and being transported across America by the Biden administration’s illegal tourism department.

Win or lose, approve or disapprove, the court has been returned to its rightful place of weighing and evaluating the constitutionality of every law. And that’s a major victory of every American.
Ours is a unique form of government which has stood for 246 years... so far. Our future rests squarely on the firm foundation of our past and the wisdom of America’s founding fathers who framed a Constitution robust enough to withstand financial depressions, world wars, civil wars and more.

As a Congresswoman I am committed to the rule of law under the United States Constitution and nothing less. Our nation is at a crossroads. Now is the time to elect true Conservatives into every position of leadership in our nation. It’s time to uphold and defend the Constitution once more!

Washington State is worth fighting for—and together, we can restore law and order to our nation and our state. Please help me get to Congress by [donating here](https://heidistjohnforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46e715d1574a19c15defda548&id=f44336d361&e=b0bcc6b4f9). Sincerely,
---
|
---
| _**Heidi St. John**_
_Candidate for Congress, WA-03_

name: Steven Sams II for Congress
subject: Independence Day Message
body:
I know times are tough. I hope this message may give you a little inspiration and hope for the future and what is to come. -Steven | July 4t
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/c6O7C7e5_/c?w=xvlFlDMloNBpUCyFDWFJqPPmfLXLxNioorCNv3rTcz8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2M2TzdDN2U1Xz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjJmOGViMzEwLWE1ZmItNDUzOC1iYjFiLTE0Zjg5ZDUyZjFlMSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | An Independence Day Message.
---
| | |
---
| | I know times are tough. I hope this message may give you a little inspiration and hope for the future and what is to come. -Steven
---
| |
---
| | July 4th is Independence Day in the United States. A day when we all come together as Americans and remember that we live in the greatest country in the world. A Nation that believes in Freedom and Liberty for all people. At times we have been challenged and our freedom and our resolve has been tested, but America Still Stands. At times we have faltered and stumbled and we have done wrong by our brothers and sisters, but America Still Stands. At times we have not always been united, but we have risen above, not for ourselves, but for our Nation and the greater good. Today we face many challenges, but we will overcome, we will recover, and America Will Still Stand.It's time we celebrate that American Nation which we love. No other country in the world has done what we have done to advance peace and prosperity around the world. Sure, we may have our differences, but that's what makes this the best place in the world. A place where so many different people with so many different beliefs can come together as one American people. So today we come together once again. We don't come together for a day off or for fireworks, and s'mores. We come together to honor our Nation, to honor our great American flag, and remember that we are all Americans, and together there is nothing we can't accomplish. So Happy 246th Birthday America. May you stand strong for generations to come, and may you continue to be the greatest place on earth to call home.
---

subject: Let Freedom Ring!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi for Governor
body:
Happy Birthday America! I hope you all take time to celebrate our freedom and those who have fought for it and defend it still today. Happy July 4th!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qxilik-ttjjilthht-r/) Peter,**Happy 4th of July!!!****** Let freedom ring! July 4th is one of my favorite holidays. I hope you are able to take time to celebrate our Republic. As we head to parades, fireworks displays, and cookouts, please remember those who have fought for our freedom and those who defend it here and overseas every day.**** [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qxilik-ttjjilthht-y/) **_Join us on our mission to take back our Colorado Freedom which is slipping away._** The time is now! Colorado is ready to unite behind the idea of personal freedoms - freedom to decide what is best for your family, your business, your life. **Happy Birthday America!** Let's do this, Colorado!Heidi Never miss a beat, follow me on social media! name: 2024 STRAW POLL (Team Scalise)
subject: We look forward to seeing your response, Patriot.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We asked 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 TIMES now, Patriot.
[**Last chance to respond: If the Presidential election was held today, who would you vote for?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60726774:6b77V0oN_:m:1:3299561967:E745D3EE35DB4630F185D851BD057D40:r)
****[REPUBLICAN DONALD J. TRUMP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60726774:6b77V0oN_:m:1:3299561967:E745D3EE35DB4630F185D851BD057D40:r)****
****[DEMOCRAT JOSEPH R. BIDEN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60726774:6b77V0oN_:m:1:3299561967:E745D3EE35DB4630F185D851BD057D40:r)****
**We need your answer before the end of the day or else we 'll have no choice but to assume you don't plan on voting for President in 2024!**

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9jvgemmbbqtr5batobkvtvq7ttokdeli9q9iig8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1i6aoj0sjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2ob661ijccljehoj8cbnmqojaclie9jjfc9kcsr68thhc5rmcppgs5rm4o5i6srt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor5ddgc1r6aphkssqj9ptgmlin49fg)

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za80abpgkj3r7rl8m3kfso76266tu6uo0krrgub8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1i6aoj0sjh2bs)
---
[**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znl0q7sfnlcmrpnhpfrtumm8totpov3mqq2dqd8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1i6aoj0sjh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znbe7r5nlc9cdsvedk3tk9lqf69ro0ism4o6nb70_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1i6aoj0sjh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

This race is still neck and neck. We can’t afford to sit back and rest on our laurels — we have to get in the game. But it costs money to run ads, mobilize voters, and send Charlie all across the state of Florida to talk to voters.

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: She's desperate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Smiley for Washington, Inc
body:
Patriot, you need to know this information.

Patriot,

I thought you should be the first to know: 30 yr. Career politician Patty Murray IS SPENDING MILLIONS on a smear campaign against me. _She will do**ANYTHING** to get re-elected._

Murray knows a [**RED WAVE IS COMING TO WASHINGTON**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60727671:6JgBw0oNM:m:1:3299561967:55BC85D769F822D9E401214AB2FA1673:r) , and she's desperate to stop it.

Unlike Murray, I am not bought by dark money mega donors-- I don't have millions to fight back against her attacks. I fully rely on grassroots supporters like YOU who are sick and tired of the status quo.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60727671:6JgBw0oNM:m:1:3299561967:55BC85D769F822D9E401214AB2FA1673:r)
Patty Murray MUST GO, but I can't do it without your support.

**It 's only July and I'm being outspent by a 30yr. career politician who has a long record of abandoning middleclass Americans when they need HELP the most.**

[**I need your help TODAY to fight back against her smear campaign.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60727671:6JgBw0oNM:m:1:3299561967:55BC85D769F822D9E401214AB2FA1673:r)
**[**RUSH GRASSROOTS SUPPORT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60727671:6JgBw0oNM:m:1:3299561967:55BC85D769F822D9E401214AB2FA1673:r)**
---
**[**CHIP IN NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60727671:6JgBw0oNM:m:1:3299561967:55BC85D769F822D9E401214AB2FA1673:r)**
---

**Sorry Patty, there 's a new mom in town and I will NOT be intimidated.**

See you in November,

Tiffany Smiley

* * *
**Our country needs leadership, Friend.**
We need someone who will stand up and work to solve our nation's problems. I'm a proven leader, I've stood up to the DC bureaucrats at the VA to pave the way for ALL veterans to receive the care and treatment they deserve when they return home. Our veterans are willing to pay the ultimate price for our everyday freedoms. But when they come back home, their service is often overlooked by our very own government.
After serving our nation and laying their lives on the line overseas, our veterans should **NOT** have to beg to get the care they deserve here at home. We need to do better for those who defend our nation, Friend.
**That's why I'm running for Senate**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60727672:6JgBw0oNM:m:1:3299561967:55BC85D769F822D9E401214AB2FA1673:r)

**[**MEET MY IMPENDING DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60727672:6JgBw0oNM:m:1:3299561967:55BC85D769F822D9E401214AB2FA1673:r)**

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My first TV ad is live!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220705 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220705]
Team,
I wanted you to be the first to hear some exciting news – our first campaign ad is officially on the air!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220705 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220705]
For my first official ad of this election, I wanted to focus on a phrase I find myself saying constantly: “work with us.”
It’s something I find myself saying to folks on both sides of the aisle – don’t let perfect be the enemy of good, and that I’m willing to work with anyone who is actually there to get something done.
As a former national security professional who served under both Presidents Bush and Obama, working together was always a given. In the national security world, you can work next to someone for 15 years and have no idea which party they vote for. Because it doesn’t matter. It’s irrelevant to the mission of protecting the country, so it never crosses your mind to discuss. Until running for office, I had no idea what the vast majority of my colleagues' political affiliations were.
That’s what I wanted to highlight in this ad. And why I wanted to get it out early. In fact, this is the earliest I’ve ever launched a campaign ad, because I want to spread that message to the folks in Michigan’s new 7th district that I haven’t been able to connect with face to face yet.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220705 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220705]
There will be many more ads to come this cycle as I run in the most competitive House district in Michigan, and one of the top 10 most competitive in the country. For those of you who have donated – this is what you help us create. Thank you: but these ads aren’t cheap, so if you want to chip in a couple bucks to help me execute our most ambitious ad season yet, please click below. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32022?refcode=email20220705&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email20220705]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

P.O. BOX 4145,
EAST LANSING, MI 48826

name: Madison Horn
subject: I still can't believe it -- we...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93512/images/Madison%20Horn%20Logo.png]
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93512/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-02%20at%205.00.35%20PM.png]
Last Tuesday night, we saw the culmination of over 8 months of effort. D uring a time when frustration with the political system is at an all time high, Oklahomans showed an overwhelming support for our campaign - from the urban areas to rural communities.
Out of the six candidates on the ballot, our campaign totaled more votes than almost all of the next four candidates combined. As the front runner we need your help to keep up this momentum.
Our state and nation need leadership that can rise above the political games to solve problems. Our campaign has the distinct support to defeat James Lankford, who has lost his moral standing and the trust of Oklahomans by actively spreading disinformation and treacherously pandering to extremist ideology.
Oklahomans are speaking out and demanding change — everything is on the line this election. Will you help our campaign today?
Will you help our campaign today?
Thank you for your continued support as we move into this next phase of the campaign.
Let's get to work!
Madison

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We're just getting started
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=97a29d8eb90c9a10c342a4fb17e94eb6a12861867fbe80cd9a286be91223c465cbaf6b956190b780a8c503c431aec26fe62219d9c66ce01b8de5a316ea40a10b7b6877b45ab12bc1e4113ecc9695676f

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9317ae370c5ce0504dcc6c1d89e0e64c61e4ba8eeb03702502f8c26c3383ba217d001d7d304c9babcd1a2558d867ad670960d07ccd3e5f0bdc3ff0afd2fc763d

Peter,

When I was elected Governor in 2018, Florida was seen as a bellwether for American politics known for its historically close races. Had Florida turned blue in 2018, we would be facing a very different reality. Thankfully, we won and the free state of Florida is thriving.

We led the way with commonsense freedom-focused policies, providing a blueprint for the rest of the country to follow.

As Governor, I’ve prioritized:

FREEDOM – I’ve kept Florida open, protected jobs and businesses, and safeguarded against mandates by banning vaccine passports.

ECONOMY – Due to Florida being open, we have outpaced the nation in jobs, economic growth, new business formations, and tourism. We now have a record budget surplus.

EDUCATION – I guaranteed the ability of parents to send their kids to school in-person, enacted substantive protections for parents’ rights in education, and secured the largest increase in teacher compensation in state history.

PUBLIC SAFETY – I signed legislation prohibiting local governments from defunding law enforcement, secured $1k bonuses for all police, fire, and EMT personnel, and enacted the largest law enforcement recruitment and retention package in the nation.

ELECTION INTEGRITY – I protected Florida elections by strengthening voter ID laws, banning ballot harvesting, and prohibiting “Zuckerbucks.”

CONSERVATION – I secured a record $3.3 billion to safeguard Florida’s natural resources, improve water quality, and restore Florida’s Everglades.

These are just a few of the policies I’ve put into place and prioritized as Governor. By focusing on these issues, Florida has attracted people from all over the country who value one thing above all: freedom.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9317ae370c5ce0504dcc6c1d89e0e64c61e4ba8eeb03702502f8c26c3383ba217d001d7d304c9babcd1a2558d867ad670960d07ccd3e5f0bdc3ff0afd2fc763d
>>">PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT FOR OUR FREEDOM FIRST MISSION >>>
I am proud of the work we have done during my first term, and I hope that I can count on your support in November to ensure we can keep building on these accomplishments and Keep Florida Free for generations to come.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9317ae370c5ce0504dcc6c1d89e0e64c61e4ba8eeb03702502f8c26c3383ba217d001d7d304c9babcd1a2558d867ad670960d07ccd3e5f0bdc3ff0afd2fc763d
[I’M IN – PLEDGE NOW]

Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9317ae370c5ce0504dcc6c1d89e0e64c61e4ba8eeb03702502f8c26c3383ba217d001d7d304c9babcd1a2558d867ad670960d07ccd3e5f0bdc3ff0afd2fc763d
RUSH IN A DONATION

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor.

----------------------------------------

Ron DeSantis for Governor
301 W. Platt Street Suite 345
Tampa, FL, 33606, US

Now, with the general election officially underway, recent polls show me 1 point behind my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker.** The good news is that we're fighting back with TV ads of our own. But at this critical moment, we're falling short of what we need to keep them on the air. **Unless we close our massive budget gap before the deadline, our ads could go dark, and we'll cede the airwaves to Republican attacks.** I'm running this campaign the right way – without a dime from corporate PACs – so I need grassroots support from folks like you to win. Experts say Senate control is at stake here in Georgia, so we simply cannot afford to start the general election at a disadvantage. clean_body: | | | = Friend, I'll keep this short: National Republicans are blanketing the airwaves with attack ads to defeat me and turn Georgia red. Now, with the general election officially underway, recent polls show me 1 point behind my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker. The good news is that we're fighting back with TV ads of our own. But at this critical moment, we're falling short of what we need to keep them on the air. Unless we close our massive budget gap before the deadline, our ads could go dark, and we'll cede the airwaves to Republican attacks. I'm running this campaign the right way – without a dime from corporate PACs – so I need grassroots support from folks like you to win. Experts say Senate control is at stake here in Georgia, so we simply cannot afford to start the general election at a disadvantage. = = Thank you, – Rev. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Another massacre. She has a plan to stop them.
body:
Cortez Masto for universal background checks
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _It happened again yesterday, mass murder by a lunatic with a weapons he should've neer had, and I'm sickened by the images. _ This time Highland Park, IL, was the scene of overturned baby strollers, folded chairs and bicycles, flanked by blood-soaked pavement, as parade goers trying to celebrate our nation's birthday instead ran for their lives to escape a crazed killer with an AR-15. Six dead, who will never get to celebrate another July 4th with their families. It honestly makes me feel ill. The predictable, the horrifying, never-ending assault on our freedom to live and assemble freely continued unabated, because an out-of-control Supreme Court stocked with right-wingers in robes and a Senate where living ghoul Mitch McConnell won't allow votes on universal background checks, red flag laws and an assault weapons ban. **_Catherine Cortez Masto, Senator from Nevada, has co-sponsored a universal background checks bill and a high-capacity magazine ban--i.e. the ridiculous firepower murderers have access to when they get a magazine with 20, 50, 100 bullets. _** _**We can only pass these if we keep her in the Senate and add 2-4 more Senators who will vote for these common sense measures that will lessen our plague of gun violence by up to 70%.**_ [**Can you give this terrific Senator, Catherine Cortez Masto, $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1601f8a7-35a2-4764-a732-b9f0917c6c61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: CATHERINE CORTEZ MASTO FOR NEVADA!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6cff138-87e2-4fbc-bd99-0d2281a77a5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Cortez Masto knows how to do this. She was elected Nevada's Attorney General, for two terms. She was popular and successful, taking on the NRA and reigning in rogue police departments. She was so good that the late legend, Harry Reid, supported her bid to take his seat when he retired. When she won, she made history as the first woman elected by Nevada to the Senate, and the first Latina to ever serve in the U.S. Senate. We are all heartbroken after the tragedy yesterday. But if we can turn that heartbreak into dedication to make sure we're a different country in a year, and start by reelecting Cortez Masto and adding a few more progresive, Democratic Senators, we can get the change we need to make our country what it should be by the next 4th of July. Nevada is a state that both Donald Trump and other Republicans have targeted to try and win back, which is why it was one of the closest state presidential races in 2016.**_ Yet, Cortez Mastro, like Biden, prevailed. And we can--and MUST--make sure she does once again, if we're to have any hope of stopping these despicable, preventable tragedies. _** [**Can you give this terrific Senator, Catherine Cortez Masto, $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74585473-a340-4850-8393-5cdbc2c74058/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting to make this nation a safer place for all of our children. Cliff

body:
**Signature Pending:[Sign the petition to BAN Trump from running for office →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47405656/354220585/359959820?source=email_070522_bantrumpRS&utm_campaign=email_070522_bantrumpRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RiYWZmMy02ZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7NB5Zan-GgzoyIy16PTsMlAgttLK2eBp1qwgVF2oAOc=&emci=721e945b-67fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=83dbaff3-6efc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296)**
Section Three of the 14th Amendment states that no state or federal office holder “who, having previously taken an oath ... to support the Constitution of the United States, shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion against the same, or given aid or comfort to the enemies thereof.”

Donald Trump incited an insurrection on January 6th, 2021. Under the 14th amendment, he should be BANNED from ever running for office again!

**If you agree that we need to invoke the 14th amendment and ban Trump from office, please sign and share this petition:**
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47405657/354220587/359959820?source=email_070522_bantrumpRS&utm_campaign=email_070522_bantrumpRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RiYWZmMy02ZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7NB5Zan-GgzoyIy16PTsMlAgttLK2eBp1qwgVF2oAOc=&emci=721e945b-67fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=83dbaff3-6efc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296)
---
Peter,

January 6th was one of the darkest days in our country's history. Donald Trump incited a riot on the U.S. Capitol, _and he was never held accountable._

The 14th Amendment prohibits anyone who has violated their oath of office, by engaging in insurrection or aiding in a rebellion, from running for federal office.

That means Trump could be disqualified from running for office EVER again. And Congress could do it with a simple majority!

So we have a petition to send to Congress urging them to BAN Trump from running for office, and we need you to sign it!
**[Click here to add your name to our petition →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47405658/354220588/359959820?source=email_070522_bantrumpRS&utm_campaign=email_070522_bantrumpRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2RiYWZmMy02ZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7NB5Zan-GgzoyIy16PTsMlAgttLK2eBp1qwgVF2oAOc=&emci=721e945b-67fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=83dbaff3-6efc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=25616296)**
_**PETITION TO U.S. CONGRESS**_
**Invoke the 14th amendment and BAN Trump from running for office!**

name: Re-Elect Justice Ingrid Gustafson to the Montana Supreme Court
subject: REMINDER - Wed. July 6, @ 5pm Great Northern Bar and Grill
body:
Whitefish event hosted in support of the effort to re-elect Justice Ingrid Gustafson to the Montana Supreme Court in 2022 | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62c44e9f34cb372729ef2c13&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.gustafsonformontana.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62bdb498f80fe24d168d93a6%26ss_email_id%3D62c44e9f34cb372729ef2c13%26ss_campaign_name%3DREMINDER%2B-%2BWed.%2BJuly%2B6%252C%2B%2540%2B5pm%2BGreat%2BNorthern%2BBar%2Band%2BGrill%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-07-05T14%253A46%253A03Z&w=6179d71408f9587afc0cb8be&l=en-US&s=33encVmShKmMU_DCruiTw2MAwzY%3D)
---
| **REMINDER - REMINDER - REMINDER****Remember to Bring Along Friends and Family Members****Please join Montana Supreme Court Justice Ingrid Gustafson in Whitefish in support of her effort to be re-elected to the Montana Supreme Court****Wednesday, July 6, 2022, 5-7 pm****The Great Northern Bar & Grill****27 Central Avenue****Whitefish, Montana****You can donate in advance at**[**www.gustafsonformontana.com**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62c44e9f34cb372729ef2c13&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.gustafsonformontana.com%2Fdonate%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D62bdb498f80fe24d168d93a6%26ss_email_id%3D62c44e9f34cb372729ef2c13%26ss_campaign_name%3DREMINDER%2B-%2BWed.%2BJuly%2B6%252C%2B%2540%2B5pm%2BGreat%2BNorthern%2BBar%2Band%2BGrill%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-07-05T14%253A46%253A03Z&w=6179d71408f9587afc0cb8be&l=en-US&s=LaofNF_QrOJDfVb4AaaI3ZJ0c40%3D)**or mail a check to Gustafson for Montana, 626 Lavender Street, Billings, MT 59106. Please donate $700 (the legal limit) or whatever amount you and your family can afford.** If you are willing to be listed as a person who endorses Justice Gustafson’s candidacy to be re-elected to the Montana Supreme Court in 2022, please send an email to grassroots@gustafsonformontana.com ... ****
---
---
|
---
**Hosting this event for Justice Gustafson in Whitefish are:****Judge Kitty Curtis (Ret.), Judge Stu Stadler (Ret.), Judge Jim Manley (Ret.), Former Montana State Senator Dan Weinberg, Scott Wurster, Paula & Frank Sweeney, Carole & Bart Erickson, Roger Sullivan and Commander John B. Herrington**. You have a very clear choice in the 2022 Montana Supreme Court race, the most important vote you will cast in the general election on November 8, 2022.Justice Ingrid Gustafson is seeking re-election to Montana’s highest court. In her nearly 20 years of judicial experience, the last five on the Montana Supreme Court, she has handled 1000s of cases and earned a reputation for being impartial and fair. She is non-partisan as required by Montana law, and works hard to keep politics out of the courtroom. Justice Gustafson has engaged in bettering our Montana community—starting and operating a drug court; piloting a child welfare court; serving on Yellowstone County’s Park Board, as President of the Amend Park Development Board, and as Big Sky State Games Soccer Commissioner; and decades-long coaching and mentoring youth soccer players and serving as a high school and collegiate soccer referee. She cares deeply about Montana and Montanans. Her opponent, Jim Brown, is a career lobbyist and a partisan politician who advocates for and benefits from out-of-state, large corporate money to promote his candidacy.“I don’t believe there is too much money in politics . . . it should be unlimited,” said Brown, in the documentary, _Dark Money_ , which exposed the influence of out-of-state corporate and illegal campaign activity in Montana. Brown represented the scandal-ridden out-of-state corporate money groups featured in the documentary. He has zero judicial experience and has never even represented a client before the Montana Supreme Court.In the recent primary, over $300,000 of dark money was spent by out-of-state corporations to buy her opponent a place on the general ballot. Although Montana law forbids judicial candidates from seeking partisan endorsements, Brown flouts these laws by participating in partisan events and accepting partisan endorsements.We cannot let this seat on the Montana Supreme Court be bought by out-of-state corporations and extreme partisans.
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
| | | | |
---|---|---|---|---

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Yesterday family's photos / July 4 reflection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR BOB
body:
Yesterday, all my children and grandchildren walked in the parade with me. Families all across America celebrated Independence — walked in parades, waved flags, laughed, cheered. Many in Illinois planned to do the same, and instead found themselves mourning. As we celebrate liberty, we must also recognize we have so much work to do, on many fronts. Too many of our neighbors are losing rights to life and liberty. We hold immense responsibility to advocate for change and mend the brokenness in our systems.| | | _**Hello — Yesterday, families all across America celebrated Independence, walked in parades, waved flags, laughed, cheered.**_**
---
**With celebration comes responsibility**

Reflecting on Independence Day in 2022, I'm reminded of how far the United States has come — our progression, our regression — and how united our founders intended us to be. We can and must move forward together to be better. The United States of America is the greatest nation in the history of the world not because we are perfect, but because our founders established the Republic to always improve, to progress, and forever try to become a more perfect union. Our founders established this nation with an unalterable resolution — practice civil virtue, and an unattainable goal — become more free. To protect every citizen's inalienable rights, we need to ensure all Americans are free. In 1776 the Continental Congress wrote and signed the Declaration of Independence. It closes with "[Americans] __**mutually pledge to each other our lives, our fortunes and our sacred honor**__." To honor that pledge, we've got work to do — wrongs to right — but I'm proud to be an American because through Democracy, we always have the freedom to be a more perfect union. Please [join me](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47406393/354223660/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjQxNGExYy03MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yb5Xp9tlrpI6ebp9WRsVd9LQJYa4rBY7SLYgCpL94xo=) in that Democratic fight, -Dr. Bob

clean_body: Yesterday, all my children and grandchildren walked in the parade with me. Families all across America celebrated Independence — walked in parades, waved flags, laughed, cheered. Many in Illinois planned to do the same, and instead found themselves mourning. As we celebrate liberty, we must also recognize we have so much work to do, on many fronts. Too many of our neighbors are losing rights to life and liberty. We hold immense responsibility to advocate for change and mend the brokenness in our systems.| | | Hello — Yesterday, families all across America celebrated Independence, walked in parades, waved flags, laughed, cheered. With celebration comes responsibility = = | | = | = | | Many in Illinois planned to do the same, and instead found themselves mourning. Women across the country were feeling less free. As we celebrate liberty, we must also recognize we have so much work to do, on many fronts. Too many of our neighbors are losing rights to life and liberty. We hold immense responsibility to advocate for change and mend the brokenness in our systems. = Reflecting on Independence Day in 2022, I'm reminded of how far the United States has come — our progression, our regression — and how united our founders intended us to be. We can and must move forward together to be better. The United States of America is the greatest nation in the history of the world not because we are perfect, but because our founders established the Republic to always improve, to progress, and forever try to become a more perfect union. Our founders established this nation with an unalterable resolution — practice civil virtue, and an unattainable goal — become more free. To protect every citizen's inalienable rights, we need to ensure all Americans are free. In 1776 the Continental Congress wrote and signed the Declaration of Independence. It closes with "[Americans] mutually pledge to each other our lives, our fortunes and our sacred honor__." To honor that pledge, we've got work to do — wrongs to right — but I'm proud to be an American because through Democracy, we always have the freedom to be a more perfect union. name: Peter Franchot
subject: Two weeks to Election Day!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
We’re officially TWO WEEKS AWAY from the July 19 primary election. The Early Voting period begins on Thursday this week, and many voters have already returned mail-in ballots. We are in the final stretch of this competitive race, and I couldn’t be more excited.
To help us reach as many voters as possible in these final two weeks, my team has set an end-of-day grassroots fundraising goal of $6,000 dollars by 11:59 PM tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=20.22] By pitching in, you can help us pay for more yard signs and field literature, create more digital ads, place more phone calls and knock on more doors, and ultimately build the critical mass of support we need to win this race. So, what do you say?
RUSH $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=10]
RUSH $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=20.22]
RUSH $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=50]
RUSH $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=100]
RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot]
I know that a groundswell of grassroots donations can easily get us to our fundraising goal. The clock is counting down to election day and we don’t have much time left – it’s important that we get as many donations as quickly and as early as possible so as to MAXIMIZE the number of voters we can reach in these final 14 days.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=20.22]
We are the FRONTRUNNERS in this crowded field, and it’s all thanks to the incredible activists, allies, and friends who continue to power this movement from the grassroots up. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your continued support for our people-powered movement.
We’re counting on you in this make-or-break period of the race! Click here to help us reach our fundraising goal of $6,000 by our 11:59 PM deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=20.22]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeks_franchot?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

subject: what are YOUR thoughts on the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
We need your help to protect our rights
| | |
---
**The Supreme Court's conservative majority officially struck down _Roe v. Wade_!**

**Friend, you've been selected to answer our rapid-response live poll before it closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, but your response is still missing:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47407783/354229783/902191295?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk3681-su-nd&sustainers=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDdhMGEyOC03M2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1RFT6dwQ3lhVTZTYb7fHbz3HB0Rfaee3_GSdpA9Bj0s=&emci=a10e976a-f4f7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=6d7a0a28-73fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)
**The ultraconservative majority on the Supreme Court is prioritizing the political agenda of right-wing extremists, and we need your help to protect our rights, friend.**

The Supreme Court just shamelessly reversed nearly 50 years of precedent by overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , stealing millions of women's ability to make their own health care choices.
This is one of the most dangerous rulings in our nation's modern history, which is why it's essential we update our data on where top Democrats like you stand regarding the Supreme Court. **But we still need another 32 responses from your area before 11:59 p.m. tonight, and yours is still missing, friend. Please, tell us now:**
**WHAT GRADE WOULD YOU GIVE THE SUPREME COURT?**

Friend, you've been selected to answer our rapid-response live poll before it closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, but your response is still missing: The ultraconservative majority on the Supreme Court is prioritizing the political agenda of right-wing extremists, and we need your help to protect our rights, friend. The Supreme Court just shamelessly reversed nearly 50 years of precedent by overturning Roe v. Wade , stealing millions of women's ability to make their own health care choices. This is one of the most dangerous rulings in our nation's modern history, which is why it's essential we update our data on where top Democrats like you stand regarding the Supreme Court. But we still need another 32 responses from your area before 11:59 p.m. tonight, and yours is still missing, friend. Hi there –
I’d prefer not to email asking you for money. My focus is on fighting for action on climate change, protecting a woman’s reproductive rights, and lowering costs.
But the reality is that I cannot continue that work if I lose my reelection, and New Hampshire is a purple state, which means we have to reach every single voter to ensure that I can win in November.
**Since I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, our budgeting needs to be airtight.** And with Republicans running over $10 million in attack ads against me and a recent poll showing me down by 2 points, it's absolutely crucial that we stay on track with our fundraising.
**[Please, will you donate $3 or as much as you can to my reelection campaign today? If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats won't hold the Senate, so your gift will help us win and protect our narrow majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47408143/354231695/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1248-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2U1MDJkOS03M2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKsTgxi3IgXrM_bqbUrFXr19MxNAiP9w-V0L8npMtQ8=)**
Thank you for getting involved.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

**That’s why it would mean so much to our team to know you’re on our team.**

Team Deluzio

clean_body: If you’re committed to fighting for our common good alongside Chris, then will you endorse his campaign today? | = Hey Derek, Chris is proud to be endorsed by the Allegheny County and Beaver County Democratic Committees, Planned Parenthood Action Fund, VoteVets, and dozens of local leaders and labor unions across Western Pennsylvania. Not to mention, he’s a DCCC “Red to Blue” candidate. | Chris knows there’s great power in numbers. That spirit is what led him to successfully fight for a union as part of the Pitt Faculty Organizing Committee with the United Steelworkers, and it’s what’s leading him to run a people-powered campaign for Congress today. That’s why it would mean so much to our team to know you’re on our team. Thank you so much, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. body:

Peter, Even The NY Times has confirmed what we’ve all known for a long time:**inflation is far from over.** We are suffering, and there’s no one to blame but Joe Biden, Chrissy Houlahan, and the rest of the Biden Democrats who continue to spend money we don’t have on wasteful programs and without any accountability. Now, we have to hold them accountable.
---
---
Chrissy Houlahan has voted with Biden **100%** of the time–including the wasteful spending policies that devastated our economy and hurt average Americans. **She isn’t looking out for us. She isn’t on our side.** **It is imperative that we flip this seat in the fall**. We can’t risk another two years of economic instability and pain. We have to fire Chrissy Houlahan and put our country back on a path toward common sense. If you agree, stand with me today!
---

| Week in Review - Gov. Hogan Endorses and the 4th of July Tuesday, July 5, 2022
Good morning!
Matthew had another busy week on the trail with the Most Fun Campaign in America. Here's what you may have missed:
---
| |
---
| Republicans continue to unite behind Matthew's campaign with Maryland Governor Larry Hogan being the latest high profile leader to join #TeamFoldi. See what he had to say about the decision:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cpTyJNZeHZiJej3gduud18zu_YkyyqsNT9voMRH61vKQIpaqy-iDMwfCsXZACqylWhLN8yuk-_lQSM-KzWDW5RYvlRMFbL7royfuUXQyMqNnB3ZYgj4fStD0vsVI5PdFab-HfKt7i0Xa0Di4jEdKg_nZm3_WGXCLLP64fCUP3bCq24YhcMA9U_QvV9Rc2Ohn&c=FmGE0tvG_UyAsvdf72KLxmVHD4JT-EskBk9V-qiy4fVkIMTncdtV3A==&ch=8R-7LZLm8K7y5B_P8KhXwxzyN32YugCd8-5cEKxNeJOcBBiIGnZ_VQ==)
---
| | |
---
| On Monday, Team Foldi had a HUGE showing at the phone bank as we spoke with thousands of voters all across the 6th District.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| On Tuesday Matthew joined Frederick County's "Our Voices for Freedom" at their meeting to discuss the importance of the Constitution and conservative values.
---
|
---
|
---

name: Polling Team @ Fairness Project
subject: POLL: Do you approve of SCOTUS?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project
body:
https://www.thefairnessproject.org/ [https://www.thefairnessproject.org/]
The Supreme Court had a very busy June, issuing a history-making opinion on reproductive rights. Needless to say, we’re shocked and outraged by their decision on Roe v. Wade.

But we wanted to know what you thought, too, team.

Will you let us know: Do you approve of SCOTUS right now?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-July2022-tyupsell?refcode=E16764-20220705-SCOTUSApproval-SL-SCOTUS-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-July2022-tyupsell?refcode=E16764-20220705-SCOTUSApproval-SL-SCOTUS-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

SCOTUS has handed down some deeply alarming decisions in these last few weeks of June — all of them, already disrupting life across the country. There are six justices in particular we think of as the troublemakers behind all this, and we want to know what you think too → Please take our poll:

Do you approve of SCOTUS right now?

NO! → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/TFPUS-ALL-Email-July2022-tyupsell?refcode=E16764-20220705-SCOTUSApproval-SL-SCOTUS-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15]

subject: Here's our June recap, friend

body:
Check out what our team was up to this month.

| |
---
Hi team – As you know, this was a difficult month, and we wanted to reach out to show our appreciation for your support. [__**Before we go into what the last month looked like, please consider chipping in $22 or more today to keep this campaign going. We rely on small-dollar donors like you to get Eric to Congress.**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47410245/354239482/1579145984?refcode2=ce08acb4-79fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&amount=22&refcode=220705_hq_junerecap_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTA4YWNiNC03OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QThs5hIE1DA7Y-Zr_f7jCZVv2d316Brx8oGqwyzfLWY=) Below, we're sharing with you a photo recap of some of the events Eric and our team participated in this June. June should be a month of remembrance and celebration. Our team was excited to participate in Pride parades and Juneteenth events – bringing together members of the community to honor and fight for civil rights. Instead, we saw unprecedented attacks on women, people of color, children, and LGBTQ+ individuals at the hands of conservatives and the alt-right movement.** Unfortunately, Eric's opponent is right in the thick of that right-wing agenda.** [__**Eric is up against the Republican fundraising machine, and they're razor-focused on flipping FL-13 red. Will you chip in to make sure we can hold onto our Democratic majority?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47410246/354239483/1579145984?refcode2=ce08acb4-79fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=220705_hq_junerecap_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTA4YWNiNC03OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QThs5hIE1DA7Y-Zr_f7jCZVv2d316Brx8oGqwyzfLWY=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47410247/354239484/1579145984?refcode2=ce08acb4-79fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=220705_hq_junerecap_i1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTA4YWNiNC03OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QThs5hIE1DA7Y-Zr_f7jCZVv2d316Brx8oGqwyzfLWY=)** Eric and Team Lynn at the St. Pete Pride Parade **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47410248/354239485/1579145984?refcode2=ce08acb4-79fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=220705_hq_junerecap_i2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTA4YWNiNC03OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QThs5hIE1DA7Y-Zr_f7jCZVv2d316Brx8oGqwyzfLWY=)**_Protesting against the Supreme Court's overturning of_ Roe v. Wade. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47410249/354239486/1579145984?refcode2=ce08acb4-79fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=220705_hq_junerecap_i3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTA4YWNiNC03OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QThs5hIE1DA7Y-Zr_f7jCZVv2d316Brx8oGqwyzfLWY=)**_Celebrating Juneteenth and supporting the Woodson Museum of African-American History._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47410250/354239487/1579145984?refcode2=ce08acb4-79fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&refcode=220705_hq_junerecap_i4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTA4YWNiNC03OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QThs5hIE1DA7Y-Zr_f7jCZVv2d316Brx8oGqwyzfLWY=)**_At the March for Our Lives protest with Moms Demand Action and community members to fight for gun reform._ Thank you for being on our team.

clean_body: Check out what our team was up to this month. | | Hi team – As you know, this was a difficult month, and we wanted to reach out to show our appreciation for your support. = Below, we're sharing with you a photo recap of some of the events Eric and our team participated in this June. June should be a month of remembrance and celebration. Our team was excited to participate in Pride parades and Juneteenth events – bringing together members of the community to honor and fight for civil rights. Instead, we saw unprecedented attacks on women, people of color, children, and LGBTQ+ individuals at the hands of conservatives and the alt-right movement. Unfortunately, Eric's opponent is right in the thick of that right-wing agenda. = = Eric and Team Lynn at the St. Pete Pride Parade against the Supreme Court's overturning of Roe v. Wade. Juneteenth and supporting the Woodson Museum of African-American History. the March for Our Lives protest with Moms Demand Action and community members to fight for gun reform. Thank you for being on our team. – Team Lynn HQ | Eric Lynn is a former Senior Advisor to President Obama, national security expert, small business owner, community advocate, and St. Petersburg Native who is ready to lead Pinellas County forward. Empathic, passionate, and pragmatic, Eric knows how to get the job done in Washington on day one. Will you join Eric's team and support him for Congress? = = PAID FOR BY ERIC LYNN FOR CONGRESS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of A
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2k0eg9e0hv936ik5a40uj0kronbmcgkpsbf88co_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfecbi6qpn1dr66pp34srjm9hr9p3hclojcdhgmhp74cj664r61ob1eeo7ct5gm1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor5ddgc1pbephhmaqr0ptgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ap21ukd4ob5sdeav2konghjhcjqpsf85lvqh90_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I 'm telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - _Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you're thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, "what about them is influential?!"

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren't, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That 's why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America 's black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I'll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaikmi0sjbmrebvj44q8bq0g776s8s7p2c6j9vh8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the "Black Lives Matter" organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn't have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I'm giving back to the Black community to make sure they don't become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8fvavf4539evc5li45r1tc76e4rqu64okkl07n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here 's how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2317k7dv0hfd9bj67j2bh1n4s6tval0k9244np0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zovav4dlnpua9hls1pf06ds33935dpnr4kbv6vh8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za3e8000sq1apk5m84gq386p9ssas20e8jg6dfg8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3at69m2r1cirev4r6akrc6qvk0r4sakcq8o48qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z62laokrj7tbk8j60i4rfu5b9jpvou4b85mftk2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zehde25hk0een60t54e8v44r9q4pvkr099mrgoig_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjbuvo6d7aq5jn417mup27ft5cbdrbrt10cpjo00_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zue5p3gohrjj9ctcruu3ahq05hnc6cn4nkncfb38_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl97u4aarjgq9c1s5nnh1aoal8tci1j62kbo6028_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a "DO" tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdhlqvrljh7dihie75ff9fscgni38q1n209qgb4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcjlnisp0n4crc4j7gvhud73jl641kqalcm3hvv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zadclbsr1mvt508hvc143qhji7jtce2a4fu50f68_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpdahffuviprlc01d86brp1nm2lfa0vlr5436lu8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdhi8snvnlgq8vsvshpm4ahkqetu20lvnnjjtue0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zua0q0nbhoellkgkfrm3vpbgoj8s8fmnjfsng0n0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4o563g44j4tliok070pegne257k8ane1rqr84no_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlceabbb7uq7s1dgu931fn2k4ihcj50qja7c37c8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1fqlpl1s13g7k672dc9ihud2iuquabjkev7cc80_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h2bs)

People ask me, "What does BLEXIT mean?"

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_" If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor." \- Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zn7i4cqgfmlq9cnr4t9g7r1110cv4i7s6j2ih4m8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z69qjtsf4usmma9cu0rnaa5lullbq03ki5l30ci8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j6epb7c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dick
subject: FWD: Really need your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend, I'm following up to make sure you saw the survey I sent around (see below).
---
With Election Day fast approaching, our campaign has zero margin for error - which means I need all hands on deck to win. However, I'm still looking for another 14 members of this grassroots team to share their input before my strategy meeting tomorrow - and your response is missing.
Hearing what's on YOUR mind is essential to building a laser-focused campaign strategy that will protect Democratic Senate control and deliver progress for the American people. So please, with my next strategy meeting coming up, can you please make sure you've submitted your feedback? **[Click here to take our new July Priorities Survey (only takes about 45 seconds!) right now.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-2022-july-priorities?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1214-fr-nd)**
Thanks so much for taking the time to share your input.
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Sat, Jul 2, 2022
Subject: Really need your thoughts

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=qkVJuzR5u6AJdzj97CM%2Bt4U8GKJR3ztu&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
We are at a critical moment for the future of our country:
* The fundamental civil and human rights of women evaporated when the conservative U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade.
* Justice Clarence Thomas signaled that precedents protecting same-sex marriage and contraception should be next on the chopping block.
* Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are considering a nationwide ban on abortion if they take back the Senate.

It's clearer than ever: We _must_ protect and expand Democratic control of the Senate to stop the GOP's extremist agenda and protect our cherished rights. **That 's why my campaign is ramping up its efforts to protect this Democratic seat - and it's why I'm coming to you directly seeking feedback to help my strategy.**
**[Input from grassroots supporters like you is essential to creating the kind of country we want to live in, so I'm asking: Will you please take just a moment to let me know what issues matter most to you? We just opened this new survey and are counting on 85 more responses from our most engaged supporters before midnight. ](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-2022-july-priorities?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1214-fr-nd)**
What's happening on the Supreme Court isn't random, Friend. Restricting the rights of women, putting bodily autonomy into the hands of the government, and preventing government intervention to stop gun violence - it's all the result of decades of right-wing efforts to force a backward, dangerous agenda on the American people.
Their agenda is extreme and not representative of the majority of Americans' priorities. **But my willingness to stand up against the Republican Party has made me a target. I know that the only way I can ensure we keep this seat blue is with the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you.**
**[So please, will you share your feedback on our newest strategy? We have a number of campaign strategy meetings coming up this week, and I want to make sure that this grassroots team's thoughts are well reflected. ](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-2022-july-priorities?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1214-fr-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WfX%2BRVyVWTk%2B4%2B8UcWH5WIU8GKJR3ztu&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

clean_body: Friend, I'm following up to make sure you saw the survey I sent around (see below). With Election Day fast approaching, our campaign has zero margin for error - which means I need all hands on deck to win. However, I'm still looking for another 14 members of this grassroots team to share their input before my strategy meeting tomorrow - and your response is missing. Hearing what's on YOUR mind is essential to building a laser-focused campaign strategy that will protect Democratic Senate control and deliver progress for the American people. So please, with my next strategy meeting coming up, can you please make sure you've submitted your feedback? Thanks so much for taking the time to share your input. Dick \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Richard Blumenthal Date: Sat, Jul 2, 2022 Subject: Really need your thoughts Friend, We are at a critical moment for the future of our country: The fundamental civil and human rights of women evaporated when the conservative U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Justice Clarence Thomas signaled that precedents protecting same-sex marriage and contraception should be next on the chopping block. Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are considering a nationwide ban on abortion if they take back the Senate. It's clearer than ever: We must protect and expand Democratic control of the Senate to stop the GOP's extremist agenda and protect our cherished rights. That 's why my campaign is ramping up its efforts to protect this Democratic seat - and it's why I'm coming to you directly seeking feedback to help my strategy. What's happening on the Supreme Court isn't random, Friend. Restricting the rights of women, putting bodily autonomy into the hands of the government, and preventing government intervention to stop gun violence - it's all the result of decades of right-wing efforts to force a backward, dangerous agenda on the American people. Their agenda is extreme and not representative of the majority of Americans' priorities. But my willingness to stand up against the Republican Party has made me a target. I know that the only way I can ensure we keep this seat blue is with the best possible campaign strategy - powered by people like you. ** Thank you, Dick

name: American Defense News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z15ru053jceesudi0a6utsdkefvivtpnouug8bto_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j61or2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sri6dibfchnm4oj8dbk6ao6ac31m6rjcoj4emp39pdnclqr8djhchhmbdjhc1jrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p3ephkcapm8ptie9j31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdlgatpiibc2o6o19rjuf6hirffss9k89foh8j10_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j61or2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgtvdiim9r6ulj8jop342pl98ihs9f23cgbj8hq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j61or2chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn1eihsequs7jvcn8pn3vi7coq86qu7i7mgibr8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1j61or2chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
