name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6113%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XCC2UvkLMqLoVan7i%2f6iSw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63203%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9V5crp4uSJAZ7Y7skJKkYA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63204%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MWRpZGYCSlWjoKswWTLzWQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c63204%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MWRpZGYCSlWjoKswWTLzWQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6113%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XCC2UvkLMqLoVan7i%2f6iSw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6113%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XCC2UvkLMqLoVan7i%2f6iSw&sysid=1)

body:
|
---
Friend,

I wanted to reach out and express my concern. I am going to be honest with you. Fetterman is fundraising millions of dollars, and because I was in a recount my campaign funds are running low. I could really really use your support. [**_Just $5 or $10 will make a drastic difference._**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=f31daac3645b48ddb10dfe703addcf3b&_e=K_dH0bbf30fLAXteqVxbFCGj7JFfydxV5orf4p-cSTtHt6QLDhwdZhvADQeKW_D5idkgOevKOv38weNqxlx03MJpH6eEwPK8hEvKD8ohOoZzEHs1cF4-rn6oTfzO3TBI_925kOKv7mthlkZ_EOTVw94G7vxezTjECFpfoL3VIabCNgqYQZlnDzoTJFMlX-PJS-k-mGIqmy-OgiL2Gl_S5kbrUk1VYhB4RDtwskbTm-HTxVFs7HH0gW8dWpxWCw9OYMrEWnev9xOJTn5RubJHe5R2e5KcQCDmcpEeYKlp75ieIYfi5ZAd-D0UsjnnQ-k6zizeYpjIrjZFalIU3jmDOa3y6EgC6pFeK_onuivWThvivhbtqwe5ERoiHPLMst-T60XjnKhXB2ketwsEh841sHoGnAwqtXMD_GV2yKwoOMZzoOrWZUaPPt1Hj5fUilMd_g6o6zGCCmpfOG_V8eFZa-SxuEaqwGviTprGKdNVY-o%3D)

We need someone who is going to BEAT socialist John Fetterman. I will beat him, but only if I have your Grassroot support. Fetterman is gaining money and momentum in this general election, and Pennsylvanians cannot afford that.

[**_I am humbly asking if you can chip in just $5 or $10? Use this link to make a secure donation: CLICK HERE_**](http://links.doctoroz.com/u/click?_t=2b05aaee21f04e6792020c0ad1924b95&_m=f31daac3645b48ddb10dfe703addcf3b&_e=K_dH0bbf30fLAXteqVxbFCGj7JFfydxV5orf4p-cSTtHt6QLDhwdZhvADQeKW_D5idkgOevKOv38weNqxlx03MJpH6eEwPK8hEvKD8ohOoZzEHs1cF4-rn6oTfzO3TBI_925kOKv7mthlkZ_EOTVw94G7vxezTjECFpfoL3VIabCNgqYQZlnDzoTJFMlX-PJS-k-mGIqmy-OgiL2Gl_S5kbrUk1VYhB4RDtwskbTm-HTxVFs7HH0gW8dWpxWCw9OYMrEWnev9xOJTn5RubJHe8yB5w38zneujYPWYrQHjuURUXlkxgc-tS09hKhNQIy2FkjZpYEu2Njl_Bc9fFDJh_Br0C9tZVkBnThk8IOVIPplLNrzwD3O1qhjiQVaHUCz6VRLtGfFAeopZ779UPieizlmSTQ4rpqr6NuXJv8wYOP35Erc4Ht4dDmldD_-LaPDiHGBt8-0S8-fnougzhxpWKfbcuUQaE6ZqolYfTyXUQk%3D)

Thank you for all your time and support.

God Bless,

Mehmet Oz

Ps: Sorry for the typos.

_Sent from my iPhone_

| Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate

My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z82rd4qqfbp1o9fpogvitmtq93f5k5t5hqhvsos8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1gm8pj6cth2bs)

name: Team Zoe
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]
Our team cannot thank you enough for your continued support of this campaign. Your unwavering generosity has helped us surpass our EOQ fundraising goal, and prove that we have the strength to continue our fight.

Thank you for continually standing up for our mission to ensure California’s new 18th Congressional District – which includes San Jose and runs south through Santa Clara, Monterey, Santa Cruz, and San Benito counties – has the thoughtful leadership it deserves.

While this milestone should rightly be celebrated, our work is nowhere near finished.

We must remain steadfast in our efforts to help Zoe secure another term in Congress. Zoe never stops advocating for improving public transportation, renewable energy, women’s access to reproductive health care, and other imminent issues in our nation.

Your support is appreciated more than ever as this race ramps up.

Let’s keep this momentum going.

— Team Zoe

P.S. If you want to make your first contribution, or double down on your support for our campaign, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2207?refcode=ZL_EM_ST_4MO_20220705_1_1]
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. | | | | |

# [Sign the petition to corporate America: Stop funding insurrectionists! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce531b10-cd32-46ec-8ae1-cb50e3c6263e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | In the wake of the January 6 insurrection, many corporations pledged to stop giving donations to the Sedition Caucus — the 147 Republican members of Congress who voted against certifying the 2020 election and helped fuel the lies that led to the attack. But several Fortune 500 companies and corporate trade groups have donated more than $16 MILLION to Sedition Caucus members just since the insurrection! That includes nearly $1 million to Republican members of Congress being investigated by the January 6th Committee. Despite the January 6th Committee’s masterful presentation of evidence against the insurrectionists, these same bad actors have only become more committed to sabotaging future elections. They are a threat to our democracy and our way of life. These election deniers and the corporations that are funding them MUST be held accountable. [Sign the petition: Demand companies stop funding insurrectionists >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e7be5d8-15ff-47b5-bfa1-075ae4ff166c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The future of the American Dream
body:
We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9315%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=x8J4BCXsZNij%2blrIEBov0A&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37765%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w8H4YCtF01fRQ%2fqCot1N8g&sysid=1)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach--especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37766%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CFiGu4zKNWm5Yu03qf1PrQ&sysid=1)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: **[https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37767%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iRRQRsL764hlt1sH1wm0VA&sysid=1)** Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. McIndoe [**QUESTION 1: Do you believe the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory are destroying the American education system?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37768%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PF9s%2fxcAeUG6TB9EnHmT%2bw&sysid=1)
---
| | [Yes](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37769%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G2Ddrov5j2SJNmQJ0cJWcw&sysid=1)
---
| [No](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c37760%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bnrx7HaSO7gvhrSAsKW0Zw&sysid=1)

Pitch in $10 to start this general election race strong, defend Michael’s seat, and protect our slim Senate majority:**[actblue.com/donate/mfb-em-bennet-defense-fund-22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47417489/354261018/99707613?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNmYjBiNi04OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UrMqZGiEVhgFLrsIlNdnmP0O63GoWvg0SDYmrXn_4k=)**_
---
Team—
The start of this quarter sets the tone for the general election race. Falling short in our fundraising means we might have to cut the rapid response, digital advertising, and voter outreach programs that it takes to fend off Michael's official opponent and the National GOP.
Michael rejects contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because he doesn’t work for corporate special interests, he works for you. Right now, there are two ways to help us close the gap and defend Michael’s seat:
1. **[Make a $10 donation to the Bennet Defense Fund to become a founding donor at the start of this general election race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47417490/354261019/99707613?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNmYjBiNi04OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UrMqZGiEVhgFLrsIlNdnmP0O63GoWvg0SDYmrXn_4k=)**
2. **[Make a larger contribution than normal to close the gap between our fundraising and the over $200 million the National GOP has raised this year to flip the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47417491/354261020/99707613?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNmYjBiNi04OWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0UrMqZGiEVhgFLrsIlNdnmP0O63GoWvg0SDYmrXn_4k=)**

Thanks to supporters like you, Michael banned surprise emergency medical bills to help folks in their most vulnerable moments, secured a historic investment in bridge and road repair that will create good-paying jobs in Colorado and nationwide, and lifted millions of children out of poverty through monthly Child Tax Credit payments. Now, he’s continuing to fight to enshrine the right to choose nationwide.
**So, will you pitch in $10 — or what works best for your budget — to help us close the gap and defend Michael’s seat?**

clean_body: There are two ways to help us close the gap and defend Michael’s seat... | = | Michael’s GOP opponent hit the ground running to distort Michael’s record and fire up his base. Pitch in $10 to start this general election race strong, defend Michael’s seat, and protect our slim Senate majority:= Team— The start of this quarter sets the tone for the general election race. Falling short in our fundraising means we might have to cut the rapid response, digital advertising, and voter outreach programs that it takes to fend off Michael's official opponent and the National GOP. Michael rejects contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because he doesn’t work for corporate special interests, he works for you. Right now, there are two ways to help us close the gap and defend Michael’s seat: 1. = 2. = Thanks to supporters like you, Michael banned surprise emergency medical bills to help folks in their most vulnerable moments, secured a historic investment in bridge and road repair that will create good-paying jobs in Colorado and nationwide, and lifted millions of children out of poverty through monthly Child Tax Credit payments. Now, he’s continuing to fight to enshrine the right to choose nationwide. So, will you pitch in $10 — or what works best for your budget — to help us close the gap and defend Michael’s seat? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Yours in this fight, Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Patty Pansing Brooks
subject: Thank you for the beautiful card!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
My heart is full – thank you. 💜

| | Dear friends, I wanted to send a quick thank you for your kind card in honor of my 40th wedding anniversary. So many of you reached out with warm wishes and my heart is full – thank you. 💜 My family is the reason I’m running for Congress. Love has powered my fight to build a better future for families like mine and yours, and the love that we all share for our communities will power this fabulous grassroots team all the way to Washington. If you didn’t get a chance to sign the card, that’s okay! name: Caroline Korba (Team Nikki)
subject: “No regrets”
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
A few months ago, Charlie Crist said he was “still pro-life” — doubling down on his anti-choice record as Florida’s Republican Governor.
This week, he was asked about his appointment of “an anti-choice extremist” to the Florida Supreme Court. And you know what he said?
He said he has no regrets.
Right after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade and ended federal protections for a woman’s right to choose.
Right after a Florida judge blocked DeSantis’ 15-week abortion ban, likely sending the ban to the Florida Supreme Court where Charlie’s favorite anti-choice Justice will happily vote for it.
Women in Florida are pissed off, and the last thing we need right now is a “Democratic” candidate for Governor who won’t stand up for women’s rights. If you agree, click here to chip in $20 and support Nikki Fried — the ONLY lifelong pro-choice candidate in this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=705regrets]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=705regrets] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=705regrets] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=705regrets] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=705regrets] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=705regrets] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=705regrets]
Charlie may not regret his choice to nominate an anti-choice extremist to Florida’s Supreme Court, but we’ll make damn sure he regrets that decision on August 23rd, when the women of Florida reject him and his two-faced attitude towards women’s rights.
Charlie hasn’t changed, Peter. And it’s time to try something new. Click here to chip in $20, or anything you can, and help elect a TRUE pro-choice champion as our next Governor. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-jul-2022?refcode=705regrets]
Thank you for standing with us.
Caroline Korba
Press Secretary, Nikki Fried for Governor

So we need 46,000 Democrats to respond IMMEDIATELY and set the record straight: | LIVE POLL EXPIRING AT 11:59PM -- The MINUTE Joe Biden walked into the Oval Office he began undoing the damage of the Trump Era -- thank you, Joe!! BUT if Biden's numbers don't improve soon, the GOP will have a free pass to take over the House and Senate in November ... We need to show President Biden that the American people have his back! Thank you, VPP | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 ckq.io/eguhtk The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. _It's time to show strength_ , team. And in 2022, the NDRC is doing it with all of our efforts, including by focusing on state-level races. Why?
➞ Because the people in state-level offices – including governors and secretaries of state – will either fight _for_ our democracy or against it.
➞ Because gerrymandering and voter suppression happen – _or are blocked_ – on the state level.

body:
Mark needs your help to get this next quarter off to a strong start.
#

Friends —
$5.
A lot of people chipped in $5 before the last FEC deadline to help us hit our goals and fight back against the attack ads running right now. But we can’t slow down now. Mark needs you to help us get this next quarter off to a strong start.
So, yes. $5.
$5 to help us defeat Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate, Blake Masters.
$5 to help us fight back against the MILLIONS of dollars already being spent against us by outside groups.
$5 — most importantly — because it all adds up when so many people who care are chipping in to help Mark defend this seat.
By the time you’ve read this message, a bunch of people have donated their $5. Now they’re hoping you’ll join them. So what do you say?
[**Please use this link to contribute $5 to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign and help us fight back against the millions already being spent to flip this seat.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1612?c0=mek-em-july22.Ye5Kon&refcode=em220705-1-subs-A&t=1&akid=3220%2E6688874%2ERKgy3-)

Thank you,
Team Kelly

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:

| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, JULY 5
PHOTO RELEASE: GREATER GEORGIA REGISTERS VOTERS AT ATLANTA GROCERY STORES (ATLANTA) - Last Friday, Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler joined Greater Georgia volunteers to register voters at an Alpharetta grocery store - to engage Georgians affected by record high July 4th food prices, driven by reckless liberal spending and failed Washington policies. The group, which held several registration events at grocery stores across Atlanta last week, mobilized Georgians to take action by voting this November.
View photos from the event below, and read more about the registration effort [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wXbf0feHGPXkVG8_rZsb3T1sykMwITH_1N-E2F4mQ3m16l9hjpivsPPSxbVxsEf5cfk0UJjzvtGyKv3RjpL7Rr4VRmAfVYDNMzRD32FeN4Kf_J9Lt6pZL8NQZV_qboBpEI4oau0oWubmy2S8JKdFJhVm_NsI_1FUkaHpXJXYrOo8gtsR9v83uH0jq28FpsI4SHaDjf0K6CmB0hJYuatg94or53_fq0xEQe0vEf-L17poS-PioqU96fiCYShPDNA2d8a9ibQHJLY=&c=ERBOs9j4wfOyhcrvHgalB07MiQo6tiU8tD7JV4n1kzVCp5gSYounbg==&ch=Kp11EDoYaIGX5fZNCPKnp4pSx5uM-UNezjK9cdoQsGUQ-_oCd3Eu6w==).

name: Giffords.org
subject: Highland Park
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It was a uniquely American scene in Highland Park, Illinois
#

Friends -
It was a uniquely American scene in Highland Park, Illinois yesterday morning.
The town’s Fourth of July parade was just getting started. A local marching band was playing “Yankee Doodle” as gunshots rang out in the air. The band was unaware of the shooting for a moment, but you can see the families across the street begin to grab their children and flee the scene.
At least six are dead and dozens injured after a young man got his hands on an assault weapon and took aim at a community that was simply coming together to celebrate our nation’s independence.
Our thoughts and prayers are with the people of Highland Park — as they remain with the people of Uvalde, Buffalo, Aurora, Newtown, Blacksburg, Las Vegas, Orlando, Tucson and far too many other communities across the country.
It seems like every week we sit down together to find the words to adequately express our heartbreak for another community that has been shattered by gun violence.
Today is no different.
But yesterday’s shooting was unique in that it was the Fourth of July.
As a nation, as a people, we must reckon with the fact that these horrific attacks don’t happen nearly as often in other countries.
These tragedies make us stand out in the worst of ways. This is not the America we strive for.
We believe in an America where families can celebrate with their communities without fear of ducking for cover. We believe in an America where we come together to solve tough problems—and save lives.
We may have recently passed the first major, bipartisan gun safety legislation in almost three decades, but yesterday’s violence is a reminder that there is still a lot of work to do.
We won’t stop.
The team at Giffords
* * *

**Giffords PAC works to reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. Please make a donation today.**
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july22.Xk0RhP&refcode=em220705-1-15&t=1&akid=2205%2E3935704%2Erl52Y6)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2205%2E3935704%2Erl52Y6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: Let's talk about Hillsdale College.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
Dear Peter,
By now, you've received our email about Bill Lee's refusal in standing up for our teachers while the President of Hillsdale College insulted them at a high-end donor event .
On top of this insanely cruel insult to our teachers, Bill Lee and his minions have been working in the legislature to ensure public school teachers lose both rights and funding for their classrooms.
Bill Lee would rather students be taught by the likes of Hillsdale [and their hosted leaders] who are best known for making a mockery of the Civil Rights Movement, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., & referring to the the Jan 6. Capitol Riot as, " ...really much more hoax than insurrection. "
Do not believe what they are telling you; this is Bill Lee's doing. He wants public school teachers replaced.
He wants these reactionaries teaching our schools. He wants our resources being drained from our teachers and public schools. He wants the rewriting of history for the sole purpose of whitewashing.
We must defeat Bill Lee.
Bill Lee doesn't care about our teachers; let's send him a message, today! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
All the best,
Dr. Jason Martin

| |
# Dear Peter,

Today I released a new television ad "Count on It".

Maryland's next governor needs to STAND UP to progressives in Annapolis and Washington, D.C.

Taxes, inflation, outrageous gas prices, and crime... Joe Biden did that.

---
| [ ](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=b14cceecbd&e=64ac72257a)
---
|
**I've been a fighter my entire life. **

As a young mom, I waited tables and tended bar just to help my family survive.

I put myself through college and owned a small business.

I served as a Maryland Delegate and as Maryland's Secretary of Commerce.

I fought for everything I ever got.

**And as your governor, I'll take the fight to THEM. **

_**You can count on it.**_

The Maryland Republican Primary is just two weeks from today and I need your help in the final stretch.

[**Will you help me today by contributing $25, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 to keep this ad on TV until Election Day?**](https://kellyschulzforgovernor.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05f3d1aa190e2cb084d25c5f0&id=6d7c80db0f&e=64ac72257a)

Thank you,
---
|

| **Kelly Schulz**
Candidate for Governor

| Peter, Thank you to everyone who contributed before our deadline Sunday night — our finance team is still looking over everything, but it looks like we were able to reach our goal in time! Also, we hope you had a wonderful July 4th yesterday — we know we did! Here’s a recap of what we got up to yesterday: First, John (and Max the dog!) led the team at the Takoma Park parade. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47425302/354269387/-1597515454?source=email-ngp-20220705-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220705-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220705&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=4b1b2731-91fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjFiMjczMS05MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGpgGsqsx1xIB7textiPpuEQ447vfQZtzcJApcKM8yQ=) After that, Michelle and her sons joined us over in Towson for a fun parade where we met lots of great folks and gave out plenty of high-fives! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47425305/354269390/-1597515454?source=email-ngp-20220705-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220705-fr_full-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220705&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=4b1b2731-91fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjFiMjczMS05MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FGpgGsqsx1xIB7textiPpuEQ447vfQZtzcJApcKM8yQ=) Here at Team King HQ, we are incredibly grateful to spend our days with each other, our grassroots volunteers, and the next Governor and Lt. clean_body: We hope you had a wonderful July 4th yesterday — we know we did! Here’s a recap of what we got up to yesterday... | = | Peter, Thank you to everyone who contributed before our deadline Sunday night — our finance team is still looking over everything, but it looks like we were able to reach our goal in time! Also, we hope you had a wonderful July 4th yesterday — we know we did! Here’s a recap of what we got up to yesterday: First, John (and Max the dog!) led the team at the Takoma Park parade. = After that, Michelle and her sons joined us over in Towson for a fun parade where we met lots of great folks and gave out plenty of high-fives! = = Finally, we all met up in Annapolis to finish the day with dancing, marching, and lots of pets for Max the dog! = Here at Team King HQ, we are incredibly grateful to spend our days with each other, our grassroots volunteers, and the next Governor and Lt. Governor of Maryland — John and Michelle! We hope you enjoyed our recap, and if you’re interested in volunteering or joining us for upcoming events please bookmark and check out our upcoming events page: Thank you, Team King-Siri for Maryland * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Jodi Picoult
subject: I am beyond mad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
The Supreme Court has clawed us back in time—making women second-class citizens.
| | |
---
I am disgusted –

I am beyond mad. I am an endless pit of rage.

Roe v. Wade is over. The Supreme Court has clawed us back in time – making women second-class citizens.
Today, I’m doing what I always do when I’m upset: I’m writing.

I’m writing because, like so many women, I’m enraged. And I’m taking action.

**[Before I go any further, can you rush a donation to Maggie Hassan’s campaign in New Hampshire?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47425507/354269439/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1247-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjFiMjczMS05MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghQc7LL-0MlsLnNedmaYh28UE62mAOtZWYyMCWC-hLs=)**
Make no mistake: This is not the end. The Republican Party has worked to dismantle women’s rights for decades, and they will keep going.

They will make abortion illegal in every state in the country. They will punish women and doctors. They will not stop.
And neither can we.

We must organize, speak up, stand up, and do whatever we can to fight back.
New Hampshire’s Senate race is the number one most important election this year – it will determine control of the Senate, and with it, the right to bodily autonomy.

**[Please, donate $3 or whatever you can to my friend Maggie Hassan’s campaign. It’s time for all of us to get involved.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47425508/354269440/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1247-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjFiMjczMS05MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghQc7LL-0MlsLnNedmaYh28UE62mAOtZWYyMCWC-hLs=)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Run Betsy Run The Betsy Brigade needs you to recapture Oregon’s independent spirit
body:
[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220701_f&n=1) | Dear Friend, Recently Tina Kotek told the New York Times her “track record of accomplishments” is the reason she should be elected governor. Meanwhile, only eighteen percent of Oregonians think our state is on the right track. The Kotek accomplishments: More homeless camps. More shootings, murders and violence. More expensive housing. More kids struggling in schools. More drug overdoses, addiction and mental health crises on our streets. Nine counties have already voted to leave the state for Idaho. Oregon has never been more divided. During the Democratic primary, State Treasurer Tobias Read hammered Kotek for her failed record as one of the most powerful politicians in the state for the past decade. Read was right. **Tent City Tina is even more Kate Brown — than Kate Brown.** **SAY NO TO TENT CITY TINA:** [CHIP IN, Friend](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4wuZ-2t-UfLCO31ykNad3IpZEmWqyffPUGUGo7kVPPkAacKZ6St4NkcRw7yA3_kafdVfd_2z17macjNLCN1MK8VlZPv5cc_y-SHJ8sgd1uA&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220701_f&n=2) Our independent, maverick campaign is the only thing standing between Kotek and the Oregon governorship. I know we can get our mojo back, but not without a big, bold change. **So I don’t care if you voted for Biden or Trump or wrote in your dog — I want your support and vote. Please join our campaign today.** [JOIN US!](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4wuZ-2t-UfLCO31ykNad3IpZEmWqyffPUGUGo7kVPPkAacKZ6St4NkcRw7yA3_kafdVfd_2z17macjNLCN1MK8VlZPv5cc_y-SHJ8sgd1uA&e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220701_f&n=3) _-Betsy_

subject: Safety First in Schools
body:
New approaches to safeguarding our children
| |
---|---|---
| [Open in browser](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=887511&post_id=60616617&utm_source=email)
# [Safety First in Schools ](https://substack..zg0B_eBUqea0oEJsMcTej1czIvkG0_8ohiGZuAUzEUg?)
### New approaches to safeguarding our children
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5b7f5829-c098-4182-bf8a-6efcb5e0796d?u=90501192)| [1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/5b7f5829-c098-4182-bf8a-6efcb5e0796d?u=90501192)| Jul 5| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUxNzc2cHJvamVjdHBhYy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYXBpL3YxL3Bvc3QvZW1haWwtcmVhY3Rpb24_.RwgKTuDZpiyYtmJMqtkUu88esyAmxHXYQHXmmpFLJkk?)| [](https://substack..OmncK7UqnlnslCQRsCFrc87bRPMzy_c2mRSkRTgru14?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| [](https://substack..XvA7PuwGqRGXK8eAplHvYtXHrmSQv0iRL4OgpvLpGGo?)
---|---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2b6b131d-3812-43dc-b820-1b7fe40b4d6a?u=90501192)|
---|---|---
**School Security Alert **
In the wake of yet another school shooting, politicians are calling for more gun control. But their plans could lead to more violence in schools. The vast majority of states generally prohibit firearms in K-12 schools; however, almost all make [some exception](https://substack.com/redirect/c71993b8-b03b-4130-8363-c25028470d13?u=90501192) to their laws for law enforcement, school security, and individuals with permission from school authorities including employees. At the national level, President Biden [rejects](https://substack.com/redirect/c745f64c-2d8e-4963-937d-c25f5124436b?u=90501192) hardening school security through trained teachers and armed guards and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer [rejected](https://substack.com/redirect/101dc9c6-aa89-4b97-af83-1966bf19b7c1?u=90501192) the Republican school safety proposal. Once again the real issue is being ignored: making our schools safer. Why is it so hard to secure our schools?
School boards in [Alaska](https://substack.com/redirect/b11a0c7b-3384-41bf-b214-160f9da04b9a?u=90501192), [New Jersey](https://substack.com/redirect/5f43c591-ae04-497c-aabb-dc99d8c22736?u=90501192), and [Florida](https://substack.com/redirect/8ec3008e-e0c0-4bb7-8f1b-218084655996?u=90501192) are getting it right by overhauling their security policies. Current proposals include increasing funding for armed security, hiring retired cops, limiting points of entry and requiring school boards to adopt family reunification plans in the event of an evacuation. The Biden Administration wants to ban guns and proposes making schools safer with more mental health checks, but their support for social experiments in public schools has only made things worse. The same people who want you to believe 18 year olds can't possess guns also say a 5 year old can choose a "gender identity". Find out what security is like in your child's school. And if you don't like what you find, run for school board.
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/665ddf92-a23d-4b8f-80d6-b4a8592b97fe?u=90501192)
**School Lunch Menu: Alphabet Soup **
Drag queen [story hours](https://substack.com/redirect/c5800ce6-41bf-4597-9516-6e06fdcf959c?u=90501192), pride prom for [middle schoolers](https://substack.com/redirect/82527e79-945e-401d-b689-972bb47dc18a?u=90501192), a Wisconsin school district [accusing](https://substack.com/redirect/20f294d7-9ab4-4037-a017-290dec148d40?u=90501192) three middle school students of sexual harassment after they reportedly called a classmate by the wrong pronouns--this kind of evil calls for more than just an angry comment on Facebook or sad emoji in your neighborhood playgroup chat.
The LGBTQIA+ agenda forces people to speak a language they don't believe and it is incumbent upon all of us to stop them from pushing gender indoctrination in the classroom. In March, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed Florida's HB 1557, quickly dubbed by critics as the 'Don't Say Gay' bill. The law takes effect July 1 and requires parents to be the first to be notified of any health or support services offered to their kids in school and allows them the chance to deny those services on behalf of their children. Critics would have you believe proponents of the bill are fear mongering or harming LGBTQIA+ youth, they could not be more wrong. As an example of where we're headed, in 2020 Canadian courts ruled children can start hormone therapy [without parental consent](https://substack.com/redirect/33e6c490-72fa-4661-920f-5a8dddf58a1e?u=90501192).
Something is desperately dark and wrong when adults want to expose their own and others' children to adult nudity, sexuality, identities and behaviors. Parents all over the country are fighting back after finding out the public schools their tax dollars pay for are pushing gender theory on elementary-age kids. Join us on the front lines of this critical cultural battle to save our children and our nation.
[Share 1776's Newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/1b5a7ecc-509a-484b-924e-0a998d2cdd73?u=90501192)
**Elections Deliver Results **
Parents deserve to be respected, not treated like domestic terrorists. Last year, our PAC flipped three seats on the Lansing School Board in Leavenworth County, Kansas. This week, they passed the Parent's Bill of Rights on a 4-3 vote, declaring that parents have the fundamental right to direct the upbringing and education of their children.
Lansing Schools parents now have full curriculum transparency and the ability to object to any learning material their kids are being taught. Our movement is gaining power every day--and we won't stop until absolute victory.
**In School Boards We Trust **
For the sake of our kids, we must change the composition of local school boards to replace the Marxist indoctrination of our children with truth. 1776 Project PAC is fighting to protect children's minds from the genderless un-American mob attempting to destroy them. What happens in these school board elections directly impacts the future of this country. Get informed and register to vote!
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/665ddf92-a23d-4b8f-80d6-b4a8592b97fe?u=90501192)
[Like](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUxNzc2cHJvamVjdHBhYy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYXBpL3YxL3Bvc3QvZW1haWwtcmVhY3Rpb24_.RwgKTuDZpiyYtmJMqtkUu88esyAmxHXYQHXmmpFLJkk?)| [Comment](https://substack..OmncK7UqnlnslCQRsCFrc87bRPMzy_c2mRSkRTgru14?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| [Share](https://substack..XvA7PuwGqRGXK8eAplHvYtXHrmSQv0iRL4OgpvLpGGo?)
---|---|---
If you liked this post from [1776's Newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/9df1eaea-9409-4527-80dd-1995ad12cae5?u=90501192), why not share it?
[Share](https://substack.com/redirect/df5c61a1-e65d-4a9f-87a4-55efdc0274ee?u=90501192)

548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104

name: Val Demings
subject: growing up in the segregated South
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I never thought I'd have this opportunity
| | |
---
I’ll be honest with you, friend. I never thought this is how it would go.
When I was growing up in the segregated South, working at a McDonald's to help my family get by, I never thought I’d have the opportunity to serve in the U.S. Senate.
**Fast-forward to today: We've built the highest-raising Senate campaign in Florida history – with over 450,000 grassroots donors!**
I'm so proud of the history we've already accomplished together. You've helped me make Marco Rubio one of the most vulnerable Republican senators up for reelection – but I'm still fighting an uphill battle against national Republicans' dark money machine.

**GOP super PACs are already planning more than $1.5 MILLION in attack ads to defeat me, because they know that if I flip this seat, Democrats _will_ expand our Senate majority. We cannot afford to take our foot off the gas, friend. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47426911/354270205/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3686-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDVlNTY5OC05MmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FJkwvNneW8e7t1tw0JwoAe6FQkKirNeG9kINhgorIfo=)
Our vision for a better America hinges on expanding our Senate majority so we can end the filibuster – and expanding our majority hinges on Florida. **Winning our race will come down to each and every dollar we raise _right now_ , s****o I'm personally asking****:[Will you make a $5 donation today to help me win this race, protect Senate control and expand my story of opportunity to more working families](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47426912/354270206/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3686-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDVlNTY5OC05MmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FJkwvNneW8e7t1tw0JwoAe6FQkKirNeG9kINhgorIfo=)****[?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47426913/354270207/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3686-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDVlNTY5OC05MmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FJkwvNneW8e7t1tw0JwoAe6FQkKirNeG9kINhgorIfo=)**
I can't thank you enough for joining my historic movement.

Val Demings

clean_body: I never thought I'd have this opportunity | | | I’ll be honest with you, friend. I never thought this is how it would go. When I was growing up in the segregated South, working at a McDonald's to help my family get by, I never thought I’d have the opportunity to serve in the U.S. Senate. Fast-forward to today: We've built the highest-raising Senate campaign in Florida history – with over 450,000 grassroots donors! I'm so proud of the history we've already accomplished together. You've helped me make Marco Rubio one of the most vulnerable Republican senators up for reelection – but I'm still fighting an uphill battle against national Republicans' dark money machine. GOP super PACs are already planning more than $1.5 MILLION in attack ads to defeat me, because they know that if I flip this seat, Democrats will expand our Senate majority. We cannot afford to take our foot off the gas, friend. = Our vision for a better America hinges on expanding our Senate majority so we can end the filibuster – and expanding our majority hinges on Florida. Winning our race will come down to each and every dollar we raise right now , so I'm personally asking:= I can't thank you enough for joining my historic movement. Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . name: Mark Kelly
subject: Derek, thank you in advance for your $25 donation.
body:
Derek,
I want you to know just how important you are to this campaign. When I think about my most important supporters, it’s not about how much they gave.
I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far, nearly 1 million people have contributed to either my first campaign or my re-election.
Now that we’re in an election year and attack ads are already running, I need you more than ever.
But here’s the thing, the NRSC is spending MILLIONS on attack ads against me and we don’t even have a Republican opponent yet. If this is what they’re doing now, imagine what they’ll be doing once we do.
And I have to be honest with you: June was a strong month for us, but it didn’t make up for how slow May was. We can’t afford to have a slow July, too.
So, I’m humbly asking: :
Can you please split a $25 contribution between my re-election campaign and CommonGood? Help us reach our fundraising goals and defend this seat from the corporate special interest groups that want to beat us. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220715_CGVA_Kelly]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220715_CGVA_Kelly&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220715_CGVA_Kelly&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220715_CGVA_Kelly&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220715_CGVA_Kelly&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220715_CGVA_Kelly&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20220715_CGVA_Kelly]
Thank you in advance for chipping in today. It means a lot.
Mark
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://go.terrymcauliffe.com/p/kLtAki73Jk-9WaBIIAMDXQ2?unsubscribedata=gihjvq%2Bbu2JHdn4GRvfFmw9xghlKoLFhtVX2PXD5xvSHa8spSQgv9cHR3XMLTH93KQPB4zq9oWa015nHmJIhm3hfNoxDiouhbXxheSA7SEnmuiNXQYqrwNvIHRTy4iDN2gRA3K%2Bv%2FZO9%2FCA5RKXpLB30Ahh%2F3PgTR3n%2BDHQNOOFlr2Tzbfz7I2Awf5CDeBMBketOej0IZBsTKxJX%2FlD7Q0rmQKS8732cmawW0gdmBC%2FH%2BQ5H5tD1mX%2B%2BDzdvLtP9US5Q3WQ932ulpYg3DrN9Jg%2BfmqE%2FSDBIHjzEFHtQvbHsopwQ6yitGCbXzdGL2lBzW1Zq8O32zawSUpWX2lE8fCgAbJ50X%2BphZtYwIyG8c4JUX55Cv%2BlMhAaEnDs4BRkGKnzgIzLFPdJ3AIkFoNT7bhQ74TXc5Evx2nIFWVxXMPQ%3D .

**I've been a fighter my entire life. **

As a young mom, I waited tables and tended bar just to help my family survive.

I put myself through college and owned a small business.

I served as a Maryland Delegate and as Maryland's Secretary of Commerce.

I fought for everything I ever got.

**And as your governor, I'll take the fight to THEM. **

_**You can count on it.**_

The Maryland Republican Primary is just two weeks from today, and I need your help in the final stretch.

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Today I released a new television ad "Count on It". Maryland's next governor needs to STAND UP to progressives in Annapolis and Washington, D.C. Taxes, inflation, outrageous gas prices, and crime... Joe Biden did that. I've been a fighter my entire life. As a young mom, I waited tables and tended bar just to help my family survive. I put myself through college and owned a small business. I served as a Maryland Delegate and as Maryland's Secretary of Commerce. I fought for everything I ever got. And as your governor, I'll take the fight to THEM. You can count on it. The Maryland Republican Primary is just two weeks from today, and I need your help in the final stretch. Thank you, Kelly Schulz Candidate for Governor | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

Friend,

I have an exciting announcement. I designed a BRAND NEW HAT, and I want YOU to see it first.

[](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJxNUcFuqzAQ_BpyAxnHQDhwaMvrJXqvp6pVL5axl-A82yBjmtKv7xqlbeSVJc-OR7OzqqHyQKXc6YYSSklFijwelhFAoAai6kNfFxVLGLlol6nRCaPOwS92yuRod0ND6rLPc9V1OWNMlB0Uh65S4kDrvAAJsDPNEMI0J_u7hD5izSAXDxnKeVBRJGLiHVJhwWsp0vOoXUj7xSkv9KzdKUWS1SEAILXzwqGNdBAh6u0ffdTzSEv2LRpDTmlHByufDKgT_KLCjosL-GYFvpZguQWlF4sIWKENH_orPo-Ll_GnldwJrCsuhZ2EPjnsfOfFb_ykRixODvw2JR5Hu072rTK6AJsRhJEup9XP3EnDSFUhhzujFXbPz5_F_mOe_rYbOGiFIbZruz71b-Tp_843arpoY_RcVrifU5xhWwq6NLpfm6S6Tyjd_lG65U-P7P71X3l8ObYpeXn9k7ZlwS6xSx_wDusEP9SrSrZlE9Gq_QI04LdQ)

body:
This can’t be real, can it? | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=09fbfb73c4&e=4712f71bea)

---
| It's unbelievable.

The Texas GOP officially rejected the 2020 election results.

After countless recounts and investigations, they’re declaring Donald Trump their president.

And yes, this includes MAGA-enthusiast Ronny Jackson.

This decision undermines our democracy and the sanctity of our nation.

[Will you donate to my campaign today to send a message that Texas doesn’t stand with insurrectionists and extremists?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=747ae8c478&e=4712f71bea)

---
| This is just wrong.

We clearly can’t trust the Texas GOP to govern when all they do is perpetuate lies and extreme ideologies.

It’s time Texas’ 13th District has a competent leader who focuses on creating a better future instead of reminiscing about a failed presidency.

[By donating to my campaign, you can help defeat Ronny Jackson and once again be proud of our Texas leaders. Can I count on you to help make this a reality?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=f9bead65a7&e=4712f71bea)

name: Wiley Nickel for Congress
subject: Did you see Bo Hines’ tweet!?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:

body:
On June 9, a poll of 868 Georgia registered voters showed Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock in a tie: 46 to 46.
#
Derek -
On June 9, a poll of 868 Georgia registered voters showed Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock in a tie: 46 to 46.
VoteVets started our $3 million ad buy in Georgia that day. It was a spot going after Herschel Walker for his role in a company defrauding veterans and it is the largest outside buy in the race.
Days ago, a new poll came out. The results? Warnock 54% to Walker 44%.
Now, we are not claiming credit for all 10 points of movement, but our spot no doubt had a HUGE role to play in the shift. This is something we’ve seen before.
Our ads have great messengers and messages. They reach independents in a way others can’t. They move voters.
But we can’t do it alone. These ads are funded by supporters like you. So as we look at the rest of the map, we’re asking:

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Do you think the American Dream is still achievable?
body:
We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs3ikh2ap1br0c7u1qc82d6iqlvh2u238mep2tq8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj4o5gsopnddtje6qr6d1gs1jr6s716crj1ohicap78s5h66pb6clhclrrechn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pbbc37m8omctb4mdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933cljm0ob4s5i69oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9hc22nso8gr26ptticnag1n1qhlrr1v3tumhu20_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1gm9ob4cjh2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach—especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8oqsjvfc11gucmpd2c6b7nk2hcghrtotunmshq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1gm9ob4cjh2bs)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: **[https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5ipufk76lvkikgueo8cvf6tscv571bbqlo9i050_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1gm9ob4cjh2bs)** Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. McIndoe [**QUESTION 1: Do you believe the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory are destroying the American education system?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zra4n80narud6r698v76lu812e7telfhrcfklup8_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1gm9ob4cjh2bs)
---
| | [Yes](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpgkgeg5qvdo6ov9835srtunqah9inpt24cotrtg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1gm9ob4cjh2bs)
---
| [No](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0ah8nb54iopfpiun43oe4vssq8p9thsmtq4moto_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1gm9ob4cjh2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Just as Rhode Islanders have trusted me these last 22 years, I’m asking you to trust me now that Seth Magaziner is the best candidate to continue what we started together.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47437009/354281439/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmI2NmQwZC05ZGZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pi6XaCXziNj5L-d4jTBUrda0YDd6-VrYmtm_fqq4L1o=&emci=b2d5afbb-2bfa-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=92b66d0d-9dfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
Hi Peter – I'm Jim Langevin, current representative for Rhode Island's 2nd Congressional District.

Earlier this year, I announced my retirement and **I'm reaching out today to tell you why I endorsed Seth Magaziner to succeed me in representing RI-02 in Congress.** Let me share why I'm standing with Seth.

As Rhode Island Treasurer, Seth has spent the last eight years serving the Second Congressional District – fixing crumbling school buildings and creating clean energy jobs from Westerly to Warwick. Now, he's ready to go to Congress to continue fighting for all Rhode Islanders.

In Congress, Seth will focus on creating good-paying jobs, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and lowering the cost of prescription drugs. And we can count on him to fight back against dangerous and divisive leaders like Kevin McCarthy and Donald Trump who are undermining our democracy and threatening working Rhode Islanders.

Just as Rhode Islanders have trusted me these last 22 years, I’m asking you to trust me now that Seth Magaziner is the best candidate to continue what we started together. There is simply no doubt Seth is the strongest candidate to keep the seat in Democratic control – but he needs your support to win.

**[Will you join me in supporting Seth Magaziner's campaign for RI-02? Chip in $5 or more right away to help him keep this seat and the House majority blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47437011/354281441/-1120611681?ms=em22_220702_Langev_fnd_gq_act___JL_ettx&refcode=em22_220702_Langev_fnd_gq_act___JL_ettx&source=em22_220702_Langev_fnd_gq_act___JL_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220702_Langev_fnd_gq_act___JL_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=pW4K%2BPv4Cd0WHNg53l55S4dWxr7xhD98JcPw1xAm4YzOpk2d7ZZRJepnTCGiXE4%2FmSlk82rrOPre7OI2utfLz8RpftbPX4Zcn2STQnyB18cVbRtJbC49h4Rvd9T6bAXfbpWvmwWZbangDTzw%2BrVWopZtixMGPRGTJDwVHP53fb4%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmI2NmQwZC05ZGZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pi6XaCXziNj5L-d4jTBUrda0YDd6-VrYmtm_fqq4L1o=)**

Thank you,

Jim Langevin
U.S. Representative
Rhode Island's 2nd District

Seth Magaziner is a father, husband, and proud Democrat. He’s running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Seth will protect Social Security and Medicare and work to lower the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate with drug companies. He will defend a woman’s right to choose, stand up to the gun lobby to pass common sense gun safety measures, and make Rhode Island a leader in the clean energy economy - creating good jobs while combating the climate crisis. Seth is running for Congress in the competitive open Second District. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue?

clean_body: Just as Rhode Islanders have trusted me these last 22 years, I’m asking you to trust me now that Seth Magaziner is the best candidate to continue what we started together. Hi Peter – I'm Jim Langevin, current representative for Rhode Island's 2nd Congressional District. Earlier this year, I announced my retirement and I'm reaching out today to tell you why I endorsed Seth Magaziner to succeed me in representing RI-02 in Congress. Let me share why I'm standing with Seth. As Rhode Island Treasurer, Seth has spent the last eight years serving the Second Congressional District – fixing crumbling school buildings and creating clean energy jobs from Westerly to Warwick. Now, he's ready to go to Congress to continue fighting for all Rhode Islanders. In Congress, Seth will focus on creating good-paying jobs, protecting Social Security and Medicare, and lowering the cost of prescription drugs. And we can count on him to fight back against dangerous and divisive leaders like Kevin McCarthy and Donald Trump who are undermining our democracy and threatening working Rhode Islanders. Just as Rhode Islanders have trusted me these last 22 years, I’m asking you to trust me now that Seth Magaziner is the best candidate to continue what we started together. There is simply no doubt Seth is the strongest candidate to keep the seat in Democratic control – but he needs your support to win. = Thank you, Jim Langevin U.S. Representative Rhode Island's 2nd District Seth Magaziner is a father, husband, and proud Democrat. He’s running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Seth will protect Social Security and Medicare and work to lower the cost of prescription drugs by allowing Medicare to negotiate with drug companies. He will defend a woman’s right to choose, stand up to the gun lobby to pass common sense gun safety measures, and make Rhode Island a leader in the clean energy economy - creating good jobs while combating the climate crisis. Seth is running for Congress in the competitive open Second District. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue? = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Magaziner for Congress Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 40993 Providence, RI 02940 United States

We are getting close. Four months. Four seats.
We are just four months away from Election Day, and only four seats away from a Red majority, we have to be on our A-game if we want to take back the House this November.
The Radical Left has made it clear that they will not go out without a fight, and after all the damage they have done to our nation - we can't afford to fail in November.
They have no issue putting Americans last. Just in the past two years alone, they have caused crises and chaos by neglecting our border, allowing violent crime to skyrocket, recklessly spending taxpayer dollars, shutting down American energy, and the list goes on.

Friend == | | | == | For Florida and America, | == | Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

Dear Fellow Conservative,
I hope this email finds you well.
My name is Lora Ries and I’m the Director of The Heritage Foundation Border Security and Immigration Center and former acting DHS Deputy Chief of Staff.
The immigration policies imposed by the radical Left, beginning the day President Biden took office, have created the worst border crisis in American History.
This crisis has exposed the dangers of the Left’s open-borders extremism, which has dismantled the effective policies designed to secure our borders that were previously in place.
To make things worse: the Biden administration’s current policies will not only put more Americans in danger but will cost billions of taxpayer-funded dollars. It is time to end good money going after bad policy. The Biden administration's failures on the border **are unsustainable and unconscionable**
Put another way, these bad policies have turned an already historic border crisis into a _catastrophe_ with major economic, cultural, and national security implications.
Heritage launched a new Border Security and Immigration Center with a team of policy experts with actual border experience who are dedicated to exposing and correcting these far-left policy failures.
We are giving policymakers at the federal and state level a roadmap for restoring what the Biden administration has broken— our American Sovereignty.
Our Border Security and Immigration Center is laser-focused on providing workable solutions to the Left’s border catastrophe, **[but we need your support to be successful.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a1efd2d6dfac4cf38929b5bb30a1a33a&_e=mWky8QOfWbUeGJUFnLChji2ylIfR8VHPw6Gq-kCK_8MWIJZ0rTBb_8MmLoqcBZTuWcASfGAziQSqdT0k6K1cKnF8s1qN9JA2wkrskwIsLc1_tyZH6nwSrA2wCcClxF-fHTLUsSCYciMZcHmXIACXrQbNh5CB6pVA9UqQnCodrsOkH5TY7EuKV0LQankntFkRsVL_qr4-YvCob0T9Lhzo5lmDZUGAsITLrpKUD2PrrsQufB-nY0LW60_pnekpfzsGtHmR2z4imAXNF6-uBHWVxiefiTfyEVfSXOgKTHZzI-D_HxRWvqIxmAmw86-N3RrB5Q7vvBee_oDJuPRiWvCTHdwTyGFmICeQgYOZAA_Xpa_ha4UP3F6PG92jDJVU05qYhBcdT5OuP_ubeJaJCyxTHadsKFIP76FS0nhxtlu86gqrkMdooiK8vo0pznwLhrmv7TnYCon3jLRV16_Zr2D_Qw%3D%3D)**
Will you help us stop the Border Crisis with your donation today? Please use this secure link to give your best gift now: **[https://secured.heritage.org/lets-stop-the-border-crisis/](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a1efd2d6dfac4cf38929b5bb30a1a33a&_e=mWky8QOfWbUeGJUFnLChji2ylIfR8VHPw6Gq-kCK_8MWIJZ0rTBb_8MmLoqcBZTuWcASfGAziQSqdT0k6K1cKnF8s1qN9JA2wkrskwIsLc1_tyZH6nwSrA2wCcClxF-fHTLUsSCYciMZcHmXIACXrQbNh5CB6pVA9UqQnCodrsOkH5TY7EuKV0LQankntFkRsVL_qr4-YvCob0T9Lhzo5lmDZUGAsITLrpKUD2PrrsQufB-nY0LW60_pnekpfzsGSOA1i-iF-_W_PK1KwxhNkoNcvFzeiL8ff3yiUbRKXyGhIweifOwbJfk6Lkh6ScR2B7eiuO81DtKbIE1PbDgM1OpGN4wlPzD7UxN5y8kg6DRE4y2gddsG6NX246_zydgFFOFcQqLvvVfs2tVOGjJPqSejXdh0-s0zEbDUiWajLRCexRpEc1oB9LeTSe1oW8bfMSe73SOY6VRKId4oiFDGHA%3D%3D)**
**We are determined to secure our southern border again. **[**Can we count on you to stand with us?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a1efd2d6dfac4cf38929b5bb30a1a33a&_e=mWky8QOfWbUeGJUFnLChji2ylIfR8VHPw6Gq-kCK_8MWIJZ0rTBb_8MmLoqcBZTuWcASfGAziQSqdT0k6K1cKnF8s1qN9JA2wkrskwIsLc1_tyZH6nwSrA2wCcClxF-fHTLUsSCYciMZcHmXIACXrQbNh5CB6pVA9UqQnCodrsOkH5TY7EuKV0LQankntFkRsVL_qr4-YvCob0T9Lhzo5lmDZUGAsITLrpKUD2PrrsQufB-nY0LW60_pnekpfzsGZBsDW4b59MuNBuNNguAozfan10R9AlwqnExQiaUnWsZ8ccvzku6sRHgpQZBawS6woLmOM52jSc-x0W-PtjiAzR75MEAiVQs8J3xt4O2V6fqieCQSNfDIME_6tpJkSh4-xbA-nZSnwHLEO38u78FTfpqgwy7UnTTS7qqn5EskPekPvx09u1pIqMiBUC_AZW3GXbC7FVNgMaIQGaZ_m0XfYA%3D%3D)
Thank you for your time,
Lora Ries Director, Border Security and Immigration Center
P.S. We must fight harder than ever before against open borders and amnesty. Please stand with Heritage and fight back against the Border Crisis here: **[https://secured.heritage.org/lets-stop-the-border-crisis/](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=a1efd2d6dfac4cf38929b5bb30a1a33a&_e=mWky8QOfWbUeGJUFnLChji2ylIfR8VHPw6Gq-kCK_8MWIJZ0rTBb_8MmLoqcBZTuWcASfGAziQSqdT0k6K1cKnF8s1qN9JA2wkrskwIsLc1_tyZH6nwSrA2wCcClxF-fHTLUsSCYciMZcHmXIACXrQbNh5CB6pVA9UqQnCodrsOkH5TY7EuKV0LQankntFkRsVL_qr4-YvCob0T9Lhzo5lmDZUGAsITLrpKUD2PrrsQufB-nY0LW60_pnekpfzsG0BSva9ik6EaXG3y83KnTUA-tre4Al8nMsjqLGVeGxdp5_cFvmivRDsS0qpaOw2nHHQu8685uD4-z9OAhk8RM9SLa-ExO-XIZFv-mW8FXBK3D5bKCCbbTTOxHmu-YADGuXTkaI6TbBckM2OgpdkENCn4qqKw2-m1yvDYiqWl7S_8ln2czuphPqekHVu3ovpugwto4smcIkA-bTt_qvswfrw%3D%3D)**

| Consistent with federal law, House Majority PAC makes its federal contributions from one account (the “Contribution Account”) and engages in the rest of its political activity from the other account (the “Non-Contribution Account”). You may contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account. You may contribute an unlimited amount to House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. By donating through this email, you agree that the first $5,000 of your contribution will be deposited in House Majority PAC's Contribution Account and the remainder in House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. You may also designate a different allocation formula below. You also agree that this allocation formula may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution to the Contribution Account.

Corporations/Labor Organizations: You may contribute an unlimited amount to House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. You may not contribute to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account.

Contributions or gifts to House Majority PAC are not tax-deductible.

Ted Budd is a devoted and selfless North Carolinian. After growing up on his family’s farm in rural North Carolina and working at their small business, Ted learned the importance of hard work and perseverance. He is the Republican nominee to serve North Carolinians as their next United States Senator. Ted is a proven freedom fighter and unapologetic conservative who will provide much-needed relief to North Carolinians and Americans who are struggling under the weight of Joe Biden’s nonstop inflation. He joined Senator Marsha Blackburn to discuss his journey and a few of his top priorities in his campaign. name: Chabot Press Team
subject: SITTENFELD TRIAL WEEK 2 – LANDSMAN ASSOCIATE IMPLICATED IN CORRUPTION, ILLEGALITY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chabot for Congress
body:
Longtime Advisor & Campaign Manager for Scandal-Plagued Democratic Candidate Testifies on Breaking Federal Law| | |
---
**SITTENFELD TRIAL WEEK 2 – LANDSMAN ASSOCIATE IMPLICATED IN CORRUPTION, ILLEGALITY** _Longtime Advisor & Campaign Manager for Scandal-Plagued Democratic Candidate Testifies on Breaking Federal Law

_**For Immediate Release** Contact: John GomezEmail: [jgomez@chabotforcongress.com](mailto:jgomez@chabotforcongress.com) CINCINNATI - Congressman Steve Chabot’s campaign issued the following statement Tuesday reacting to revelations from the second week of the trial of former Cincinnati City Councilman P.G. Sittenfeld. “We already learned Landsman’s vote on the city council was up for sale to the highest bidder and now we learn one of his closest associates was a direct collaborator in the corrupt scheme,” said Chabot campaign manager John Gomez. “Landsman’s longtime advisor, campaign manager and fundraiser testified to breaking federal law to enable corruption on the city council, raising new questions about the breadth of Landsman’s involvement in the illicit scheme and the extent to which collaborators in corruption are involved in his campaign for Congress.”

“The corruption trial of Greg Landsman’s co-conspirator in the Gang of Five corruption scandal continues to expose why he is unfit to represent the hardworking families of Ohio’s First District in Congress,” Gomez continued. “The steady drip of new revelations only underscores that a Hamilton County judge previously said Landsman lied to the public, should resign from the Cincinnati City Council and that no one should ever vote for him again.”

Landsman’s longtime advisor Jared Kamrass [testified](http://links.stevechabot.com/u/click?_t=8ab30ce69995407e81866ad352e10bc1&_m=9ea254e098314ac9a9805f1e3686b388&_e=Jrfa4CHNqhsXdRh22a_80pCSKdMz12aD_F0lRpZrP8PXmkKpx1KSMugQ0JU2-iBJl7qoUxGFhHGlTUCPB9wHcHeIUFJKZmeS63MJDA6Oz3aG3YnIunpLCEkOheG4iWMe9VBfwULRQpbOJOBat2oWhQykK3FVEsaJHrDww5nDQc0v4O1A03r9t41si4WaWINfkN17QE_TfEffra6etQYw5nHG78eyJDb685Z8Ihafkrj3EhmPf1yCY_yeAqj86hnpieG27aoy9rPbTt5YsGIr8_JCRRFKcw96ZNOx3Mvu7DEQ2RNr8MbMQKYefoaU4ZSEfTLo7Qaggh-n-PSvOBOMRjee6a6xWpHiU-vMnDmeoB7yyd-PVRrwSkxy9D2e7lPQ7OzLd2wxI0GdxmYMtGSyx7yBkn5i46m1HXpJXBy806s%3D) during the trial last week about his illegal conduct, for which he could still face federal charges, and the breadth of corruption on the Cincinnati City Council.

Ahead of Kamrass’s testimony, the [Cincinnati Enquirer](http://links.stevechabot.com/u/click?_t=8ab30ce69995407e81866ad352e10bc1&_m=9ea254e098314ac9a9805f1e3686b388&_e=Jrfa4CHNqhsXdRh22a_80tuXFncqdqj0JvjN492FBZkViUAREE5oZv_7aesRyix48zC30FmZkEcInkFDWfsUle5nW970LWGcUH7XZELGbkjA6XTNvN7E6KgyFQ7RN8AapcbtKCRDyanmEddVi3q0ro6CGdbmGKt1ZdcsLfKrDkRwHXkU4Da5Kj4jfnSHaTTgWVtstp2e8nqFdQgc_Bp5zUBPdlY8guZw2Etesa-s-gQ9sRdGgMMJi1hilkvm6i_yYPL7fJkAwIHc9j77aLqhprhJ8R1lxAwg-TQ3yDFznhfHPRgCbZJNaODlpTRdphepI4oJdiKutAgQunMjWXMUXAE35mga2-gh3BKg8WlvVlqvtQeNQJqpHKD3eAuRm6dG) reported, "one of Cincinnati’s top political fundraisers, Jared Kamrass” is expected to testify in the upcoming Sittenfeld trial and that “Kamrass agreed to help the government after being investigated for his own alleged wrongdoing. Court records say Kamrass ‘violated federal laws, about commonplace, legal practices of campaign financing and fundraising...’ Kamrass could still be prosecuted, the records say."

“Kamrass had a list of prominent Democratic clients including... City Councilman Greg Landsman who is running against Steve Chabot for Ohio's 1st congressional district,” according to [WCPO 9](http://links.stevechabot.com/u/click?_t=8ab30ce69995407e81866ad352e10bc1&_m=9ea254e098314ac9a9805f1e3686b388&_e=Jrfa4CHNqhsXdRh22a_80pCSKdMz12aD_F0lRpZrP8PXmkKpx1KSMugQ0JU2-iBJl7qoUxGFhHGlTUCPB9wHcHeIUFJKZmeS63MJDA6Oz3aG3YnIunpLCEkOheG4iWMe9VBfwULRQpbOJOBat2oWhQykK3FVEsaJHrDww5nDQc0v4O1A03r9t41si4WaWINfkN17QE_TfEffra6etQYw5lAYL2Al7xK0pzxNE1BaglgoqnGvBiNpV806jdKM_tQX_JcZX1a-p3VLsF_vXAtvNQ2tQV7DOerNClO-BwBZLHIsMhb8gTF7BQsZT_6UtN2XQ_mAYiFRiVymDm8xWVQuT1lyuW9mLhub9Y4vPcPYgcsjh6zVssgfWPnqtb_UvTJm8qd6-JGlIc-KmO3ppgLrMG7vhft-JiYR0gyQwzDXDI4%3D).

Kamrass [led](http://links.stevechabot.com/u/click?_t=8ab30ce69995407e81866ad352e10bc1&_m=9ea254e098314ac9a9805f1e3686b388&_e=Jrfa4CHNqhsXdRh22a_80kmF_VFFcFW0-dFkYGY4hmU8ZxtwjW6sP4aVskDGduAcK7-FyDgoumaCr7bJoZCsFL6kyd2FYurl65E7N65ke2ANi34KyeJNqm3Ho2Y8Xu0z3brhRogYuz_f0pFcDl_ONy8OBsQ49bbFlBV2Qmbnem6d18zHkVf632WLf7GOvM_7hI0daL_u-enxBYKScN7NR8dDs0L1FEqhuM7pddifbY1bEHC7fSKtj9bvdYKerkqTPqwvn32KY7snLt4a9wSvvai4BpC3byNj-hZPeeFfPbG32-qe3LLQlTNHSZzjWk7c) the search to fill the position of finance director for Landsman’s current campaign for Congress. He was also Landsman’s longtime [campaign manager](http://links.stevechabot.com/u/click?_t=8ab30ce69995407e81866ad352e10bc1&_m=9ea254e098314ac9a9805f1e3686b388&_e=Jrfa4CHNqhsXdRh22a_80j7pyZwah7khMIINORnGkCelFCa4lN0qMQTL2OpIt-mDU3qibvyoZQH4qYa4LiDWXWAG22JkOv7paUnRLzTBzDr-zG9alQoLUHHwLDMxuKvzgofbWtZ2SqybkdCe_1NXL5l63O-tHyEC2KYt8iEidoVzBI1SU8Oq4cuYwL3FK-MHFTXPT-XTqDxGjs46jsUjBAfedrpq1knd0swwy8f3hZgfJbABq2ke70cL7SVQlKrwKx0VggGRP-KZZkobjgnTk1G34FcMUJwwMQUVu70f1D8gDGPUVCQTXq6De82miQuH4cZW1R70YCNv4xX3STSKQ82VPo7wJ_6c4aibsPOwPFNoTzQwdpTEKoIxL5QDATL9) for City Council.

Read more on revelations from the first week of the corruption trial of Landsman’s colleague [HERE](http://links.stevechabot.com/u/click?_t=8ab30ce69995407e81866ad352e10bc1&_m=9ea254e098314ac9a9805f1e3686b388&_e=Jrfa4CHNqhsXdRh22a_80nYQx793x10kB3cZPJoy1-yJh0gu7UKfArgATBjFkVlfgii15Qj307BLgS2-YEo5dv70o5_91B6Nkcczhpwtx7oCFSLUq-tWZw_CMXkMpp-v4g5Jh6A72vzrv_8utxf_wlP1q2g28SRHU36RbILUma0mCXbJgtqq5r8kb0RW0GvIc4RJJ9NcfqyWMeXKltNof8GAKgFmYoZvSAZT-mTnQHROsxmk3Q7GqxmAHFbzLxR19ZLkdrFEjI1Y-3xnbHZiCebIUBzHCEin9agnli1sSv1VsTL4d7ksxD9fWp1QuvjPU71def5p0lZbFK5w7MSqzL-UYpbLiEHFqRrmT-vEE8M%3D). ###
