name: Nan Whaley
subject: Abortion is on the ballot this year – and Ohio is ground zero.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Whaley/Stephens
body:
We need a governor who will fight to protect everyone’s right to make reproductive decisions.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47412856/354251735/1144435635?refcode=nw_em_templateheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTZlMmFjZi04MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7iZn72zeV7v6bnXTZcdbyHFHTt7SsYd-5AulOXSnr7w=)

Team,
In the wake of the Supreme Court’s decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , abortion is on the ballot this year – and Ohio is ground zero.
For nearly fifty years, _Roe_ protected our right to privacy and to make medical decisions that are right for us, including abortion.
But with that protection gone, Mike DeWine and his allies in the Republican legislature have moved at full speed to criminalize abortion care. They’ve already implemented a ban beginning at six weeks of pregnancy, before many even know that they’re pregnant, and they’re pushing hard to criminalize it entirely.
**[As governor, I’ll support a constitutional amendment to protect the full range of reproductive care. If you agree that reproductive freedom is a human right, pitch in to my campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47412857/354251736/-419803656?refcode=nw_em_220705_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTZlMmFjZi04MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7iZn72zeV7v6bnXTZcdbyHFHTt7SsYd-5AulOXSnr7w=)**
Mike DeWine has long prided himself on being the most anti-choice governor in the country, and he’s hardly alone in his anti-choice extremism: Ohio Republicans want to take these choices away from us entirely, and have gone so far as to call pregnancy after rape “an opportunity.”
We need a governor who will fight to protect everyone’s right to make reproductive decisions with their families and their doctors – because politicians have no place in these choices.
**[Ohio is a pro-choice state and we deserve a governor who will protect abortion access. Please, pitch in to my campaign right now to help protect abortion access in Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47412858/354251737/-419803656?refcode=nw_em_220705_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTZlMmFjZi04MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7iZn72zeV7v6bnXTZcdbyHFHTt7SsYd-5AulOXSnr7w=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47412859/354251738/-419803656?refcode=nw_em_220705_1_t2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTZlMmFjZi04MWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7iZn72zeV7v6bnXTZcdbyHFHTt7SsYd-5AulOXSnr7w=)****

name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Will you volunteer to help elect Beto?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
In order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.
#
Right now, we’re building one of the biggest organizing programs Texas has ever seen so we can make history and elect Beto as our next Governor.

Team Beto volunteers have already accomplished some amazing things. **But in order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.**

We’re reaching out to you because our campaign needs your help to make direct, personal contact with as many Texans as we can.
[**Will you sign up today to write letters to Texans and help build support for Beto?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52815?utm_source=ema20220705-197034&t=1&akid=197034%2E444211%2EsbnIp6) You'll have the opportunity to meet other supporters after a brief training. Plus, our letter-writing events are hosted virtually, so you can join us from anywhere.
**[Write letters for Beto »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52815?utm_source=ema20220705-197034&t=2&akid=197034%2E444211%2EsbnIp6)**
Winning in Texas won't be easy, especially with the extreme voter suppression happening right in front of our eyes. But we know that we're capable of generating once-in-a-lifetime voter turnout if we put in the work right now.
Thank you for being part of this,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54521?refcode=ema20220705-197034&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=197034%2E444211%2EsbnIp6)**

subject: Share Your Thoughts on the Future of the American Dream
body:
We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zasea2di04ligkj44fc208ct6nsfbeu8l5g4761o_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1im4p70s3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo74db1edhj5dhie9q66o3mm1p78pj4cppb4ptk6sob4plhmeojbdpmeaoe2o3gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6tj38p5lm5g7eo36epgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvmgkd46oajg97fvr7gcikg040409pfv55ll6d48_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1im4p70s3h2bs)
---
Hello Fellow Conservative, We have near-uniform left-wing control of our government. And what do we have to show for it? The woke Left has declared war on parents and schoolchildren with the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory. Progressive” policies on college campuses throughout the nation are threatening the future of free speech and other freedoms we enjoy. The government has abandoned free market principles in favor of out-of-control spending and higher taxes. Now, good people like you are feeling the effects of rampant inflation. And the American Dream is becoming more and more out of reach—especially for future generations. I know this is hard. I know this isn’t what we wanted. But right now, the war for America’s future is upon us. From what I’ve been told, you’re someone who is concerned about the direction our country is headed, and that’s why I’m emailing you today. The Heritage Foundation is currently working on a strategy to fight back and preserve the American Dream. And we want to get your thoughts. **[Would you take this important survey to let us know what you think about the state of the American Dream for you children and grandchildren? ](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z01pekhhdhnjehb518ubhqh38q27i5mibbtsersg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1im4p70s3h2bs)** It should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is critical, so please don’t wait. You can get started right now using this secure link: **[https://secured.heritage.org/american-dream-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu2l7ri0fuq9ug4qfl15igdj83617779i6341jsg_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1im4p70s3h2bs)** Thank you so much. I look forward to getting your insights. Regards, Andrew P. McIndoe [**QUESTION 1: Do you believe the Marxist teachings of Critical Race Theory are destroying the American education system?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zinsmnonceqdmp9m4sbptc20bmqpne79o9uefij0_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1im4p70s3h2bs)
---
| | [Yes](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcfsoijgp7tjq51cm5lbhjcv4jab762renklp2qo_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1im4p70s3h2bs)
---
| [No](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd098a6gets8gu0vn12o10tq65g3o831c29qrh28_rp22sh2s8i66pb7c1im4p70s3h2bs)

But you can tell a lot about their priorities by the company they keep. Want to know what Tim Ryan’s priorities are? Just take a look at this picture. Yes, your 👀 are not lying; that’s Tim Ryan and the infamous Reverend Al Sharpton... The same Al Sharpton has referred to members of certain minority groups as “Interlopers” and has been implicated in the incitement of multiple riots. Sharpton vomits HATE 🤮 and Tim Ryan will go on his show, court his support, and he’ll even affectionately refer to him as “The Rev”. | Tim Ryan solicits the support of Al Sharpton, so we’re coming to you: If it were up to Ryan & Sharpton, they’d defund the police and turn Cleveland into Portland & Cincinnati into South Central LA. The Supreme Court has used its recent term to restrict women's rights, make our communities less safe, and set back policies to protect our environment.

Just in the last month, the court has:
* Gutted states’ ability to implement common-sense gun reforms
* Blurred the line of separation between church and state
* Overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and let states implement harsh abortion bans that leave zero exception for life of the mother, rape, or incest
* Severely limited the EPA's ability to regulate greenhouse gasses that cause climate change

And it's only going to get worse from here on out. The decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , for example, has the potential to uproot other issues concerning the constitutional right to privacy — such as same-sex marriage, access to contraceptives, or any number of rights that we hold dear. And in the next term, we could see this court further dismantle the Voting Rights Act.

To mitigate the immediate damage from this court's recent rulings, LBR is focused right now on solutions in Congress – including legislation that codifies the right to an abortion. But we also have to fundamentally re-evaluate how the Supreme Court operates in relation to our legislature. **When an unelected group of extreme judges can undo decades of precedent and uproot people's fundamental rights — in clear defiance of the popular will — something needs to change.**

So we want to hear from you. **[Can you take a minute to fill out our survey and tell LBR your thoughts on how we can fix the Supreme Court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47438620/354289470/882507610?ms=em_pet_220705surv_n_tlbr_actives_9_ng_n_l1&refcode=em_pet_220705surv_n_tlbr_actives_9_ng_n_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQwNmE3MC1hNWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5BSKifkg1lJ14cfW8my4dHFVfcXisQ9tRVlgbKf3m1g=&emci=3d94228d-84fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=85d06a70-a5fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11913588)**
| **[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47438621/354289472/882507610?ms=em_pet_220705surv_n_tlbr_actives_9_ng_n_b1&refcode=em_pet_220705surv_n_tlbr_actives_9_ng_n_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQwNmE3MC1hNWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5BSKifkg1lJ14cfW8my4dHFVfcXisQ9tRVlgbKf3m1g=&emci=3d94228d-84fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=85d06a70-a5fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11913588)**
---
It’s important to remember how we got here. This court's current right-wing majority owes itself to dirty tricks and unprecedented actions by Republicans that defied American voters.

In 2016, Mitch McConnell held up the nomination of Merrick Garland for nearly _one year_ , all to deny President Obama the pick on the court that he deserved. And just mere _days_ before the 2020 election, Donald Trump rushed to appoint Amy Coney Barrett to replace the late Ruth Bader Ginsburg. **Quite frankly, it's an insult to the foundations of our country that a third of this court was appointed by a President who routinely broke the law and tried to instigate a coup.**

LBR is prepared to work tirelessly to protect our rights and strengthen our democracy, but she can’t do this alone. This is why your voice is so important. [**Please fill out our survey here →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47438622/354289473/882507610?ms=em_pet_220705surv_n_tlbr_actives_9_ng_n_l2&refcode=em_pet_220705surv_n_tlbr_actives_9_ng_n_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQwNmE3MC1hNWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5BSKifkg1lJ14cfW8my4dHFVfcXisQ9tRVlgbKf3m1g=&emci=3d94228d-84fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=85d06a70-a5fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11913588)

Thank you,

Team LBR
** **

She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. subject: Breaking: Democrats are outraising us

body:
|
Fellow American,

**Democrats outraised us last month — and they’re on track to do so again this month.**

We can’t let this become a trend.

**They have coastal elites and rich liberals giving them MILLIONS to spend smearing conservative Republicans in battleground states.**

We have grassroots patriots like YOU. It’s time to get off the sidelines, because if we don’t have the resources to compete, we won’t take back the U.S. Senate in November.

**_I need 1,000 of you reading this email right now to chip in whatever you can. Your support could make or break our chances of winning in November and stopping the madness._**

name: Team Schiff
subject: Kevin McCarthy just pledged to take away Adam’s committee assignments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| The midterm elections haven’t even happened yet, and Kevin McCarthy is already bragging to Fox News about what he’ll do to Adam “when” he becomes Speaker.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=458%2E5257348%2EODWSrX)
Derek —
The midterm elections haven’t even happened yet, and Kevin McCarthy is already bragging to Fox News about what he’ll do to Adam _“when”_ he becomes Speaker.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jul2022_abs_em.4MLSU6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220705_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=458%2E5257348%2EODWSrX)
Yet again, McCarthy pandered to Trump and all his MAGA cronies by pledging to strip Adam of all his committee assignments, including the House Intelligence Committee.
These types of petty attacks are all McCarthy has to say about Adam — he knows he can’t come after Adam’s work ethic and powerful leadership without embarrassing himself and his Mar-a-Lago leader. And it’s meant to distract from the fact that he and his fellow Republicans won’t defend our democracy against their party’s dangerous leader.
**But McCarthy’s threats aren’t hollow. Far from it. And if we lose the House, he will follow through and retaliate against Adam. Trump won’t have it any other way, and McCarthy lacks the courage to stand up to him.**
These threats are only going to increase as we get closer to Election Day, and Adam can’t fend off the GOP’s attacks alone. He needs the help of this grassroots team.
**[Can you pitch in today to support Adam as he fights to stay ahead of McCarthy’s dark-money fueled hate campaign?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jul2022_abs_em.4MLSU6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220705_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=458%2E5257348%2EODWSrX)**

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsZ4oImhNZ

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osZ4oImhNZ

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

A few
years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did
Everyone Become a Socialist?"

This is,
of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left
in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and
our way of life.

In a
recent issue of Imprimis-Hillsdale College's digest of
liberty-author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of
the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'-a
two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on
top and socialism for the majority below."

Today, as
a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand
the extent of support for-and opposition to-socialism.

Your
input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight
for the future of liberty in our country.

Will you
please share your views on the political, social, and cultural
forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your
National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/

Sadly,
socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the
young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that...

. . .
during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those
16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also
increased in popularity among all ages.

Why is
this?

Draconian
government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated
competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream
come true for corporate socialists.

At the
same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what
socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures
wherever it has been tried.

This is a
result of the far-Left's "long march through the
institutions"-including colleges and universities, K-12 schools,
and the media.

Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once
confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race
theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as
school boards and even the military.

But it is
in our schools where the effects of critical race theory-which
teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens
according to race-are most dangerous.

You may
recall that many young Americans with college degrees who
championed socialist policies participated in the riots and
violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020.

In the
face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free
markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and
teach millions has never been more urgently needed.

That's
why I need your thoughts quickly.

By
responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five
days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent
rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach
increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope
to hear from friends representing every part of the country.

Education
is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your
partnership with Hillsdale College is critical.

As
Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure,
the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."

If you
agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey
on Socialism today.

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/

Despite
the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember-it is
NEVER too late to defend liberty through education.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: Upcoming Fundraiser at Buckhead City HQ!
body:
| | | |
---
|
### _Next Fundraiser at Buckhead City HQ_
---
|
---
| Excited for our next major event and fundraiser at the **Buckhead City Headquarters on Wednesday, July 20 from 6pm - 8pm!**

Come out to support Christian Zimm for Congress as he will be joined by special guests to explain how the federal government can assist with Buckhead City once it is a reality. This event is a great opportunity to pick up some Buckhead City swag, a yard sign, and more.

The suggested contribution at this event is $100, but any donation amount is welcome. Please RSVP to Patti Peach at 404-234-5884 and donate at [www.christianzimm.com/donate](https://christianzimm.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7004a54657965ddf2c517009f&id=925105ee1d&e=5ecfda27b2). You can also use Venmo @ZimmforCongress (last four digits are 7150 if asked).

Christian Zimm is the Republican Nominee for the 5th Congressional District and is endorsed by the Buckhead City Committee. He also serves as the Vice President of Communications for the Buckhead City Committee and believes that Buckhead residents should have the right to vote on cityhood.

Location: Buckhead City Headquarters; 3002 PEACHTREE RD NW, Atlanta, GA 30305

Time: 6pm - 8pm

See you there and thank you for your support!

Fair Fight |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47439306/354291967/1793776944?refcode=em_20220705_f_c_thanks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTc2MDJkZi1hN2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4v36PYoxu_3FLgvCS4BlB6yLD4qdJ5UWEcOVTXbuFIc=&emci=f8141aca-79fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=557602df-a7fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | Our power comes from people across Georgia registering to vote and making their voices heard. It comes from organizers in conversations around the kitchen table, and from those across the country who chip in what they can to build our movement. Our power comes from people like you — and it’s growing. As we build toward a better tomorrow, there will be devastating setbacks like the Supreme Court’s overturning of _Roe_ and reprehensible abortion bans like Brian Kemp’s. And when there are setbacks, we can look at this moment and see how we found our strength, shared it with one another and our communities, and came together for the fight ahead. We know it’s not easy to fight back in moments like these, but it’s crucial and will be worth it — so thank you. Thanks to your support, we will keep up the fight for free and fair elections for all. We will protect each person’s right to vote for the abortion access, gun safety laws, and education policies that they deserve. We will continue to support pro-democracy candidates like Stacey Abrams and Senator Raphael Warnock who will fight to protect our freedoms. And we will stand up to the legislators whose only path to power is through voter suppression. Yesterday’s holiday was a day for celebrating those who continue the fight for freedom for every American — no matter their gender, race, or zip code. Today and every day to come, the work of building power, fighting for democracy, and finding our true independence continues. [_**We hope you’ll continue to be right there with us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47439307/354291968/-1290423083?refcode=em_20220705_f_c_thanks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTc2MDJkZi1hN2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4v36PYoxu_3FLgvCS4BlB6yLD4qdJ5UWEcOVTXbuFIc=) Thank you, Cianti Stewart-Reid

Here’s the truth, every single one of our opponents cheered for the end of _Roe_. **_And every one of them said they would enforce Michigan’s nearly-century old law that criminalizes abortion in almost all cases._**

We can’t leave our rights up to our radical opponents. We’re at risk of losing the right to choose in Michigan – this is a fight we must win.

**[Right now, abortion remains legal in Michigan – and Gretchen Whitmer won’t stop fighting until Michiganders’ rights are protected. And we need to communicate through the platforms that have long been ignored by snooty old-school politicians. If you don’t follow me on or I invite you to join me. Send a message and join the conversation! You might even score a TikTok Live session with Ken! Instagram: TikTok: – Team Russell P.S. We had an INCREDIBLE quarter thanks to you! But, we need to keep raising in July to hire field organizers who will register new voters and Get Out The Vote in August and November. Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Congress in Florida's 27th District. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today. ** Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

name: Jena Griswold
subject: Honored to be your nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg?refcode=220705-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg?refcode=220705-email]
Peter,
I am honored to accept the Democratic nomination for re-election as Colorado Secretary of State.
Whether you are a Republican, Democrat, or Unaffiliated voter – I will uphold your right to make your voice heard at the ballot box. I have spent my first term making sure that Colorado’s election system is the gold standard, and I have every intention of continuing to deliver results for every eligible Colorado voter.
Before I get into the details of the hard work we have done over the last four years, I need to ask you to chip in to help defeat Pam Anderson and win this re-election in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg?refcode=220705-email]
Chip in $20 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg?refcode=220705-email&amount=20] Chip in $40 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg?refcode=220705-email&amount=40] Chip in $80 → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg?refcode=220705-email&amount=80]While in office, I have worked with my team to make elections more accessible for all voters by increasing ballot drop boxes by over 65% and adding additional in-person voting locations. We launched a statewide ballot tracking system – to ensure that every voter can track their ballot from when it is mailed to when it is counted – and improved election security. As your Secretary of State, I have taken action to counter election misinformation and hold those who attempted to tamper with election equipment accountable.
My opponent is a career politician who opposes automatic voter registration, refused to support 2019 legislation that increased polling places and drop boxes, and has the support of a dark money Super PAC.
This race isn’t going to be easy, but if we all work together, we can defeat Pam Anderson and continue Colorado’s gold standard elections. Don’t wait to get involved. Chip in any amount you can right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg?refcode=220705-email]
I will never stop working to make sure that Colorado’s elections remain free and fair.
Thank you so much for your support.
Jena Griswold
My name is Jena Griswold. In 2018, I was elected as the first democratic Secretary of State in Colorado since 1958, the first democratic woman Secretary of State in Colorado’s history, and only the 10th woman in Colorado’s history to hold the statewide constitutional office of governor, attorney general, secretary of state, or treasurer!
CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2207-q3-jg?refcode=220705-email&recurring=true]
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Sinema HQ
subject: Why your input is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Hey there, Summer can be a busy time for everyone, especially when you have to schedule around the Arizona heat. [**Since we know you’re busy, we don’t want to take up much of your time, so if you have a minute right now, will you complete our July Issues Survey and share your input on the issues that matter most to you?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47439878/354293882/1073673668?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220705_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQyYTZjMS1hOWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dtDdobZcXgXO8RCHOMYByuICKv6o33LZBlbC6An9tHI=&emci=2dd2a6c1-a9fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=2ed2a6c1-a9fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496) With your feedback, we are able to focus on delivering on your priorities, like writing and passing our _Bipartisan Safer Communities_ law to address violence in our schools and communities, fund prevention programs across the country, and restore a sense of safety and security for all of us. This law is a prime example of how we can work together to find solutions to the biggest challenges facing our country. Input from folks like you on this grassroots team is integral as we work to deliver for Arizonans and everyday families. Whatever your concerns are, we want to know what is on your mind. name: Team Jayapal
subject: FWD - Add your name to support a Trans Bill of Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I joined many of my colleagues to introduce an important measure for the rights of Trans folks.
#
Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw Pramila’s email last week about the Trans Bill of Rights she introduced in the House.
It’s a historic framework to ensure equal treatment and protections under the law for transgender and nonbinary people. And more than 2,000 of Pramila’s supporters have already signed on to support this important piece of legislation.
[**Peter, can you join Pramila and add your name in support of the Trans Bill of Rights? We must stand against attacks from the GOP and extreme Supreme Court.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220705-1399&t=1&akid=1399%2E420207%2E9wwoiL)
Check out Pramila’s email below and please sign on today!
\- Team Jayapal
\-----Forwarded Message-----
From: Pramila Jayapal
Date: July 1, 2022
Subject: Add your name to support a Trans Bill of Rights
Peter,
This week, I introduced the Trans Bill of Rights in the House of Representatives. It’s a landmark legal framework to protect the rights of transgender and nonbinary people and ensure they aren’t discriminated against or persecuted for their gender identity and expression.
It meant a great deal to me to introduce this framework, as the parent of a trans kid and as co-chair of the Transgender Equality Task Force. This is an urgently needed set of protections, as Republicans and an extremist Supreme Court attack and roll back the fundamental rights of trans people across our country. Right-wing media and GOP-led state legislatures continue to target our trans community with hateful, bigoted, and transphobic attacks.
[**Will you stand with me today in support of trans rights? Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Trans Bill of Rights, so we can build support for this critical civil rights framework.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220705-1399&t=2&akid=1399%2E420207%2E9wwoiL)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220705-1399&t=3&akid=1399%2E420207%2E9wwoiL)**
My Democratic colleagues and I know that trans people, and trans people of color in particular, face some of the greatest barriers in access to opportunity, services and resources, and face some of the worst discrimination. And we know that the GOP will only continue to ramp up attacks on the trans community. We know we need to pass federal protections for trans and nonbinary folks urgently.
The Trans Bill of Rights would call on the federal government to:
* Ensure that transgender and nonbinary people have equal access to services and public accommodations by making the Civil Rights Act of 1964 and federal education laws inclusive.

* Recognize the right to bodily autonomy and ethical healthcare by expanding access to gender-affirming medical care and other healthcare services for trans and nonbinary people.

* Promote the safety of trans and nonbinary people by investing in community services to prevent violence against trans and nonbinary people and expand services for survivors.

* And much more.

The Trans Bill of Rights says clearly to the trans community that we see you and we will stand with you to ensure you are protected and given the dignity and respect that every person should have.
[**Peter, please stand with us and show your support for the Trans Bill of Rights by adding your name today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220705-1399&t=4&akid=1399%2E420207%2E9wwoiL)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/trans-bill-rights/?source=em20220705-1399&t=5&akid=1399%2E420207%2E9wwoiL)**
Thank you for showing your support for such an important and sweeping framework for the trans community.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220705-1399-footer&t=6&refcode2=1399_420207_9wwoiL&akid=1399%2E420207%2E9wwoiL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=7&akid=1399%2E420207%2E9wwoiL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1399%2E420207%2E9wwoiL)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:
Did you even know that Joe Biden put this in place?| | | [](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=210c5a30bb5647b18f2c782271f0a949&_e=LK_AKsrmcMH0DvTKXFNYPq8RNdo__0BgFgPs6K4Ig7Op_okcSNztrPkJKYXhey40sMtxYTJD4H2uFWAE52vXwI1WGN9Q80__Id6PrmddBLcSLZ_5wDeTrmw_P9NzCGwoe-0jqB9UWYIaoaxpVyyRsbmYQMsm0PCkYfAcPisOM-nFhFXn5GuSwMQCQiSzDvnf_ENmYO18W-XLAOSDR_TOfvtp-r56wwEXMxqoVJr2sXAnCO0mQmQ36PpUC-nLcz77L3UaEAQYraxHCOF7hcq9eVGRjYiPgfo3eDLKXkYE4J2vs-cRZcZTivg69LBHkxpjYpR4l1DvND3yZKCC6pK0lKpCtXbB5oZXGhZDOvZQLnbhlJ_MebPuQmJIz0XJwMEL3nO6sZI2gjG8k9JsFYAxNiYKCh98rNstucyX3rZqGO_vq6W0KToxTEkk6OxWpspJCNEAxnbOVcKE3JQZCfcmthqOzu0cP2DXoCHFsO8YKSkw5qSi6o9SKi82jm336sUr)

Peter, did you know that Biden put this in place? It’s okay if you didn’t - he made this executive order discreetly, and there’s been little information on it. In fact, all attempts to get more information have been blocked. Here’s what we know:
* **It requires every Federal Agency to “encourage voter participation” and “register voters.”**

**_What does the EPA or ATF have to do with elections and voter turnout? _** It’s time for us to get to the bottom of this–[** _if you agree, please take a second to sign our petition now >>_**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=210c5a30bb5647b18f2c782271f0a949&_e=LK_AKsrmcMH0DvTKXFNYPq8RNdo__0BgFgPs6K4Ig7Op_okcSNztrPkJKYXhey40sMtxYTJD4H2uFWAE52vXwI1WGN9Q80__Id6PrmddBLcSLZ_5wDeTrmw_P9NzCGwoe-0jqB9UWYIaoaxpVyyRsbmYQMsm0PCkYfAcPisOM-nFhFXn5GuSwMQCQiSzDvnf_ENmYO18W-XLAOSDR_TOfvtp-r56wwEXMxqoVJr2sXAnCO0mQmQ36PpUC-nLcz77L3UaEAQYraxHCOF7hcq9eVGRjYiPgfo3eDLKXkYE4J0ps4d4hX0SMg-lW85eU1Nnt4MjZGJqSWzjCAr8Jscq05hzIG0d8dppu5B8_aEErDhDafzKQFjwtTJnLrGgHYfZQYmL8uAtYTejiai4YFScC0XyEitaPuAUAVHumju5vm9UyXlpVgbadNiNNo6GdxSs1CWaOcLQ7WkramrniLb6LA_cTHCUCxRVXUJSgF4-eh1Mk1pumU7vqEI_rVzSXvdh) Thank you,Team Claudia

name: Rep. Malliotakis
subject: This isn’t easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47440203/354295246/-2057546413?refcode=20220705_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjI3NzgyMi1hY2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_W5CzW43sXMgJ6swCtSs6PCpMYXfCrFQQ-pt8dnKxA=) Folks, About a minute from now, I’m going to ask you to add a contribution to our grassroots campaign for Senate as part of an emergency fundraising drive. Let me explain why this is so important: Ohio’s Senate race has become one of the most expensive across the country. Even the _Wall Street Journal_ calls us 2022’s most important race. Republicans are spending over $80 million to keep this seat red because they see us as a threat. **This is the beginning of a new effort to tear down our campaign,** and my GOP opponents have begun to attack me personally. We’re expecting Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump’s dark money donor network to amplify those attacks. We have to fight back today. Republicans are breaking fundraising records left and right, and the only way we can counter them is by collecting as many grassroots donations as possible. **So, we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight, and we need you to make a contribution of any amount to help us get there:** [**Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Serve America right now? Thanks in advance:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47440204/354295247/2038802527?refcode=20220705_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjI3NzgyMi1hY2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_W5CzW43sXMgJ6swCtSs6PCpMYXfCrFQQ-pt8dnKxA=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47440205/354295248/-2057546413?refcode=20220705_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjI3NzgyMi1hY2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_W5CzW43sXMgJ6swCtSs6PCpMYXfCrFQQ-pt8dnKxA=)

clean_body: | | | = Folks, About a minute from now, I’m going to ask you to add a contribution to our grassroots campaign for Senate as part of an emergency fundraising drive. Let me explain why this is so important: Ohio’s Senate race has become one of the most expensive across the country. Even the Wall Street Journal calls us 2022’s most important race. Republicans are spending over $80 million to keep this seat red because they see us as a threat. This is the beginning of a new effort to tear down our campaign, and my GOP opponents have begun to attack me personally. We’re expecting Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump’s dark money donor network to amplify those attacks. We have to fight back today. Republicans are breaking fundraising records left and right, and the only way we can counter them is by collecting as many grassroots donations as possible. So, we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 by midnight tonight, and we need you to make a contribution of any amount to help us get there: = = If we stick together, I know we can win this thing. — Tim | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

body:
Here’s what you need to know about my official GOP opponent...
#
Peter, it’s official: **Joe O’Dea is my official Republican opponent in the general election.**
Here’s what you need to know about Joe O’Dea:
* He was endorsed by the Colorado NRA and opposes new gun safety legislation that would keep Coloradans safe,
* He came out against Colorado’s law guaranteeing the right to choose,
* And he suggested cutting funding for critical safety nets like Social Security and Medicare.

There’s a saying: _When someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time. _
**Peter, we know who Joe O’Dea is.** He’s given his own campaign seven-figures so he could buy his way onto the ballot, then he dumped more cash into attack ads to try and win this seat. He’s out of step with Coloradans, and he’ll be a rubber stamp for Rick Scott — who wants to raise taxes for low-income folks and seniors — and Mitch McConnell.
**[Peter, please split a $10 donation between my campaign and Patty Murray to help defend my seat and continue defending our fundamental freedoms.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47440255/354295665/-1328542192?refcode=pm_em_220705_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGRjMDNkYS1hY2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8umA3fIh-5nm9iFXcWOWlnXVS-G-hHg_nNcwPrD6--8=)**
When it comes to the issues Coloradans care about — like creating jobs, lowering costs, protecting our communities from climate change, and investing in working families — my record stands tall.
But my seat is listed among the 10 most likely Senate seats to flip, and National Republicans have laid out a roadmap to defeat me. The RNC has already dropped organizers and operatives in Colorado, and Mitch McConnell and the National GOP have raised over **$200 million** to target races like mine.
Now that O’Dea is the official Republican nominee, their efforts will only ramp up. So I’m asking:

name: January 6th Survey
subject: Are you watching?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
|
Peter,

**WE’VE GOT ONE QUESTION FOR YOU: ARE YOU WATCHING THE JANUARY 6TH COMMITTEE HEARINGS?**

**Democrats seem to think that they can use Mr. Trump as a “boogeyman” once again – as they did in 2018 and 2020..**

**Are the public hearings going to have an impact on the way you vote in November’s midterms? If yes, we’d like to know, why. If no, we’d like to know, why?**

**This poll will expire at midnight tonight. We are asking for your participation for research purposes and kindly request a response by that time.**

**Survey Request for:**
**_Response Requested By: Midnight Tonight Polls are open until 7/4/2022 at 11:59p.m._**
[ _ « START SURVEY NOW » _
](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=720190ad7b0042b2babd3594d4b46217&_e=SYBApwuwnpLdNIYeXzqsAqjpr4lVaDGDimkIu-B6VnQ6vvaJAoJSZgd5vVA76xncPHullATNPNV6VK7CJ6uWe5UgjxQ44UD3KTWVFrkbUyzjV4P9AxfbETNV0mj0O8etMMEI__bxxXSEQDlEX43plfuds74LUX2r79p4CM3zkpfYg0lBZ5N_UE3GAeWP3Kw761p0a8QfqmZUUPHv24dIa29-s7qalYyXd_5H8wE4JTdPzBYuxK0oKpq413uNvmGsipl1Qa0wcYobZikk4nEwqkUQc6va9Ei8h9ynG8bEW__fV5n1tGJfw6-C0HoG2CNMzS3uceeM7VRlljv1d4W5Y_CjOf74BgQOKf01z7EBe8QHTCsmGAbx0UqA4KLNBFkXEeKMvAWr-v-9enxgoZ-Gelw919xGZ58MEt6_P8K7iqdZ11J-LRgZ7WeLkGjXstGbSWxu5AOLqQpM3c_KxmZCtJ_nKYo9ruxqdj1jcGLSLo9xk6yAn2I01UWs8v8vy1KHn36Rp6ngueU2wK66Xd6MZKG6ohFLBKIAobStGyy0sv0%3D)

Democrats are using the public hearings to galvanize their supporters – and it seems to be working. **All you have to do is look to the $96 MILLION Democrats raised in the month of May.**

We certainly can’t judge whether or not this trial is about raising money and holding onto their tenuous Congressional majorities. But don’t you see a correlation?
We need to hear from you today.

Thanks,
Team NRSC HQ

name: John King
subject: Thank you + a new ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer

| Hey Peter, I hope you had a restful and joyful 4th of July! I am so grateful and proud to tell you that we exceeded our goal for Sunday’s public fundraising deadline, and all the credit goes to our amazing grassroots supporters like you who believe in our campaign to build a more just and prosperous Maryland. The fact that we not only met our goal but surpassed it, demonstrates the real strength of this movement as we head into the final TWO WEEKS ahead of Primary Election Day and TWO DAYS from the start of in-person early voting. The next 14 days are absolutely critical, Peter, and that’s why our campaign just released our final TV ad of the race — and I want you to be one of the first to see it! name: Trudy
subject: sharing some photos that are special to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
I wanted to take some time to share a bit more about myself.
| | |
---
Hi, Peter, do you have a minute? These last few months since launching my campaign have been a complete whirlwind.
I've been hard at work meeting voters, building a grassroots coalition, crisscrossing our state, and introducing myself to supporters like you.**I've heard so many stories from voters here – about their struggles, their joys, and their hopes for our future. **
People here in Missouri know that Washington is broken. We see it firsthand as affordable, quality healthcare is nearly impossible to find, as the opioid epidemic continues to throw our families into crisis, as prices soar and wages remain the same – as it gets harder and harder for families to achieve their American Dream. Our government has the power to change all of that, but our leaders refuse to act.
Washington needs more compassionate, honest leaders who will put in the work to make life better for our communities. That's why I'm running for Senate – and I am so, so grateful to have you on my team.
**Now that things have settled down, I wanted to take some time to share a bit more about myself.[I put together a special family photo album to share my story and explain why this race means so much to me. If you have a moment, I hope you’ll click here to take a look:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47440653/354297765/-2118319513?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk82-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTE4NTA4MS1hZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQi1jJ26rJ_x8ORqP7OqBit8EShX1azC2jZhq73BE-0=&emci=fe08bbfc-3af7-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=f5185081-aefc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=4450063)**

body:
We want to explain why this ask is so urgent
| | |
---
**[_Friend, we're about to ask you to rush a gift of $3 to help defend this crucial seat in New Hampshire and protect our Democratic Senate majority._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47440699/354297929/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1237-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWI5MDQ4OC1hZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwFYJKJu2Ncee39OC3r0osS0N-RmGAr3_AM2XC0H1RE=)**

**But first, we want to explain why this ask is so urgent:**
**FIRST:**
Experts like Rachel Maddow predicted that Maggie would have a tough reelection fight ahead.

**THEN: **
Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies funneled MILLIONS into attack ads against Maggie's campaign.

**NOW:**

body:
Do you support Marco Rubio's anti-choice record?
| | |
---
| | **URGENT: Marco Rubio is leading the anti-choice movement in the Senate**
---
With the Supreme Court's recent ruling striking down _Roe v. Wade_ , the stakes have never been higher! I need 25,000 pro-choice advocates to respond to a live poll about Rubio's extremism before midnight tonight and I haven't heard from you. **Please, tell me right now:**
---
**Do you support Marco Rubio's anti-choice record on reproductive rights?**

**Friend – Reproductive rights are under attack like never before, and there are three things you URGENTLY need to know about where Marco Rubio stands:**
🛑 **Rubio tried to defund Planned Parenthood** , a service that millions of Americans use for critical health care.
🛑 **Rubio sponsored an anti-choice bill in the Senate **to punish businesses for supporting workers who must travel to another state to access abortion services.
🛑 **Rubio just introduced a new bill** **to block President Biden from declaring a federal emergency on abortion to preserve reproductive rights.**
That's why I'm running to replace Rubio. I'm a proud, pro-choice champion who has ALWAYS stood up for reproductive freedom – **and if I defeat Rubio, Democrats can expand our Senate majority and will finally have the votes to abolish the filibuster and federally protect reproductive freedom.**
**With so much on the line in this close race, I need 25,000 people to respond to my live poll about Rubio's extremist views before midnight tonight. I'm still missing your response, so please tell me now:**
**Do you support Marco Rubio's anti-choice record on reproductive rights?**

clean_body: Do you support Marco Rubio's anti-choice record? | | | | | URGENT: Marco Rubio is leading the anti-choice movement in the Senate With the Supreme Court's recent ruling striking down Roe v. Wade , the stakes have never been higher! I need 25,000 pro-choice advocates to respond to a live poll about Rubio's extremism before midnight tonight and I haven't heard from you. Please, tell me right now: Do you support Marco Rubio's anti-choice record on reproductive rights? | | | | Friend – Reproductive rights are under attack like never before, and there are three things you URGENTLY need to know about where Marco Rubio stands: 🛑 Rubio tried to defund Planned Parenthood , a service that millions of Americans use for critical health care. 🛑 Rubio sponsored an anti-choice bill in the Senate to punish businesses for supporting workers who must travel to another state to access abortion services. 🛑 Rubio just introduced a new bill to block President Biden from declaring a federal emergency on abortion to preserve reproductive rights. That's why I'm running to replace Rubio. I'm a proud, pro-choice champion who has ALWAYS stood up for reproductive freedom – and if I defeat Rubio, Democrats can expand our Senate majority and will finally have the votes to abolish the filibuster and federally protect reproductive freedom. With so much on the line in this close race, I need 25,000 people to respond to my live poll about Rubio's extremist views before midnight tonight. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Turn your anger into action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill [https://secure
body:
DEMOCRATIC ASSOCIATION OF DEMOCRATIC SECRETARIES OF STATE

Dear friends,

The Supreme Court has ruled that reproductive health care is no longer federally protected and will now be decided by the individual states.
In Texas, Greg Abbott has already signed a “trigger law” that criminalizes all abortion — with no exception for rape or incest — and goes into effect 30 days following the Supreme Court's decision.

That means that in a matter of weeks, no woman will have control over her body in Texas, a state that already struggles to ensure proper medical care for women and girls and which leads much of the developed world in the rate of maternal mortality. More women face this unprecedented attack on their freedom and their health in Texas than in any other state in America.

So it’s on us to respond and to act. That means standing up to Abbott and fighting for Texas women by winning this election for governor.
Imagine the impact that will have not only in Texas, but across the country.

The state that came up with this “trigger law,” the state that has been leading the attack on a woman’s right to choose for over a decade, and the state that promised bounty hunters $10,000 to turn in those who helped women get an abortion can be the state that elects a governor who will work to ensure that every woman makes her own decisions about her own body and her own future.

Let’s use these next days — between the Supreme Court's decision and the implementation of Abbott’s total abortion ban — to assemble the volunteers and raise the resources we need to win political power. Do not succumb to the temptation to despair or give up in the face of this attack. Turn your anger into action and focus on what will do the greatest good.

The only way to overcome this attack on women and reproductive freedom is to win this election.

The only way to win this election is with your help.

Split a donation between our campaign and the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State now so that when these days are up, we can announce the news that will give the people of Texas some hope: they’ll see that we have come together to meet Abbott’s attacks with the resources we need to defeat him and ensure that our state is led by someone who will look out for ALL of us.

Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-beto-july22?refcode=EM_FR_070522_B1_Beto-Roe_30AC&amount=5]

clean_body: DEMOCRATIC ASSOCIATION OF DEMOCRATIC SECRETARIES OF STATE Dear friends, The Supreme Court has ruled that reproductive health care is no longer federally protected and will now be decided by the individual states. In Texas, Greg Abbott has already signed a “trigger law” that criminalizes all abortion — with no exception for rape or incest — and goes into effect 30 days following the Supreme Court's decision. That means that in a matter of weeks, no woman will have control over her body in Texas, a state that already struggles to ensure proper medical care for women and girls and which leads much of the developed world in the rate of maternal mortality. More women face this unprecedented attack on their freedom and their health in Texas than in any other state in America. So it’s on us to respond and to act. That means standing up to Abbott and fighting for Texas women by winning this election for governor. Imagine the impact that will have not only in Texas, but across the country. The state that came up with this “trigger law,” the state that has been leading the attack on a woman’s right to choose for over a decade, and the state that promised bounty hunters $10,000 to turn in those who helped women get an abortion can be the state that elects a governor who will work to ensure that every woman makes her own decisions about her own body and her own future. Let’s use these next days — between the Supreme Court's decision and the implementation of Abbott’s total abortion ban — to assemble the volunteers and raise the resources we need to win political power. Do not succumb to the temptation to despair or give up in the face of this attack. Turn your anger into action and focus on what will do the greatest good. The only way to overcome this attack on women and reproductive freedom is to win this election. The only way to win this election is with your help. Split a donation between our campaign and the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State now so that when these days are up, we can announce the news that will give the people of Texas some hope: they’ll see that we have come together to meet Abbott’s attacks with the resources we need to defeat him and ensure that our state is led by someone who will look out for ALL of us. Chip in $5 >> [] Chip in $25 >> [] Chip in $50 >> [] Chip in $100 >> [] Chip in $250 >> [] Chip in another amount >> [] We can do this. Beto Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. There are 27 Secretaries of State races this year. We're fighting to reelect 13 Democratic Secretaries of State, win in battleground states, and flip red seats blue. But we're relying on grassroots supporters to provide us with the resources we need to win nationwide. Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: CHIP IN $5 >> []

name: John Fetterman
subject: 538 just ranked our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You need to see this.
#
Hi Derek, it's John.
So uh Nate Silver’s 538 analysts released their 2022 Senate Election forecast and...
**Pennsylvania’s Senate Race is rated a TOSS-UP**
Their model named us the closest Senate race in the country, Derek.
[**_We can’t leave anything up to chance. Will you chip in and help our campaign pull ahead of Dr. Oz?_**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220705-1?refcode=em20220705-6419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6419_434096_gADcgO&akid=6419%2E434096%2EgADcgO)
Let me first say I’m so grateful for this team. We just had a killer end-of-quarter grassroots fundraising push, all thanks to yinz guys. 🥰 __
So I hate to come right back to your inbox with another ask. Seriously. But here are three reasons why, as soon I saw Nate’s new forecast, I knew I didn’t have a choice:
1. **538 has the entire Senate rated as a toss-up!!!** Yep, Dems staying in control of the Senate could come down to a single race (ours).
2. **They’re projecting a vote margin of just 0.3% in our race.** Doing the math, that’s like, a few thousand PA voters at most. That’s the kind of *tiny* margin that could tip either way purely based on how hard we campaign.
3. **Dr. Oz is primed to spend TONS of money attacking me.** My dude is so rich, the limit basically does not exist.

So if we don’t want Dr. Oz and his buddies Trump + McConnell to tip the scales against us with massive, MAGA-y ad campaigns, we can’t skip a beat with our online fundraising.
[**_Please, Derek, if you’re ready to defeat Dr. Oz, flip this seat, and keep the Senate blue, consider chipping in a donation of any amount today so we aren’t outspent._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220705-1?refcode=em20220705-6419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6419_434096_gADcgO&akid=6419%2E434096%2EgADcgO)
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220705-1?refcode=em20220705-6419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6419_434096_gADcgO&akid=6419%2E434096%2EgADcgO)**
With your help, I know that we’ll be able to keep up with Dr. Oz and his MAGA money through donations of $5, $25, or whatever yinz can pitch in. It’s how we’ve run this campaign so far, and how it’s going to stay.
Thank you for fighting back today, Derek. TBH, I’m really hoping our team will see your name pop up on ActBlue [**_when you make your first-ever (!) donation._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220705-1?refcode=em20220705-6419&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6419_434096_gADcgO&akid=6419%2E434096%2EgADcgO)
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220705-6419-footer&t=1&refcode2=6419_434096_gADcgO&akid=6419%2E434096%2EgADcgO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=6419%2E434096%2EgADcgO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6419%2E434096%2EgADcgO)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: A high-capacity magazine ban and universal background checks are long overdue
body:
Catherine Cortez Masto for sensible gun laws
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Did you see this earlier, Peter? _Because it happened again yesterday: mass murder by a lunatic with a weapons he should've neer had, and I'm sickened by the images. _ This time Highland Park, IL, was the scene of overturned baby strollers, folded chairs and bicycles, flanked by blood-soaked pavement, as parade goers trying to celebrate our nation's birthday instead ran for their lives to escape a crazed killer with an AR-15. Six dead, who will never get to celebrate another July 4th with their families. It honestly makes me feel ill. The predictable, the horrifying, never-ending assault on our freedom to live and assemble freely continued unabated, because an out-of-control Supreme Court stocked with right-wingers in robes and a Senate where living ghoul Mitch McConnell won't allow votes on universal background checks, red flag laws and an assault weapons ban. **_Catherine Cortez Masto, Senator from Nevada, has co-sponsored a universal background checks bill and a high-capacity magazine ban--i.e. the ridiculous firepower murderers have access to when they get a magazine with 20, 50, 100 bullets. _** _**We can only pass these if we keep her in the Senate and add 2-4 more Senators who will vote for these common sense measures that will lessen our plague of gun violence by up to 70%.**_ [**Can you give this terrific Senator, Catherine Cortez Masto, $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T50c151b7-15cf-4d61-861a-cd64266d8f66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: CATHERINE CORTEZ MASTO FOR NEVADA!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89d44dd0-d9e6-4ca1-b805-0243083fd426/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Cortez Masto knows how to do this. She was elected Nevada's Attorney General, for two terms. She was popular and successful, taking on the NRA and reigning in rogue police departments. She was so good that the late legend, Harry Reid, supported her bid to take his seat when he retired. When she won, she made history as the first woman elected by Nevada to the Senate, and the first Latina to ever serve in the U.S. Senate. We are all heartbroken after the tragedy yesterday. But if we can turn that heartbreak into dedication to make sure we're a different country in a year, and start by reelecting Cortez Masto and adding a few more progresive, Democratic Senators, we can get the change we need to make our country what it should be by the next 4th of July. Nevada is a state that both Donald Trump and other Republicans have targeted to try and win back, which is why it was one of the closest state presidential races in 2016.**_ Yet, Cortez Mastro, like Biden, prevailed. And we can--and MUST--make sure she does once again, if we're to have any hope of stopping these despicable, preventable tragedies. _** [**Can you give this terrific Senator, Catherine Cortez Masto, $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8182c557-9346-4dab-ba0d-7820d61c75b1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting to make this nation a safer place for all of our children. Cliff

To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | Our jaw is on the floor... NBC News reported that some GOP members of Congress sought Trump pardons after the Jan. 6th Capitol attack. Marjorie Taylor Greene Madison Cawthorn Lauren Boebert Louie Gohmert Andy Biggs Paul Gosar Mo Brooks And Rep. Gosar even floated the idea that the insurrectionists would receive a “blanket pardon” to protect them from legal action! These members are a disgrace -- and took a SLEDGEHAMMER to our democracy. | | | Don’t wait, please respond! \-- Team Ruiz NBC NEWS: "Jan. 6 panel reveals GOP lawmakers sought Trump pardons after Capitol attack" | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . * * *
For half a century, the courts secured the right to access reproductive health care across this country. **Now, that protection is GONE.**
Here in North Carolina, abortion is legal and will remain so as long as there are enough Democrats in the legislature to uphold Roy’s veto — but Republicans are _incredibly_ close to winning supermajorities in Raleigh.
Meanwhile, Republicans in D.C. are preparing to pass a national abortion ban if they gain control over Congress.
Our only path forward for defending reproductive rights in NC, preventing a national abortion ban, and restoring abortion access across the country is to elect pro-choice leaders who will do whatever it takes to fight for our fundamental rights.
Peter: _Will YOU be a pro-choice voter?_

Senator Warnock and Stacey Abrams are comparatively champions of progressive reform.

Senator Warnock is a champion of progression by comparison. He’s a pro-choice pastor who fights for working families. But his track record speaks as loud as his values, passing the Affordable Insulin Now Act to bring down the cost of insulin for those who need it.

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: Environmental advocates support our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

The League of Conservation Voters and Sierra Club have both endorsed our campaign! I’m grateful for their support, and I want to tell you why environmental issues matter for all of us.

I’ve lived in South Florida my entire life, and when I look at my two boys, I want them to be able to call our community home for decades to come.

Climate change poses an existential threat to South Florida, and we need bold action to protect our community for my kids and yours.

When I was the FL Director of Emergency Management, I saw firsthand how increasingly more powerful storms are affecting our state. We need to take action to prepare our community for those
impacts and more. I’m committed to fighting sea level rise, protecting the Everglades, and securing resiliency funding for our communities.

But climate change isn’t just an environmental challenge. It’s an economic threat and an opportunity. By making investments in resiliency, clean energy, and environmental protection, we can create thousands of jobs in Florida and protect businesses and workers from environmental threats.

South Florida can’t afford another decade of inaction on climate change. We need leaders in Washington who can tackle this crisis–even in the face of partisan gridlock, division, and misinformation.

I proved I could cut through the noise and deliver for you as a State Representative and Director of Emergency Management. You can count on me to do the same in Congress.

Thank you for your support.
Jared

Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

clean_body: Dear Friends, The League of Conservation Voters and Sierra Club have both endorsed our campaign! I’m grateful for their support, and I want to tell you why environmental issues matter for all of us. I’ve lived in South Florida my entire life, and when I look at my two boys, I want them to be able to call our community home for decades to come. Climate change poses an existential threat to South Florida, and we need bold action to protect our community for my kids and yours. When I was the FL Director of Emergency Management, I saw firsthand how increasingly more powerful storms are affecting our state. We need to take action to prepare our community for those impacts and more. I’m committed to fighting sea level rise, protecting the Everglades, and securing resiliency funding for our communities. But climate change isn’t just an environmental challenge. It’s an economic threat and an opportunity. By making investments in resiliency, clean energy, and environmental protection, we can create thousands of jobs in Florida and protect businesses and workers from environmental threats. South Florida can’t afford another decade of inaction on climate change. We need leaders in Washington who can tackle this crisis–even in the face of partisan gridlock, division, and misinformation. I proved I could cut through the noise and deliver for you as a State Representative and Director of Emergency Management. You can count on me to do the same in Congress. Thank you for your support. Jared Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress PO Box 8784 Coral Springs, FL 33065 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Tim Ryan
subject: now for the fun part
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16135?t=1006&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ][IMG]

I’m running between events and campaign stops this week, so I don’t have
much time, folks, but wanted to shoot you a quick email.

My favorite part of the job is hitting the road to talk to people—there’s
just nothing else like it.

But Ohio is a big state, and we’ve got a lot of ground to cover if we want
to reach the voters we’ll need to win on Election Day. And that, my
friends, takes resources. Which is why I’m reaching out during my rare 10
minutes of free time.

We crunched the numbers, and we’ll need to raise $125,000 this week to
keep my team and me on the road.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16133?t=1014&amount=25&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ]It’s a lot of money, but if everyone reading this chipped in just $25,
we’d hit this goal in no time. Can I count on you to chip in?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16133?t=1015&amount=25&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16133?t=1016&amount=50&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16133?t=1017&amount=100&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16133?t=1018&amount=200&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16133?t=1019&amount=250&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16133?t=1020&amount=30&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ]Other Amount

Unlike my millionaire opponent JD Vance, I don’t have (or want) the
backing of right-wing corporate billionaires, so I’m not wasting any time
cozying up to them.

When I make it to the Senate, I’ll be answering to hardworking Ohioans and
their families—not Silicon Valley. That’s why I have to get out and speak
with voters about why we need to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue.

Business-as-usual politics just ain’t cutting it for everyday folks, so I
want to show them another path forward for the Buckeye State.

Locking down this $125,000 goal means I can spend the entire trip focusing
on what matters most: listening to Ohioans. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/16133?t=1021&amount=25&akid=4478%2E3611125%2EOwg1gc ]Can you chip in a quick $25
to help keep me on the road talking to voters?

Thanks,

Tim Ryan

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Tiffany Shedd Endorsed by the Pinal County Deputies Association
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Tiffany Shedd Endorsed by the Pinal County Deputies Association

July 5, 2022

For Immediate Release

Contact: joanna@theresolute.group

ELOY, ARIZ., - Tiffany Shedd, candidate for Arizona Attorney General, is
honored to announce her endorsement by the Pinal County Deputies Association.

“I know quite a few of these brave deputies personally. We live and work in
the same community and I am grateful for the protection and service they have
given my family for decades,” said Shedd. “They are among our best and most
capable and I’m honored to have their endorsement. Like me, they understand
what’s at stake with an insecure border because they put their lives on the
line every day to protect us.

Rick Benavidez, President of Pinal County Deputies Association, gave this
endorsement of Tiffany Shedd for Attorney General.

“The members of Pinal County Deputies Association officially endorse Tiffany
Shedd’s candidacy for Arizona State Attorney General. Tiffany Shedd, a lifetime
resident of Pinal County and an experienced public servant, has the wisdom and
insight to make the right decisions as Attorney General for the State of
Arizona. After reviewing the qualifications and positions of the candidates in
this race, we have concluded that she is the best candidate that voters can
enthusiastically support. We intend to fully support Tiffany Shedd in the 2022
election.”

Shedd recently released her 14-point border plan. Read it at SheddforAZ.com.

###

Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.
Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

Ilhan is behaving like someone who knows her re-election chances are in serious jeopardy. You don't spend $1.5 million as an incumbent if you're confident of victory. With voting underway, Ilhan knows her last hope for re-election is to spend millions silencing me and any opposition. Our first election to show the country we have the support to win this seat is just over a month away and these final days are critical! If we can't match Ilhan's massive ad buys and an army of paid activists, we're giving her a free path to buy this election. We have the upper hand in this race. body:
Read what's new with Tanya's campaign. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/daf90a587904/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-7241029?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
What a fun week on the campaign trail! Tanya started the week with a candidate mixer in Ahwatukee and ended the holiday weekend with the Mesa Fourth of July celebration. Team Tanya is feeling recharged after the long weekend and ready to give the first week of early ballots all we have!

If you want Team Tanya to stop by your group next time or you are interested in volunteering, email us at [info@tanyaforarizona.com](mailto:info@tanyaforarizona.com "mailto:info@tanyaforarizona.com")

**ICYMI: Team Tanya Officially Hit the Airwaves**

Tanya Contreras Wheeless launched her first TV advertisement, and it is all because of **YOU** and your generous support of her campaign.

Tanya explains why protecting the American Dream is so important to her and how she will push back against the Biden administration and anyone else who stands in her way of defending it.

In Congress, Tanya promises to:
⭐️Secure our border
📈Fight inflation, and
🚔Stand up for our heroes in uniform.

Watch the ad [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=0b9b31b6c1&e=bd2b55b0e3) or below!
---
| [ ](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=47b2a8a81f&e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| **🚨Calling all Team Tanya Volunteers!!🚨**

Early voting is just around the corner and we need your help to flip AZ-04! The Democrats are gearing up and prepared to send money and influence into our district to try to hold this seat. We need to show them that we mean business.

We have a lot of opportunities to volunteer whether you have 30 min or a couple of hours.

🪧 Grab a #TeamTanya yard sign

🚪 Sign up to knock doors and make calls

🤝 Host a meet and greet

💻 Post on social media

Sign up to volunteer here -> [https://tanyaforarizona.com/volunteer](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=3ac9be8e77&e=bd2b55b0e3 "https://tanyaforarizona.com/volunteer")

**Get your Tanya for Arizona yard sign!!**

Team Tanya yard signs are making it around the district.

Get yours today! If you live in the district and would like a yard sign, fill out [t](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=052124a81f&e=bd2b55b0e3)[his form](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=70503acdb1&e=bd2b55b0e3) and someone from our team will connect with you and coordinate getting one to you.

Yard Sign Form: [https://forms.gle/hkXZgT4CNwGuYxQX8](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=cb00933b5d&e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| **Don't Forget!**
* Follow the campaign trail on [Instagram](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=dcb0aa4d35&e=bd2b55b0e3).
* Get news and updates on [Twitter](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=40844383e6&e=bd2b55b0e3) and [Facebook](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=f368d06064&e=bd2b55b0e3).
