name: Penny Ronning for Congress
subject: Rosendale Voted AGAINST Helping Hungry Children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Penny Ronning for U
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00110Xac-Fbq0153WbOTtk6wg-ZUsgrFCuGUyDSM3iw_jzYh3bsY3HtfbLgYcjGWGMsf0CTAuDeAi-3_jVsaIcFSDcG-B4hkH9bT5hySAsccBU7rEvWMEk7iR2CBKcLRG60ATgoo49uRbfB0ys2giGEkg==&c=vgSgzII089CMk7honzLAaREGAunBfxdpHXpWAIu4il7ZdAqis27Z3Q==&ch=xL5eJOvMU8Tu0qH1qlUUf-rY9mRTmwEnGkHl5l_jxnIVIACmGe2qMg==)
---
| Rosendale Voted AGAINST Helping Montana's Hungry Children
---
| Dear Peter,

Almost 40% of Montana's kids enrolled in public education qualify for the free or reduced lunch program. Click [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00110Xac-Fbq0153WbOTtk6wg-ZUsgrFCuGUyDSM3iw_jzYh3bsY3Htfb30ICYWx7QSCd1dfka5atD0XEisp-mPtOWAbh1kCABXbFq1SQ5JRsXa4oRogQYzvZp3asysYv2Px4jEFyXb-B2rw6gZnjR5PfkjfrcMREqr6yK28Km7MU2bUeMI3tDZHAU0is-eypzu&c=vgSgzII089CMk7honzLAaREGAunBfxdpHXpWAIu4il7ZdAqis27Z3Q==&ch=xL5eJOvMU8Tu0qH1qlUUf-rY9mRTmwEnGkHl5l_jxnIVIACmGe2qMg==) to learn what schools and what percentage of students in these public schools throughout Montana qualify for free or reduced lunch. The numbers are shocking. These are kids whose families do not earn enough money to afford school lunch for their children.
Congress has now passed the [Keep Kids Fed Act](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00110Xac-Fbq0153WbOTtk6wg-ZUsgrFCuGUyDSM3iw_jzYh3bsY3Htfb30ICYWx7QSvcsAx_xIXhDChMezEktSx8aVd7w_CpAlrrYkTxIlcRVbva8CLG_Eq76PLFQub5GulaqxuwytwFI7Md7eZ_PCVakqTiu0-eae46SAPkBkIeCfac1OL8vyJRuSA_xswXZqMPFyXqQ8fMfkzTaXKVvZFs_ikpG9s2ulnSsn7QcSz_HmurHsB0Y19IIcSiYn5pAI&c=vgSgzII089CMk7honzLAaREGAunBfxdpHXpWAIu4il7ZdAqis27Z3Q==&ch=xL5eJOvMU8Tu0qH1qlUUf-rY9mRTmwEnGkHl5l_jxnIVIACmGe2qMg==) to extend free school meals through September 30, and some school meal waivers through the 2022-2023 school year. All 100 Senators agreed to pass the legislation. In the House, 42 members voted against the legislation, including Montana's Representative Matt Rosendale.
Matt Rosendale voted AGAINST resources that help to feed Montana's kids.
Many of these kids live in rural counties where their families are farmers and ranchers or work on family farms and ranches.
He voted AGAINST helping to feed America's hungry children.
This is unfathomable and unacceptable.
Please, help us get him out of office and put Penny, a proven champion FOR Montana's kids, into office.
PLEASE DONATE $3, $5, $10 or More TODAY!
---
---
| |
---
| Donate TODAY!
You can donate online here or by sending a check to: Penny Ronning for U.S. Congress PO Box 22445 Billings, MT 59104
---

| Representation matters and it's time to put a results driven leader in Congress for all Montanans.

name: Ryan D. Kelley
subject: Roe V. Wade is Dead - Now What?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHIGAN FOR RYAN D
body:
I will fight to make Michigan a pro-life state!
| | | |
---
| | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OWQOcQVDS0wqSkud33vMHR7OgO9DPuyO_Ho-8cHXV8zh_uzc5wRJ8RzroSzapcK0OKN7Hb8THvU_vytxua13JwtLoay4gsucjPJ70oKQNlimmi9fQF35ZZwpaHsbt-NX_Pgtt6sp3NhGv4kky6w3fxVWK5N5CPEYtuQn7OTDDTvOPUD4gNw7UgR4LCt9WtKFwUJBrNOREQlYdQF68fDQ-g==&c=bvJRwF1xgk9u3WtVb3ZgPxR8qYUu7Re0wN5en10ohP-DIEQxCog2-g==&ch=Wl5f9pLT9MbAjbYs1cHK6RPaL21GXA925BJ5apTOoCSPXbbpQRMZ3Q==)
---
With the Supreme Court's decision on Dobbs v. Jackson, the Supreme Court overturned 50 years of Federal abortion rights.
Millions of unborn babies have been given the gift of life!
Justice Alito, in his opinion, says that:
---
---
Federal abortion rights were never constitutional.
Now that Roe v. Wade has been overturned, each state gets to decide whether to allow the heinous act of ending the life of a precious, vulnerable human being.
I want you to know that I am unequivocally pro-life!
---
---
Everyone is endowed with life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, including the unborn.
The fight is just beginning. Now, it is time to work on making Michigan a pro-life state.
As governor, I will work with the legislature and pro-life Michiganians to implement life-affirming policies, so that women do not see abortion as their only recourse.
I will fight until we remove this scourge of abortion from the State of Michigan.
Will it be easy? No.
Pro-aborts will come after you for your pro-life beliefs. They will riot, censor, dox and otherwise threaten you.
They will rage against the dying of this evil, but they have already lost, and they know it.
We may lose some battles, but in the end, we will win the war.
God bless the unborn and God bless the brave Justices of the Supreme Court!

---
| [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OWQOcQVDS0wqSkud33vMHR7OgO9DPuyO_Ho-8cHXV8zh_uzc5wRJ8RzroSzapcK0OKN7Hb8THvU_vytxua13JwtLoay4gsucjPJ70oKQNlimmi9fQF35ZZwpaHsbt-NX_Pgtt6sp3NhGv4kky6w3fxVWK5N5CPEYtuQn7OTDDTvOPUD4gNw7UgR4LCt9WtKFwUJBrNOREQlYdQF68fDQ-g==&c=bvJRwF1xgk9u3WtVb3ZgPxR8qYUu7Re0wN5en10ohP-DIEQxCog2-g==&ch=Wl5f9pLT9MbAjbYs1cHK6RPaL21GXA925BJ5apTOoCSPXbbpQRMZ3Q==)

To liberty!

Ryan D. Kelley Candidate for Michigan Governor

name: Liam J. Watson
subject: New Deputy Digital Director Hired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Re-engaging with rural voters and finding every Virginian’s voice!

|
---
Hey Derek, My name is Liam Watson, and I’m the new Deputy Digital Director for the Democratic Party of Virginia. I’ve spent my life working in Southwest Virginia, championing Democratic policies in the most rural parts of our Commonwealth, even serving as the Democratic Committee Chairman of Montgomery County. That’s why I’m so excited to be joining the DPVA team in this new role! It’s my hope that we’ll be able to work with our rural stakeholders to re-engage rural Democrats, and bring those countryside voices into our statewide plan. I’m writing to you today with two goals – to introduce myself to you, inviting you to reach out if you ever need anything from your statewide Democratic Party. **[AND, to ask you to chip in whatever you can to help support our renewed outreach to the rural parts of our wonderful Commonwealth.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47441935/354302403/1963706474?refcode=dpva-em-220705-liam&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGFjMjQzNi1iNmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8L45PlKxYp3m1lu1yrWwpg-Gu0CZST_xMa_vdw_wnGc=)** We can retake the Governorship and the State House, but only if we make sure the voices of all Virginians are heard! **[Can I count on you to support our rural Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47441938/354302406/1963706474?refcode=dpva-em-220705-liam&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGFjMjQzNi1iNmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8L45PlKxYp3m1lu1yrWwpg-Gu0CZST_xMa_vdw_wnGc=)** I’m looking forward to continuing to serve you all in this new role,
Liam J. subject: Do you even care?

body:

Fellow American,

**WE’VE GOT ONE QUESTION FOR YOU: ARE YOU WATCHING THE JANUARY 6TH COMMITTEE HEARINGS?**

**Democrats seem to think that they can use Mr. Trump as a “boogeyman” once again – as they did in 2018 and 2020..**

**Are the public hearings going to have an impact on the way you vote in November’s midterms? If yes, we’d like to know, why. If no, we’d like to know, why?**

**This poll will expire at midnight tonight. We are asking for your participation for research purposes and kindly request a response by that time.**

Hello,
**The day after 19 students and 2 teachers were murdered in Uvalde, Texas, Chuck Grassley started running a new ad across Iowa touting his NRA endorsement.**
I guess it wasn’t enough for Chuck to take hundreds of thousands of dollars in blood money. Or to be named Legislator of the Year by the literal gun lobby in April.
Instead, right after another shooting, Chuck Grassley blocked a bill requiring universal background checks, trumpeted his highly-coveted NRA endorsement, and then voted against a bipartisan gun bill that even Mitch McConnell supported.
Is Grassley tone deaf or just unmoved by carnage? Either way, I’m going to beat him this November and finally end his 47-year career in Washington.
I’ll never take money from the NRA. And I certainly won’t take their endorsement. But if I’m going to go up against all their money and win, I need grassroots donors like you behind me every step of the way.
**I’m facing a critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and right now we’re still dangerously short of our $25,000 goal and what we need to win. If I’m going to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I’m counting on you to give right now:**

subject: YOU’RE INVITED: Volunteer Kickoff call tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47442632/354304677/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220605_ev_em_vkc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGU5NGZmMi1iN2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YULCFv7Gs5SeOHfiwmJWapLJP--l0uqRRR7BGo2EYM0=)
---
Team,

I am excited to invite you to our **_[Volunteer Kickoff call tomorrow at 6 PM.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47442633/354304678/-1133823439?refcode=20220605_ev_em_vkc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGU5NGZmMi1iN2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YULCFv7Gs5SeOHfiwmJWapLJP--l0uqRRR7BGo2EYM0=&emci=440d9e38-b5fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0e94ff2-b7fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**

The last few months have made the stakes of this election painfully clear. Every day, we’re seeing how important it is to have principled, empathetic leaders in office.

Fortunately, I’ve been hearing from Floridians across the state who support our efforts and want to know how they can help. We can win this election and restore decency to Florida politics. But first we need you to get involved, friend.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47442634/354304679/-1133823439?refcode=20220605_ev_em_vkc&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGU5NGZmMi1iN2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YULCFv7Gs5SeOHfiwmJWapLJP--l0uqRRR7BGo2EYM0=&emci=440d9e38-b5fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0e94ff2-b7fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)
Tomorrow’s call is an opportunity to join our growing movement of volunteers from across Florida to get organized and energized as we head into the most critical period of this election. I hope I’ll see you there too.

name: Melanie =?utf-8?b?ROKAmUFycmlnbw==?=
subject: Republicans sold us out.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists)
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47442749/354305308/-1051679664?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220705gunreform_md_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjY0MTRmOS1iOWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWV2XsbCoJCD6_d03HgbmPZFlUlD3mTpdJpFMrA2xuo=)
---
Peter Willis,
In 185 days this year, there have been 313 mass shootings and 22,418 deaths from gun violence, including the mass shooting at a July 4th parade in Highland Park, Illinois.
Why?
Because Republicans in Congress care more about cold hard cash from gun lobbyists and appeasing extremists than keeping our communities and families safe from gun violence.
_**They sold us out. Now, we must demand bold change.**_
**[Common sense gun laws are necessary, popular, and will save lives. Add your name alongside mine to demand Congress pass them NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47442750/354305309/-850607869?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220705gunreform_md_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjY0MTRmOS1iOWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWV2XsbCoJCD6_d03HgbmPZFlUlD3mTpdJpFMrA2xuo=&emci=537df4f1-b9fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=766414f9-b9fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9388410)**
In New York, we have the 2nd lowest rate of gun deaths in the United States. It’s no coincidence that we also have some of the strongest gun reform laws in the country.
But here’s the bad news, Peter Willis. Now they’re coming for our protections.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47442751/354305310/-850607869?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220705gunreform_md_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85OTk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjY0MTRmOS1iOWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AWV2XsbCoJCD6_d03HgbmPZFlUlD3mTpdJpFMrA2xuo=&emci=537df4f1-b9fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=766414f9-b9fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9388410)
---
This is a victory for the NRA and gun lobbyists, and a massive loss for our public safety and ability to protect our communities from mass shootings and gun violence like we witnessed yesterday.
**We need national gun safety reform like universal background checks, red flag laws, an assault weapons and ghost guns ban, national licensing, safe storage laws, and more safety training.**
When we win this race for NY-03, I will fight to pass these commonsense reforms to save lives from gun violence, but we can’t wait until then. We need Congress to act NOW.

clean_body: | | = Peter Willis, In 185 days this year, there have been 313 mass shootings and 22,418 deaths from gun violence, including the mass shooting at a July 4th parade in Highland Park, Illinois. Why? Because Republicans in Congress care more about cold hard cash from gun lobbyists and appeasing extremists than keeping our communities and families safe from gun violence. They sold us out. Now, we must demand bold change. In New York, we have the 2nd lowest rate of gun deaths in the United States. It’s no coincidence that we also have some of the strongest gun reform laws in the country. But here’s the bad news, Peter Willis. Now they’re coming for our protections. This is a victory for the NRA and gun lobbyists, and a massive loss for our public safety and ability to protect our communities from mass shootings and gun violence like we witnessed yesterday. We need national gun safety reform like universal background checks, red flag laws, an assault weapons and ghost guns ban, national licensing, safe storage laws, and more safety training. When we win this race for NY-03, I will fight to pass these commonsense reforms to save lives from gun violence, but we can’t wait until then. We need Congress to act NOW. We are not truly free until our government does what it takes to save lives from gun violence. — Melanie D’Arrigo | Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd Congressional District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. = | = | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. name: Donna F. Edwards
subject: Fwd: We must do more, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Congress
body:
Yesterday, children and families who were just enjoying a Fourth of July parade were gunned down by a young man with an assault weapon. Congress needs to take substantial action to address the epidemic of gun violence
Peter, it pains me to write this, _but here we are again. _
Yesterday, children and families who were just enjoying a Fourth of July parade were gunned down by a young man with an assault weapon.
Congress needs to take substantial action to address the epidemic of gun violence our country is facing. The recently passed bipartisan gun reform bill was a good start _but we still have more work to do._ **It’s time to ban assault weapons and high-capacity magazines. **
**[Will you add your name to my petition calling on Congress to ban assault weapons today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47442918/354305883/-1744772930?contactdata=SM%2FN4y3cJQzWGay3SSuVQPGeBm%2B5ahqZhJ3kkuLRLuAxZsO7pendfZ9gn6p3pTqhXkkBgMV5V6vNGQZzTbjn5f5lCg8ChAdLajRlQCgW0%2FJSP%2BEiBjlu2OTE7vcaBg44&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjg4YzRhYS1iYWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1xf3XxCbdx5catcs5AKhe7yVeqPsks6zw5ZtIA83PA=&emci=d8d5c9a4-b7fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=1688c4aa-bafc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14034724)**
Together, we can work to end gun violence in our country.
Donna

_\----- Begin Forwarded Message -----_

Peter,
My heart aches for Uvalde. It aches for the children, for their families, for their community. It aches for our country, for allowing such tragedy to continue to repeat itself.
**Today we mourn, we cry, we rest, we hug our loved ones tight. Tomorrow, we fight. We fight like our lives depend on it. Like our children’s lives depend on it — _because they do._**
Too many politicians are beholden to the gun lobby and have been for far too long. They pay lip service in the face of these tragedies but never follow through with action.
Enough is enough.
**I will do everything in my power to stop our country’s gun violence epidemic** — starting with restoring the Domestic Violence Offender Gun Ban, enforcing more rigorous background checks, implementing an assault weapons ban, and banning high-capacity magazines.
And in those moments when I may get tired or discouraged, I will remember the children of Uvalde, of Marjory Stoneman Douglas, of Santa Fe, of Sandy Hook, and every child caught in the crossfire in our communities every day.
**And then I will remember that giving up isn’t an option. Failure isn’t an option.**
_So today, we mourn. But tomorrow, we fight._
May the children of Uvalde rest in peace while we rise in action.
\- Donna
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47442919/354305884/-599895086?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTE2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjg4YzRhYS1iYWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1xf3XxCbdx5catcs5AKhe7yVeqPsks6zw5ZtIA83PA=&emci=d8d5c9a4-b7fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=1688c4aa-bafc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=14034724)
Donna Edwards for Congress
PO Box 442157
Fort Washington, MD 20749
United States
Paid for by Donna Edwards for Congress

If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/DfTD4Y-YGEOuTKtnzXgPsA2?unsubscribedata=p5DWAn41owNqjlPDHDtO8dGvlkfs7q3BRMgffzvIMxbW3K7q6dGVTo9v8O8Y9bJf7DpqZJoQqfqsqGOQyAa1NTldnZwF5ZPtizERsyFvtKVhGrnqiLYR%2FQBRrm6wMTzX%2Fa2Lo9FJBO0ThyeUdyFHuSZ91HR3FJlBO9iBH5RRPOxmqE4mPkfC%2FkuJhTbiVxjxlF1mLVXhtMr%2FLSRMxw1Q%2B12rDavq4S2%2Fw6eJOtVQV0jPZC%2F7uF0qkYGF%2BSL7ODKserxIYYz1MDeUIFYUwqYGlJbJ0ioi5%2FOGjR6gt%2FokSXBt13bFUkGFI1eV2LSbsvE4aOHW4SvuxG1HNE5R2Ec73sr%2FXVEhWYgn%2B4qVtadxZDaDprpITs%2FPBDJXNIePemzM7VL%2FXAoRWB7kCDdAUnhlX4wJtVlikzb%2F0kp1YDFWpNSNqsFExBWvA4TXI%2Fl958M8)

[The 4th of July should be a time to reflect on the unique, inspired founding of our nation.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=50f53d41ae714d34a759bc89aecf22d6&_e=dOcG2zkp1R5BH1g47JxGSs7rJsw-WPL2chbstlyUK4ZloShBDrzgrrpUNZ7qSxdAMJNgw_3T1yS_q4gD_VRP8XkrgPT6_dDNRFYSyDNiOhBzxH7ffAOyWpuqKJA9PispU4zlZLfW5BonLF8XnHjMh02gFxJ1Iky9W5oACsAlOTosOur2sa-FD1kxAB6SzRXefGN1XWyu9pDn2fvY3cSKB7z8fvILSiXHAuqYj_JFNTwy6T66hQpWkwbEWkgWIALNzGhAFwblV5JEXuwofbQ2JAVrqPr-S5OBbjWgJsgPS-JfSSd1yh7RMRGZrBbRXY-jpiB6sud55x8c4fiG0VQ3DuiHUPAMXCr7U0pqeg51fjq0jt0ULNFWhVPI-d71lbigqJ2z_k-ukcmhmFuQqavRWIqwqlIjG_mRNTkIeZfeRwn22vNYLdsfg1DSxyLQ2FwO) [_**Instead of celebrating our nation, Democrats showed their true colors.**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=50f53d41ae714d34a759bc89aecf22d6&_e=dOcG2zkp1R5BH1g47JxGSs7rJsw-WPL2chbstlyUK4ZloShBDrzgrrpUNZ7qSxdAMJNgw_3T1yS_q4gD_VRP8XkrgPT6_dDNRFYSyDNiOhBzxH7ffAOyWpuqKJA9PispU4zlZLfW5BonLF8XnHjMh02gFxJ1Iky9W5oACsAlOTosOur2sa-FD1kxAB6SzRXefGN1XWyu9pDn2fvY3cSKB-6c5JNJlQLL9XTnGRScErZ9rJscy0dqtzxamQLVGDtSJUPWkpYZ4Ha2GqiOHGQfe20WUwiRkG5xVyJ21N_mm-gim4TFxcK6oKc5srWmifDjrJxS5OSFLGsb4g-Imi_AgUstqmUDKeOEoD2825zBRoJaNceABuaeyobj8OtGc6EumiWtffUZ3JqZ8pSmxnTT-PCSfjWdRHMZBemrJDQBtYKhZ4mEd6vGT_ohawZsnZx-) Democrats are trying to rewrite our uniquely inspired history and trade it out for a false, anti-American narrative. And it's not even the radical fringes — the Democrat nominee for Senate in Wisconsin said, "_The founding of this nation?__ __Awful!_ " This is what we are up against. It's no longer just left vs. right, it's Anti-America vs. Pro-America. [_**Last year I introduced legislation, the "Love America Act," to ensure the next generation of students reads America's foundational documents, to learn just how special America's founding really was!**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=50f53d41ae714d34a759bc89aecf22d6&_e=dOcG2zkp1R5BH1g47JxGSs7rJsw-WPL2chbstlyUK4ZloShBDrzgrrpUNZ7qSxdAMJNgw_3T1yS_q4gD_VRP8XkrgPT6_dDNRFYSyDNiOhBzxH7ffAOyWpuqKJA9PispU4zlZLfW5BonLF8XnHjMh02gFxJ1Iky9W5oACsAlOTosOur2sa-FD1kxAB6SzRXefGN1XWyu9pDn2fvY3cSKB1NpHOCodHAJdg0mKinr92HcECyju55_UWoRQ2f2tBCL8BWETVO5Y_ckB30Z31Sj080CqcGoPTlA3S6Tpo0HOHqK_SrsCv76I8cxx9DjEpKp-YXA8FfQgLoP9oi6RRKKCcmZWYOtu35CnIyEr8J_cHwUsHGxko9eog959ElTeU-IQ1IXeJZCKcQL1NE7o6v_acr0ZIfe_nhC2fpIxWNJO2rm2oMTxOdikOZhjs9UAmdK) **[I talked to Tucker Carlson when I first introduced the "Love America Act," and our conversation is even more relevant today! Hi Peter,

Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich here. I’m
reaching out to you on behalf of my friend Kevin Hern.

Kevin is the
Budget and Spending Task Chairman on the Republican Study Committee
(RSC) in the U.S. House of Representatives. And he’s leading the charge
to reduce wasteful big government spending in Congress.

Kevin and
his RSC colleagues just released the Blueprint to Save America, an
alternative, conservative budget that would balance the federal budget
in seven years.

When I was Speaker of the House, we balanced the
budget for four straight years. And I passionately believe that
reigning in reckless government spending is the ONLY way to help
America recover from Biden’s inflation crisis.

body:
The Republican party has been scheming this takeover for decades. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443071/354306581/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ6N_SCO_E_20220705_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRlM2U1Ny1iY2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG8F6klqqlC5ZoT-EGBJWDli4TIy28iBqgY21iLwIZE=&emci=b7a64351-bcfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=d24e3e57-bcfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
This extremist Supreme Court has a legitimacy crisis on their hands. We’ve reached a point where the Court has been hijacked by right-wing extremists and they are imposing their deeply unpopular views upon the rest of our country — from overturning Roe v. Wade and loosening gun safety restrictions to reversing environmental protections. And the Republican party has been scheming this takeover for decades — yes, Mitch McConnell, I’m looking at you. But an out-of-touch, out-of-control Court doesn’t get the last word. We the people do. Congress has an obligation to step in to protect our democracy from this rogue Court. And I’m going to keep speaking out on the big-idea, bold measures we need to take to stop this injustice — like expanding the Supreme Court to rebalance it, ending the filibuster to codify Roe, and fixing the Electoral College. At the same time, we’ve also got to build stronger majorities up and down the ballot so that we can defend abortion rights, and so our democracy actually reflects the will of the people. **If you’re angry like I am that the Supreme Court has gotten this far out of sync with American values, own your anger. Take a moment to sit with it. Then square your shoulders and channel it into determination.** [_**If you’re able to, please chip in any amount to fuel our campaign and build our movement to elect pro-democracy and pro-abortion rights candidates up and down the ballot — and you’ll receive a free “Angry and Determined” sticker.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443072/354306582/432753293?refcode=EMZ6N_SCO_E_20220705_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRlM2U1Ny1iY2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG8F6klqqlC5ZoT-EGBJWDli4TIy28iBqgY21iLwIZE=) _[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443073/354306583/432753293?refcode=EMZ6N_SCO_E_20220705_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjRlM2U1Ny1iY2ZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tG8F6klqqlC5ZoT-EGBJWDli4TIy28iBqgY21iLwIZE=)_ | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

clean_body: The Republican party has been scheming this takeover for decades. | | | This extremist Supreme Court has a legitimacy crisis on their hands. We’ve reached a point where the Court has been hijacked by right-wing extremists and they are imposing their deeply unpopular views upon the rest of our country — from overturning Roe v. Wade and loosening gun safety restrictions to reversing environmental protections. And the Republican party has been scheming this takeover for decades — yes, Mitch McConnell, I’m looking at you. But an out-of-touch, out-of-control Court doesn’t get the last word. We the people do. Congress has an obligation to step in to protect our democracy from this rogue Court. And I’m going to keep speaking out on the big-idea, bold measures we need to take to stop this injustice — like expanding the Supreme Court to rebalance it, ending the filibuster to codify Roe, and fixing the Electoral College. At the same time, we’ve also got to build stronger majorities up and down the ballot so that we can defend abortion rights, and so our democracy actually reflects the will of the people. If you’re angry like I am that the Supreme Court has gotten this far out of sync with American values, own your anger. Take a moment to sit with it. Then square your shoulders and channel it into determination. = = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: WI Senate Alerts
subject: AOC-Backed Senate Candidate:America’s Founding Was “Awful”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
They want to cancel America

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_awful_1&n=1)
---
Friend -- As Wisconsinites rang in Independence Day this weekend, Democrats were saying the quiet part out loud – they think America is “awful.” WISN’s Dan O’Donnell first [**reported**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=nV7BfVKeJi0zWKBWeoL2El5uI2cTAgHpDbS6q5lUu-vebymCRBYrWeyRpIyl2wezzjuraovZhQuJtROaiq5mnnbquol5I742NKaphmvi_a-6k5sUZish9kcJkDo_C6V819qjTUcYEA8gcJ1O6ypa7zMF3fOW55w_nJbMrodXd-5HZK8h8y1YuDEFaqyYNWvmrBUM82CWVhm-cErIuc3fvQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_awful_1&n=2) that at an event last year, AOC-endorsed Senate candidate **Mandela Barnes said that when America was founded, “things were bad. Things were terrible. The founding of this nation? Awful!"** Friend, we know that our elected officials need to DEFEND America, not CANCEL it – but this is today’s Democrat Party.**Democrats like AOC and Mandela Barnes are ashamed to be Americans, which is why they want to dismantle our institutions by packing the Supreme Court, defunding the police, and forcing their woke CRT agenda into our schools.** [****](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7KhgymeBWCJ5z6VS6DGe2fKn3U2h82F-h_tA1hHz0Mvhv2TFPJRL_wrOsiA7QC3uvVSjoqv5xSRDA4LUEedARrKDoyjGSdcI9kSapcOjXwS8IPbSav6IFGgkZ3jVzcBrVA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_awful_1&n=3)[**Can you chip in $10, $25, or even $50 to help us elect Republicans who will stand up for America?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVMeqRNkLZ2CXWGQCBp4M66UvxKXsR_VHNq2FiB_do5IY&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barnes_awful_1&n=4) Make no mistake – socialists like AOC are propping up candidates who will join The Squad in Congress. They’ve already poured millions of dollars into our state, and we need to fight back. We can’t believe that there may be candidates on the November ballot who openly detest the founding of America – but that’s the reality we’re facing in 2022. **Now more than ever, we need your support. name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Weekly Update - 18 weeks to election day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220705wu?refcode=lpfe220705wu_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220705wu?refcode=lpfe220705wu_nd]
We hope you had a safe and happy holiday weekend.
Lizzie and the team were excited to celebrate Independence Day with friends, neighbors, and community leaders at events across TX-07. It was a good day to reconnect with constituents and democratic organizations that are working to ensure liberty, equality, and independence for all, especially at this challenging time.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220705wu?refcode=lpfe220705wu_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220705wu?refcode=lpfe220705wu_nd]
It was only after returning from these celebrations that we learned about the horrific shooting in Highland Park, Illinois. All of our hearts are broken, again, as we see this attack on Americans at a community gathering to celebrate the Fourth of July. As we continue to learn about the shooting, we are compelled to continue our work together to end gun violence.
We’ve known for a long time that more must be done to address gun violence. And we are glad to report that Lizzie voted for our country’s first gun-safety laws in decades, and President Biden signed them into law. This was an important step, but Lizzie is committed to doing more – including supporting a ban on assault weapons. We will continue our work in honor of these victims, and of the many more who have died this year alone from gun violence.
Another important aspect of our work is fighting for policies that lift up women, close gaps in pay and opportunity, and ensure access to reproductive care. We’re proud to tell you that the National Organization for Women’s PAC has recognized Lizzie’s long track record as a champion for women and endorsed her for re-election.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220705wu?refcode=lpfe220705wu_nd [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220705wu?refcode=lpfe220705wu_nd]
After the Supreme Court’s decisions overturning Roe and blocking gun-safety measures, it’s clear we need to elect leaders at every level who will do what’s right for Texas and our country — leaders like Lizzie.
We can’t do that without people like you getting involved, and that’s why we’re so grateful to have you on the team.
Your support helps us run a strong campaign that can send Lizzie back to the House so she can continue fighting for our values.
Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220705wu?refcode=lpfe220705wu_nd]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Dominic?=
subject: Celebrating America 🎇
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dominic for CT, Loretta Chory, Treasurer
body:
Embodying the Spirit of 1776 in 2022

View this email in your browser (https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=c61bcacb52)
https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=ec19de9d92&e=8763c56857

** Celebrating America!
------------------------------------------------------------
https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=855cd28851&e=8763c56857

My fellow Americans,

While he was strengthening New York City’s defenses against an imminent attack by the British Army, Gen. George Washington received the welcome news about the signing of the Declaration of Independence: the struggle was no longer for the sole defense of the colonies, but for the birth of a new nation.

On July 9, he ordered the Declaration be read aloud to the Continental Army, who enthusiastically rejoiced at the words of “life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness.” Yet, in the uproarious frenzy that followed, soldiers sprinted down Broadway to topple a statue of King George III at Bowling Green. The act of vandalism appalled Washington, who reproached his men — this revolution, to him, would duly respect property and be orderly. He believed the American Revolution should strive for higher ideals, rather than disintegrate into an uncontrolled riot.

Washington knew then that he and his men — now beyond the point of no return — would be the symbols of the new nation. Their fortitude, character, and sacrifice would mold the fledgling country and countrymen, and serve as examples to subsequent generations.

This foresight by Washington, and the Founding Fathers, might lead one to believe this nation is divinely exceptional or providential. And perhaps it is. But throughout the course of history, we, as a people, are given the free will to reduce ourselves to the most loathsome, uncharitable characteristics of humanity — or to chase our better angels, courageously standing and fighting for principles and goodness even in the face of immense opposition.

Those men and women in 1776 chose the latter and believed a better nation could be founded. And indeed, they were successful, but for how long? The words of the Declaration bear no weight if we — as inheritors of the revolution — withhold our faith in them, and our republic has no power if we forget the sacrifices of those sons and daughters of liberty.

We are not unlike those soldiers of the Continental Army. We are, and will be, the symbols to the next generation, and our actions will reverberate further into history than possibly imaginable. Do not lose faith in the words of the Declaration and in your fellow Americans. Celebrate the good we’ve been exceptionally blessed with as we continue embodying the spirit of 1776.

I hope you have a wonderful holiday. God bless you, God bless America.
Dominic Rapini

Dominic Rapini

Republican Candidate for Secretary of the State
Learn More about Dominic (https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=21cb5c0577&e=8763c56857)
https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=175cbd9583&e=8763c56857 https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=90dc6e6e1d&e=8763c56857

name: Max Steiner
subject: Here's how I spent the weekend.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443168/354307321/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzhkNDMwOC1iZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCqxLvN9QFeoWeyKIvDm_vmMKVgWR9Ioi3LqkxhVtaA=)
Friend,

I hope everyone had a great 4th of July. America is worth celebrating, and worth fighting for.

I spent the weekend in Mt. Shasta (blue) and Alturas (very red) talking to voters. Nothing is more patriotic than voting -- and celebrating the overthrow of British rule 246 years ago is a good analogy for voting out an unpopular incumbent.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443169/354307322/-1683214623?refcode=em-7.5.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzhkNDMwOC1iZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCqxLvN9QFeoWeyKIvDm_vmMKVgWR9Ioi3LqkxhVtaA=)
Make no mistake, Doug LaMalfa is unpopular. Even the Republicans think that he has been in office too long and that he makes too much money off government agriculture checks.

But, July 4th aside, the point of this email actually comes about because I took part in two parades this weekend: the Fandango Day Parade (on Saturday) and the Mt Shasta Fourth of July Parade (on Monday). I don't like parades as much as I like actually talking to voters - but they're a traditional aspect of American campaigning. The Alturas Parade had about 1,000 spectators and the Mt. Shasta Parade had many times that.

It made the (near-simultaneous) shooting at the Chicago Parade hit home. Driving to Redding from Mt Shasta, I turned on the radio only to hear of yet another mass shooting - this time in the suburbs of Chicago. Yet again, the perpetrator is a young, white, far-right extremist. Yet again he was armed with a legally-purchased AR-15. Yet again, he had made a series of morbid posts online that clearly pointed to a troubled mental state.

The shooter (who I am not naming on purpose - a practice that I wish the media would follow) had no business owning an AR-15. Sadly, Illinois (like California) already has a "Red Flag Law." The police had the tools to stop him, but not the information. The problem is that no one reported him. If we are going to be a gun-owning country - and I believe the Second Amendment has that intent - then we need to be more willing to report dangerous posts online (red flag laws), gun store owners need to be more discriminating in who they sell weapons to (background checks).

The Biden Administration has just passed the most substantive firearms bill in 30 years. We may be able to build upon that bill in the next Congress - but that means that Democrats need to keep the House and build upon our lead in the Senate. Age restrictions for semi-automatic rifles make sense. Magazine size restrictions (the amount of bullets a shooter can fire before pausing to reload) would **[reduce fatalities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443170/354307323/1439950373?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzhkNDMwOC1iZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCqxLvN9QFeoWeyKIvDm_vmMKVgWR9Ioi3LqkxhVtaA=&emci=ff83644d-b7fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=b78d4308-befc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11663292)**.** ** Common sense solutions like these - that protect the public while protecting the rights of legal gun-owners - have no chance in a Republican Congress that takes its marching orders from the NRA.

Look, I know that most of the readers of these emails want a ban on AR-15's. I don't: sorry. I'm a centrist and a veteran, and I think the Second Amendment is important because I think the Constitution is important. In contrast, LaMalfa only "cares" about the Second Amendment because he gets money from the gun lobby.

I'm pro-2A. LaMalfa is pro-death. That is a difference worth voting for. I hope we can agree on that.

Max
Combat Veteran and Democrat For Congress
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443171/354307324/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzhkNDMwOC1iZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCqxLvN9QFeoWeyKIvDm_vmMKVgWR9Ioi3LqkxhVtaA=)
Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by [making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443172/354307325/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzhkNDMwOC1iZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCqxLvN9QFeoWeyKIvDm_vmMKVgWR9Ioi3LqkxhVtaA=)

If you'd like to receive less email, add your name [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443173/354307326/379103408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzhkNDMwOC1iZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCqxLvN9QFeoWeyKIvDm_vmMKVgWR9Ioi3LqkxhVtaA=&emci=ff83644d-b7fc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=b78d4308-befc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=11663292) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/2o0iQqBmYUu-CYZT5R7gnQ2?unsubscribedata=94xXNM42n1ZrSJvNK5RUM1%2B%2BPvOjXr1zkpyb3%2FDTzewJw1jzdPYjV5DywYHEHXoOl1xaVsqajCdxYuSlOMxW2xvT%2BHTsd3%2FAm7TCqwI4MWAcISDyaPNieuSF4KGkTwRo24yd52ca0dzPn9J9ZqBZQ%2FjhUll4kVEd6Wj5OiLHHw0HtUlUun0xberUqMrD6J3OsC60eC92bLJnLRJT8GdQ2plS1FEeT%2BY9yDaIFcsBo%2BOVy%2Bg2U3Ww%2FngBpuoPDruM%2F9sOC%2F2jJi9%2F1guTKTXb9Q6v%2FiIegUrhSHCaHYgEul0s2HMGBgqCz8uGe7np7Jpl1FQ890LMQbv04KUFp%2FiiTCuOaP1cue%2F7mj%2BVh832Kah0UURxGfI0KpvU2OTgrv4PUTpVeyeSJGY7cAjFBgQrCjs%2BMekJLCoE2qLwE7SbtQMI%2Bc68D3%2F7At9Z8IUYVcxZ).

_Max Steiner is a combat veteran of the Iraq War and Sergeant First Class in the Army Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense._ Max Steiner for Congress
2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370
#194
Chico, CA 95928
United States

Driving to Redding from Mt Shasta, I turned on the radio only to hear of yet another mass shooting - this time in the suburbs of Chicago. Yet again, the perpetrator is a young, white, far-right extremist. Yet again he was armed with a legally-purchased AR-15. Yet again, he had made a series of morbid posts online that clearly pointed to a troubled mental state. The shooter (who I am not naming on purpose - a practice that I wish the media would follow) had no business owning an AR-15. Sadly, Illinois (like California) already has a "Red Flag Law." The police had the tools to stop him, but not the information. The problem is that no one reported him. If we are going to be a gun-owning country - and I believe the Second Amendment has that intent - then we need to be more willing to report dangerous posts online (red flag laws), gun store owners need to be more discriminating in who they sell weapons to (background checks). The Biden Administration has just passed the most substantive firearms bill in 30 years. We may be able to build upon that bill in the next Congress - but that means that Democrats need to keep the House and build upon our lead in the Senate. Age restrictions for semi-automatic rifles make sense. Magazine size restrictions (the amount of bullets a shooter can fire before pausing to reload) would . Common sense solutions like these - that protect the public while protecting the rights of legal gun-owners - have no chance in a Republican Congress that takes its marching orders from the NRA. Look, I know that most of the readers of these emails want a ban on AR-15's. I don't: sorry. I'm a centrist and a veteran, and I think the Second Amendment is important because I think the Constitution is important. In contrast, LaMalfa only "cares" about the Second Amendment because he gets money from the gun lobby. I'm pro-2A. LaMalfa is pro-death. That is a difference worth voting for. I hope we can agree on that. Max Combat Veteran and Democrat For Congress | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = If you'd like to receive less email, add your name We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Max Steiner is a combat veteran of the Iraq War and Sergeant First Class in the Army Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense. Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928 United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.
Hey Fellow American,

I wanted to make a point of personally touching base with you today. I spoke with my team earlier and **_I’m worried_** we’re not going to be able to win back the Senate majority [**without your help.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ede5281c8a5849f999c68e7d5a7c04b7&_e=4W0FZJ_T0_00oEMdJmRdha7WhlVyZN3zI7fOuz-6Di66TNDW4cv7XATNMtOPqd2cIZ6zzQAISgR7yUZTrHjW4T4X-2SG9ecDlVUvlhvLWT6OnX9WlLxkC73NVj8cdQxy74qntqMRGvjY8Qr4bh3biKGKBTiTudIwqFSFXxWUdCTrvh5cotEYFyDtjzqOEF54yXPMMhPlgLDCNwa43rPcq7P4WAmUcPkr_nCt4Gk-V-RbmPNFlEGbGkXHNUPhLWxCKH0Kjij354NhK69blC4miU9prXL1HTprpEdD-h2TBOjz69SE1VVpAuyAEj10WbCAcYLFU8WLBTQQdr_o7STTfgFclwmcVktN-srvG1gDr4m3m8DJNONwvi2oR_Oakje0)

The Democrats are dumping HUNDREDS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS into red states and [**the only way we can win is if you and 250 donors give $5 or $10 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ede5281c8a5849f999c68e7d5a7c04b7&_e=4W0FZJ_T0_00oEMdJmRdha7WhlVyZN3zI7fOuz-6Di66TNDW4cv7XATNMtOPqd2cIZ6zzQAISgR7yUZTrHjW4T4X-2SG9ecDlVUvlhvLWT6OnX9WlLxkC73NVj8cdQxy74qntqMRGvjY8Qr4bh3biGNl2SUYlQeQv9DdpbgakLMnJ8107K7Bw3G1qdcQ65bxXlg-iWTffqTlcL8KxxvtQeSM3KNQssrY4JFkGK3EK1QjdrFClPyhLqZOv293jZHmRVD7H9kfSeIP2JvIZRH1u5Lnqy5tSwVW59OQm_0dURW3JC5VI75DCDbpHh8GvjE41WLpadlTueyx41GeJjxcOPJk_7ihAgoCxMXPittE031kfYESS8cRbBXjlRtuJOlm)

Can you step up and help me and Senator Mike Lee win our races and Save America? We’re counting on hearing from you before time runs out and we fall short.

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ede5281c8a5849f999c68e7d5a7c04b7&_e=4W0FZJ_T0_00oEMdJmRdha7WhlVyZN3zI7fOuz-6Di66TNDW4cv7XATNMtOPqd2cIZ6zzQAISgR7yUZTrHjW4T4X-2SG9ecDlVUvlhvLWT6OnX9WlLxkC73NVj8cdQxy74qntqMRGvjY8Qr4bh3biL9x1akMYHlEByAexSiHBV34QuyXAftA8QOaoZzsyjbkwsepO4AF7Oq5GOJoiTnW9LKW2GBujZwrk4HSNGrMOXMbse_Yxmx1p8C2YnjxNqncWKLcxB467GfER-2boaR7kD3IR96IK01j4jgIkwHwiZYrtfG5yVt0TkOCVFLRL_Es-r_9jOykJqXMJKnCEqmJIpo5eZkZvKMpXGoQARTG5FqrtYke-SNml51ASFZga5lc)
It’s not just me, Fellow American, everyone I’ve been talking to is concerned about this election. It’s going to be close and I’m counting on hearing from every single one of my supporters in order to help push us over the finish line.

But the Democrats are doubling their efforts and dumping MILLIONS into red states.

We cannot take anything for granted and we’re falling short of our midnight goal. [**Will you give $5 or $10 and be one of the 250 donors I need to win?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ede5281c8a5849f999c68e7d5a7c04b7&_e=4W0FZJ_T0_00oEMdJmRdha7WhlVyZN3zI7fOuz-6Di66TNDW4cv7XATNMtOPqd2cIZ6zzQAISgR7yUZTrHjW4T4X-2SG9ecDlVUvlhvLWT6OnX9WlLxkC73NVj8cdQxy74qntqMRGvjY8Qr4bh3biJETjMMVCGbt1hTz-RU6rTXMVeL9vzwo119j-iWMxyPdQFYkZKNsBRDW6ML3MR-7UlDGQPTaMlkqTwu45fJl5Wx4gTq9IxREEhyWt9VE7kxU-740WImqGgvYQuBl19FJPJLAEjxSh4vqpAxIa4-I4QiGD6xbzhOqp5ejMubYZwaWu3wxLOiQjcLYwBX71h-E0uFxnNBF6yvZqamks4yxc38hGkU_Xxo02LOdmC8OODCB)

[**GIVE NOW ⇒**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=ede5281c8a5849f999c68e7d5a7c04b7&_e=4W0FZJ_T0_00oEMdJmRdha7WhlVyZN3zI7fOuz-6Di66TNDW4cv7XATNMtOPqd2cIZ6zzQAISgR7yUZTrHjW4T4X-2SG9ecDlVUvlhvLWT6OnX9WlLxkC73NVj8cdQxy74qntqMRGvjY8Qr4bh3biO5hurVjTQVJJexh92vDi2uikpKwrAitA6iypc55OP2J7QV_O13o7ttWQ3BsgvAknZv3KTRxyW0THQ0JVMaAFDYTGEe1s_KFlnBiWMItGNyo_ro6WrhNmhQsFYs7G4Lxw27iUkPiYgUfwgvJRhwsfAsx-nbTRlmot0crBMWqFfX9ggHYQ5L8tK4mCzkXiokkTXAoWdtAL_jQD7sWToJ8uDRae6KHyUKud0CU6vlIDkTS)

name: American Defense News
subject: America's Enemies Enter Our Backyard
body:
American Defense News And Yes, Communist China is Planning to Take
Over the Moon – And We May Need to Fight for It

name: Team Matt and Cynthia for RI via ActionNetwork.org
subject: Our very first Weekend of Action!
body:
We have 9 days to collect thousands of signatures from Rhode Island voters to ensure that Matt and Cynthia make it onto the ballot so that we can vote for them in the Democratic Primary on September 13th. | | | Friend, We're about to enter a HUGE push for our campaign. We have 9 days to collect thousands of signatures from Rhode Island voters to ensure that Matt and Cynthia make it onto the ballot so that we can vote for them in the Democratic Primary on September 13th. But we've always said that this is more than a campaign for governor or lieutenant governor, it's a movement to elect a _whole new government_. We need to get Matt and Cynthia on the ballot, but we can't stop there. We need to make sure the dozens of progressive candidates running across the state make the ballot as well.

###
### That's why we're announcing our first Weekend of Action this [Saturday (7/9) in Providence](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkvb2OBFSCIEAqTl9CQOLYYOnLqy0YDI1lJZ5d_4iCuh9gFCb7tzoUpvgrlUNkkrYePPfOUNGKqtza0CQU2CSe-TIZ-U67A5pBQtf9oz1tooFn-rcfCmO8gz6VbDlsLO6K7CwIWkG-yIFdL05LnnDYnoAkWdzO6bwDVpfhh_zu9uADPZoU7lTniud4-UEGai3ORoib1WvSGQ9fG8L1IbxtfWf0Gz2b3BXoJa7KSEzn8sam058jN3T7Y6gLegwZTtPs3ZYZqlanGv08qnCHa-e6a-t4osXH0FMPHRNCulJ7Zh25M3L7WJSEK5OsWxPE_1Fc/3nh/8myWc-R7S6mXsBNdnY1PnA/h0/TEZh8quxyiRBen3ga4_0lMgxLKmeHeBn1TDeLoRHHlw) and [Sunday (7/10) in Warwick.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkvb2OBFSCIEAqTl9CQOLYYOnLqy0YDI1lJZ5d_4iCuh9gFCb7tzoUpvgrlUNkkrYdH1Xlk---yYH166MHcI_pj05WzW7BZ9pWqLuenA5AOoIXaeC1dQQDqgiPzsvUz5KUpumRFD_CbhfNQta-bXH6jezKWLtPzcUVlmyGPETN898s-m32OsQDSnmDWG63XQuxvxme-p19WObwyTMtz4LmasMD4hlp7iUrVaJB_Djw0lTFYM5Y6qIgrWIH3vZUhGZpl4p-iFkXnuYXIJALYTA6V7HGpzxc_ysOx7ZCXlf0duW0yfwvHZ_ITKAYIRG_j1gc/3nh/8myWc-R7S6mXsBNdnY1PnA/h1/EYBZmEFrocnEHEvVpsdJjcAV8_5NcmLp6RiUTTnDqAA)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mayor=20Neil?=
subject: My Endorsement: I’ve known Ben for 14 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
body:
This is a man we need in Congress | | | |
---
|
---
| | | **Dear Peter,**

Every so often in our democracy, we have an opportunity to vote for a true public servant. Someone who places the mission of public service before their own interests or financial gain.

In this primary election, I’m proud to say, we have such an opportunity. I’m even more proud to tell you that the candidate is my dear friend of 14 years, Ben Smilowitz. [In addition to asking for your vote](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=e678004cf3&e=0faa9de128)[, I'm writing to ask that you join me in making a donation to Ben's campaign](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=b8e065e662&e=0faa9de128)[.](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=69b5a580ae&e=0faa9de128)

Ben and I started working together when I was working at Telecommunications for the Deaf and Hard of Hearing, Inc. (TDI). Ben was specifically focused on the failure of many organizations in emergency management and preparedness to ensure Deaf/hard of hearing/DeafBlind people, as well as people with other disabilities, were not left behind when a disaster strikes.

His goal, as it has been throughout his professional life, is to demand and ensure accountability, and to insist that everyone gets a seat at the table.

Throughout my career, from my time as a firefighter to currently serving as the first Deaf person elected as mayor of a municipality in the United States, I can tell you that Ben Smilowitz is a rare public servant – selfless and devoted to people. I encourage you to learn more about his campaign, and to cast your vote for Ben in Maryland’s primary election.

I’d also like to ask you to join me in supporting Ben’s grassroots campaign. He’s running against an entrenched incumbent, David Trone, with a massive campaign warchest and a record of looking out for himself (and some right wing Republicans!) [Can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or $100 to my friend Ben’s campaign right now? Click this link to give!](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=12400f1bda&e=0faa9de128)

Thank you for your support. Now go vote!

Sincerely,

Neil McDevitt
Mayor, North Wales Borough (PA)

PS: I lost my first race for mayor by only FIVE votes. Let’s not let that happen to Ben.Today: Will you tell 10 friends to vote for Ben? Forward this email and spread the word. On the night of July 19, let’s not wish we had done just a little more to help Ben win this primary.
---
| | | | Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
---
| **Our mailing address is:**
Ben Smilowitz for CongressPO Box 275Gaithersburg, MD 20884-0275
[Add us to your address book](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=294839b504) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=67b0595157&e=0faa9de128&c=294839b504).

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20Thelander=20for=20Congress?=
subject: THELANDER RUNNING BY SWIMMING FOR CONGRESS
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
In what may be first in American politics, Thelander was “swimming for Congress”, in contrast to the more traditional concept of running for Congress. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/thelanderforcongress/running-by-swimming-for-congress?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=fe29b480b8&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
|
---
| |
#
>
> **_ED THELANDER IS RUNNING BY SWIMMING FOR CONGRESS_**
> On Sunday, July 3rd, Republican candidate for Maine’s 1st Congressional District Ed Thelander brought his unique experience as a 21-year veteran of the Navy SEAL Teams to the campaign trail. In what may be a first in American politics, Thelander was “swimming for Congress”, in contrast to the more traditional concept of running for Congress.
>
> At a fundraising concert held for the Maine Lobstermen’s Association on the wharf on Chebeague Island, Thelander swam among the boats anchored offshore to listen to the music, support the MLA, and enjoy a beautiful day on the coast of Maine.
>
> Brogan Teel, candidate for Maine Senate District 23, who accompanied Ed on the water, said of the effort, “Ed took campaigning to a whole new level and actually swam from boat to boat talking to everyone. If that doesn't SEAL the Deal for our District 1 voters, I don't know what will!”
>
> The Maine lobster industry is under unprecedented attack from multiple fronts. First, there are increased pressures from new regulations handed down by the National Oceanographic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA), and the National Marine Fisheries Service (NMFS). The regulations, claiming to be designed to protect the Right whale, despite there not having been an incident in nearly two decades, have cost Maine lobstermen striving for compliance huge amounts of time and money.
>
> Next is the mounting activity surrounding the proposition of offshore wind projects, which promise to gobble up large tracts of fertile fishing and lobstering grounds, further impinging on the ability of these iconic Maine industries to survive and thrive.
>
> Thelander said of his day swimming among the boats, “I swam to more than 50 boats and met hundreds of people. After their initial reaction of surprise that someone was actually campaigning from boat to boat, I got very welcoming receptions. The people who make their living on the water are feeling threatened and unrepresented. I told them all that, as their representative in Washington, I’ll have their backs. Contrast that with my opponent, Representative Chellie Pingree, who enjoys a [97% lifetime score](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=5558832f76&e=f8a0a76a2b) from the League of Conservation Voters, a DC-based group that has pushed the Right whale regulations currently strangling the lobster industry.”
> ###
> * * *

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: Why They Won't Let Me Debate
body:
We need one minute of your time

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woodtv_debate&n=1)
---
## RALPH NOT ALLOWED AT WOODTV DEBATE
Friend, **Ralph Rebandt needs 1 minute if your time.** Because of a skewed poll and establishment political games, Ralph Rebandt is the only candidate not being allowed to attend the Wood TV debate tomorrow evening. When supporters found out, phone lines started ringing and email messages were sent to Rick Albin at Wood TV. Justin Barclay had Ralph on his show this morning to allow our favorite candidate to voice his concern over the political bias. We know that the establishment does not want a Rebandt administration that represents the people. This is not the first game they’ve played and as Ralph rises in the polls they will double down. We need you to take a minute and call Rick Albin’s office at (616) 771-9631 and let him know that you want your favorite candidate at the Wood TV debate. Call today! If enough people call that number, we can make a statement to the establishment.
### **Watch Justin Barclay Interview:**
| [](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6plba9Dy3LZyazVNSwBMjF0RnXSwO8ANRTXPWFzwskvvY8-gjblTYO6Vh6tf0og_CA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woodtv_debate&n=2 "WATCH") [WATCH](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6plba9Dy3LZyazVNSwBMjF0RnXSwO8ANRTXPWFzwskvvY8-gjblTYO6Vh6tf0og_CA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=woodtv_debate&n=2)
---
### **28 Days Until August 2nd!**
We are in the final stretch of the campaign until the Primary on August 2nd. We are looking forward to the many events and other exciting things we have planned, but we need **YOUR** support if we are going to get Ralph into Lansing. We cannot afford to miss this opportunity to elect someone who is going to put God **first** in our State.
Please Consider donating or volunteering to help us make **Michigan a Lighthouse to The Nation.**

Because of a skewed poll and establishment political games, Ralph Rebandt is the only candidate not being allowed to attend the Wood TV debate tomorrow evening. When supporters found out, phone lines started ringing and email messages were sent to Rick Albin at Wood TV. Justin Barclay had Ralph on his show this morning to allow our favorite candidate to voice his concern over the political bias. We know that the establishment does not want a Rebandt administration that represents the people. This is not the first game they’ve played and as Ralph rises in the polls they will double down. We need you to take a minute and call Rick Albin’s office at (616) 771-9631 and let him know that you want your favorite candidate at the Wood TV debate. Call today! If enough people call that number, we can make a statement to the establishment. Watch Justin Barclay Interview: | "WATCH" 28 Days Until August 2nd! We are in the final stretch of the campaign until the Primary on August 2nd. We are looking forward to the many events and other exciting things we have planned, but we need YOUR support if we are going to get Ralph into Lansing. We cannot afford to miss this opportunity to elect someone who is going to put God first in our State. Please Consider donating or volunteering to help us make Michigan a Lighthouse to The Nation. "DONATE ANY AMOUNT" Thank you for your continued support. Ralph Rebandt For Governor Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States

name: Charlie Crist
subject: This race is as close as it gets
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
The entire country is counting on us to stop DeSantis before he wins a second term and uses it as a launching pad to run for president. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443781/354319271/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220705_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWM3MjhjNS1jMmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGZIQCDFNCuTLgqo3OWcmHdZs2blKfvhujj6t7MZnfU=)
---
Friends,

When I say the Florida governor’s race is as close as it gets, I mean it! Just take a look at some of the most recent polls that have me neck and neck with Ron DeSantis:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443782/354319272/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220705_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWM3MjhjNS1jMmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGZIQCDFNCuTLgqo3OWcmHdZs2blKfvhujj6t7MZnfU=)
---
**_[With the race this close, every dollar we raise is going to make an enormous difference. Will you pitch in now to help me fight back against DeSantis’s wealthy backers and win this race in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443783/354319273/-1259897983?amount=25&refcode=20220705_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWM3MjhjNS1jMmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGZIQCDFNCuTLgqo3OWcmHdZs2blKfvhujj6t7MZnfU=)_**

Here’s the thing: The _entire country_ is counting on us to stop DeSantis before he wins a second term and uses it as a launching pad for a campaign for president. The far-right, billionaire backed agenda he’s been pushing has been a DISASTER for Florida — and we can’t afford for him to take it to the White House, too.

He’s against women’s freedom to choose, voting rights restoration, and common-sense gun safety laws, and he’s outlawed the very mention of LGBTQ+ people in the classroom. Plus, he’s been funneling tax refunds to some of the very same corporate donors who are bankrolling his campaign. And let’s not forget the _disastrous_ mismanagement of COVID-19 that led to thousands of preventable deaths in our communities.

If DeSantis gets to take that agenda to the White House, our country is in big trouble. But the good news is we can stop his presidential campaign before it ever gets off the ground by defeating him right here, right now, in the Florida governor’s race. And I need your grassroots support to do it.

**So friends, if you can, please pitch in just $5 or more right now to help us keep building the campaign we need to defeat Ron DeSantis on Election Day:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443784/354319274/-1259897983?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20220705_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWM3MjhjNS1jMmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGZIQCDFNCuTLgqo3OWcmHdZs2blKfvhujj6t7MZnfU=)

clean_body: | | | AZ GOP has been front and center | | | Team, if you’ve been tracking the public January 6 Committee hearings, you know the AZ GOP was heavily involved in that day’s events. If you haven’t followed them, let’s catch you up real quick: Andy Biggs asked for a presidential pardon for his role in the events; AZ GOP chair Kelli Ward was subpoenaed by a federal grand jury; Paul Gosar is claiming he started “the revolution” on January 6; and everyone from Ginni Thomas to Rudy Giuliani pressured the AZ legislature to either accept fake electors or change the outcome. And we’re positive that’s not even everything. The reality is, the AZ GOP is rotten. They knew Trump lost, and from top to bottom, they were willing to do whatever it took to try to overthrow our election – including helping an armed insurrection at the Capitol. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Enough is enough, Arizona Democrats Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . **Clearly, their attack ads are having an impact.**

clean_body: Polling shows us slipping, Fellow American, so I need your immediate help. | Fellow American, The Real Clear Politics average of polling in Georgia indicates that Senator Warnock has now pulled slightly ahead in our critical Senate race. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: Senator Warnock and the national Democrats have spent over $10 million in ads attacking me since I became the Republican nominee on May 24th. Unfortunately, we haven't had the resources to respond with our own ads to set the record straight. Clearly, their attack ads are having an impact. If we don't pick up the fundraising pace and get on the air ASAP, we could LOSE THIS RACE. This Georgia Senate race is the best opportunity to flip the one seat conservatives need to win the Senate majority. Without a Republican majority, Raphael Warnock, Chuck Schumer, and Senate Democrats will continue to pass the Biden agenda that is crippling our country. We've got to fill our Media Fund immediately! Fellow American, will you give so we can launch our ads this week and turn around the polling trend? Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Katrina?=
subject: What would you do to protect this country?
body:
Crossing the state I have been asked why am I running, | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9dc48279df4d/fertilizing-dem-npl-roots-9260931?e=101b417fd1)
---
| |
---
| |
# What would you do to protect this country?
I have been traveling around the state. This past weekend I was in Williston, Dickinson, Bismarck and Mandan. Many parades, conversations and one stump speech later, I came to realize what I had embarked on when I entered this race was not to just stabilize government operations or fully fund education, but to protect this country. To protect the freedoms we hold dear: Speech, Religion, and Privacy.
There is a path to victory in the state that requires we mobilize as many like minded folks as possible.

I need your financial support for radio ads and yard signs and print ads to reach voters. Donate $250 or $25 today [here](https://katrinaforussenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bb537a705e300eb5ec0192d9&id=36813eec05&e=101b417fd1).

We can send someone to Washington D.C. that loves this country, that will work to protect this country and serve you.

Be well.
Thank you,
Katrina

body:
You need to hear this update...
| **\--- OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS MEMO: REBECCA FOR GOVERNOR ---**
---
Friend — I hope your 4th of July was a special one, filled with family, friends, and celebration. Most of all, I hope you’re as proud as I am to be an American, especially as the Left attempts to shame us for loving our country.
---
That’s why I made it a point for this campaign to pause our fundraising over the holiday weekend.
---
But with this governor’s race still a _1-point_ contest as we kick off the FINAL MONTH before Election Day, the fundraising hit we took while on pause has set us back significantly.
---
_By the time we wrapped this morning’s finance meeting, we were already pacing**$26,410** behind to begin this final stretch._
---
But I promised our finance director Colleen that we could make up this shortfall — because we have something our opponent doesn’t...
---
...While he’s loved by the cronies in the Madison swamp, I’m backed by an army of grassroots conservatives like YOU.
---

name: Polling Team
subject: Survey #15789
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
Need your response

|
---
Hey friend,

Recent polling has shown that Biden’s approval rating is IMPROVING. **Is that true?!** I don’t believe it... but there’s still a large number of Americans who have NOT responded to the poll, including YOU, so we want to make sure that this is accurate.

clean_body: Background on Biden loosening restrictions on immigrants from terrorist nations [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [==] Biden to allow some migrants with terrorist ties into country, raising security concerns [==] Source: The Epoch Times [==] People who worked with terrorist groups will now have an easier time entering the U.S. legally. Retired FBI Special Agent Jeff Danik, who served nearly three decades with the bureau, said: "Due to numerous well-documented abuses and bumbling mismanagement of similar tools by this administration, Americans are well served to be skeptical and vigilant regarding how it will be wielded in the real world by Secretaries Blinken and Mayorkas," the heads of the State and DHS. [13x13x1] [==] READ MORE [==] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2022-05-12 U.S. Gives Terrorist Nation $15 Billion in Humanitarian Aid Despite Fraud, Abuse [] Source: Judicial Watch [] The U.S. government sends a monstrous amount of aid without oversight to countries largely controlled by terrorists, even after reports of widespread fraud, abuse and corruption by radical elements that limit the humanitarian assistance from reaching those in need. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [=] 2022-02-23 Afghan Refugees Are Not Fully Vetted, Dozens With “Significant Security Concerns” in U.S. [=] Source: Judicial Watch [=] Dozens of Afghan refugees released in the U.S. have Pentagon records that “indicate potentially significant security concerns,” according to a new federal audit. The president directed DHS to lead the chaotic plan to resettle the Afghans and the administration assured Americans the refugees would be thoroughly screened. That has not materialized. [13x13x1] [=] READ MORE [=] [180x150x3] [==] 2022-06-22 Tijuana Opens Muslim Migrant Shelter to Help U.S. Asylum Seekers as Illegal Immigration Soars [==] Source: Judicial Watch [==] Judicial Watch has for years reported on the increasing number of Muslim migrants—including from terrorist nations—entering the U.S. through the Mexican border and the timing of this influx could not be worse, [13x13x1] [==] READ MORE [==] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [==] [32x32x2] [==] [32x32x3] [==] [32x32x3] [=] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2022, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [==] |

clean_body: America’s birthday is more important than fundraising. | Peter, The Fourth of July has always been sacred to me. It’s a powerful symbol of the freedom that we’re so fortunate to enjoy. In honor of the 4th, we paused all our fundraising efforts over the weekend – but now, just 5 days into the month, we’re pacing $9,335 behind our July budget. And while we were paused, Pelosi, Taddeo, and the Democrats kept right on fundraising. Nothing is sacred to these radicals who want to DESTROY the American dream! We can’t let them take the lead in this toss-up race. I don’t regret pausing over the weekend, Peter. Celebrating America’s birthday with your friends and family is much more important than fundraising. But unless we retake the House majority and get America back on track, it will only be a matter of time before the Fourth of July completely loses its meaning. Another two years of total Democrat control in Washington will mean another two years of oppressive socialist policies.It will spell the end of America as we know it. To save the country we know and love, we MUST win this race. It’s that simple. I hope I can count on you to help us get back on budget. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: 5 reasons to chip in $5:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Here are five reasons why we need your support today:
#

It’s the fifth day of the month, and we need to ask you to make a $5 donation to our campaign to send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate.
Here are five reasons why we need your support today:
1. Multiple polls in the past month show this race is statistically tied.
2. Republicans’ Senate Leadership Fund booked $27 million in TV ads to try to buy this seat — the second most of any Senate race in the country.
3. Our opponent Ted Budd is Trump’s hand-picked candidate because he tried to overturn the 2020 election and is likely to try again in 2024 if we don’t defeat him.
4. If we expand the majority with Cheri, she could cast the decisive vote to pass climate legislation, codify reproductive freedom, protect voting rights, and more!
5. Small-dollar support is our number one source for donations. So your $5 can make a big impact as we expand our ground game across North Carolina.

These are five important reasons to chip in $5. The choice is yours, but we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a $5 donation to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat and expand our majority? Everything could come down to a handful of votes in our race, so every donation matters.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-july22.kbaN_T&refcode=em220705-1-ma&t=1&akid=1182%2E357359%2ErjAmve)

clean_body: Polling shows us slipping, Peter, so I need your immediate help. | Peter, The Real Clear Politics average of polling in Georgia indicates that Senator Warnock has now pulled slightly ahead in our critical Senate race. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: Senator Warnock and the national Democrats have spent over $10 million in ads attacking me since I became the Republican nominee on May 24th. Unfortunately, we haven't had the resources to respond with our own ads to set the record straight. Clearly, their attack ads are having an impact. If we don't pick up the fundraising pace and get on the air ASAP, we could LOSE THIS RACE. This Georgia Senate race is the best opportunity to flip the one seat conservatives need to win the Senate majority. Without a Republican majority, Raphael Warnock, Chuck Schumer, and Senate Democrats will continue to pass the Biden agenda that is crippling our country. We've got to fill our Media Fund immediately! Peter, will you give so we can launch our ads this week and turn around the polling trend? Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Peter Welch
subject: This one rule stands in our way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Our democracy is on the line, and it’s time to get it together and actually act.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=621%2E61531%2EDxH14K)
Hello,
I’ve spent my time in the House working with my colleagues to pass legislation that makes a tangible difference in the lives of Vermonters. It’s what we were elected to do, and I’m proud of the work we’ve been able to accomplish.
But even as we work hard to make positive change, progress has been stalled by Republicans. Their obstructionist agenda stops anything from getting done—unless we act.
There is no greater threat to progressive change in America than the filibuster. **We can—and we must—abolish it.**
The Republican minority blocks critical bills popular with vast majorities of Americans time and time again using the filibuster. To be a true democracy where we listen to the voice of the people, rather than just the powerful few, we must end the filibuster.
[**Add your name to our petition to abolish the filibuster right away if you agree.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-end-filibuster/?source=em_20220705_p_p_filibuster&t=3&akid=621%2E61531%2EDxH14K)
Even with Democrats holding the majority, the filibuster allows for minority rule. Senate Republicans have employed the filibuster to block raising the minimum wage, protecting the right to vote, and enshrining the right to abortion in national law.
**The filibuster has to go. It’s a relic from the Jim Crow era, used by segregationists to block civil rights. It continues to undermine our democracy and it’s time to abolish it.**
The bills Republicans have filibustered have broad support in Vermont and across the country—which is why we’ve fought to pass them in the House. But with Mitch McConnell leading the Senate Republicans, they fight for failure, as we suffer as a result.
**In the Senate, I will vote to end the filibuster so we can protect Americans’ basic rights and deliver results. But I can’t win this fight by myself—we all need to raise our voices.**
[**Add your name right away to say it’s time to get rid of the filibuster.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-end-filibuster/?source=em_20220705_p_p_filibuster&t=4&akid=621%2E61531%2EDxH14K)
Thanks for taking action,
Peter
