name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Jamaal Bowman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220705-3164-header&t=1&akid=3164%2E2526796%2EE1YktC)
I’m proud to share that I am officially endorsing Jamaal Bowman for reelection in New York’s 16th district.
Jamaal has been a fighter for working people since he was elected to Congress in 2020, and he’s a key progressive leader in the House championing a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and legislation that will bring about transformative change in this country.
[I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. Will you stand with me by making a $3 contribution — or whatever you can — to Jamaal’s campaign?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20220705.yp-3y1&refcode=em20220705-3164-P_FND_EGR_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3164%2E2526796%2EE1YktC)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20220705.yp-3y1&refcode=em20220705-3164-P_FND_EGR_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3164%2E2526796%2EE1YktC)**
Like we did in 2020, Jamaal is facing an extremely well-funded challenger supported by corporate PACs and the same establishment that he defeated in his first election. They want to make him a one-term member of Congress and deal a blow to our movement.
But Jamaal’s background as an educator and a community leader here in New York makes him one of the most compassionate, fierce advocates for our progressive priorities — and he’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money in this people-powered campaign.
We must protect and expand our progressive power in Congress, and defending Jamaal’s seat is crucial to that. He knows what it takes to go up against powerful forces and win – but it will take all of us, working together. With the new district maps and the new election date throwing this campaign a curveball, he needs as much grassroots support as possible.
[Can you make a contribution to help reelect Jamaal Bowman? Whatever you give will help power his organizing efforts in his competitive primary election on August 23.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20220705.yp-3y1&refcode=em20220705-3164-P_FND_EGR_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3164%2E2526796%2EE1YktC)
I’m so grateful to all of the grassroots supporters who make this movement possible — and together, we’ll protect our progressive movement’s leaders in Congress.
Thank you,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez

clean_body: I’m proud to share that I am officially endorsing Jamaal Bowman for reelection in New York’s 16th district. Jamaal has been a fighter for working people since he was elected to Congress in 2020, and he’s a key progressive leader in the House championing a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and legislation that will bring about transformative change in this country. Like we did in 2020, Jamaal is facing an extremely well-funded challenger supported by corporate PACs and the same establishment that he defeated in his first election. They want to make him a one-term member of Congress and deal a blow to our movement. But Jamaal’s background as an educator and a community leader here in New York makes him one of the most compassionate, fierce advocates for our progressive priorities — and he’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money in this people-powered campaign. We must protect and expand our progressive power in Congress, and defending Jamaal’s seat is crucial to that. He knows what it takes to go up against powerful forces and win – but it will take all of us, working together. With the new district maps and the new election date throwing this campaign a curveball, he needs as much grassroots support as possible. I’m so grateful to all of the grassroots supporters who make this movement possible — and together, we’ll protect our progressive movement’s leaders in Congress. Thank you, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Beto for Texas
subject: The moment to stop the next mass shooting is right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

It has now been six weeks since 19 children and 2 teachers were taken from
us in Uvalde.

Yesterday, another mass shooting killed 6 at a parade in Illinois, while
gunshots also injured 2 police officers and sent scores of people fleeing
in Philadelphia.

The moment to stop the next mass shooting is right now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220705-2.8v1Wqe&refcode=ema20220705-197073&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=197073%2E444211%2EhD9t-z ]We must take action and save lives. Help us defeat a Governor who has
done nothing to protect Texans from gun violence by chipping in
$3 or more now to elect Beto O’Rourke.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220705-2.8v1Wqe&refcode=ema20220705-197073&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=197073%2E444211%2EhD9t-z ]Donate

We are
united in our desire to keep our families and communities safe: 94% of
Republican voters in Texas support universal background checks, and 98% of
Democratic voters in Texas support universal background checks.

It’s Greg Abbott who opposes them — even after SIX major mass shootings in
Texas since he became Governor. Instead of listening to the people of
Texas and taking action to save lives, all he has done is sign a dangerous
permitless carry law that makes it easier to carry a loaded gun in public
without any background check, training, or permit.

The price of Abbott’s fealty to the gun lobby has been the lives of our
loved ones. There will be more Uvaldes, El Pasos, Sutherland Springs, and
Santa Fes until we remove gun lobby politicians like Greg Abbott from
office.

We have the power to change this, and we will.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=bft-em-20220705-2.8v1Wqe&refcode=ema20220705-197073&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=197073%2E444211%2EhD9t-z ]We are going to vote Abbott out. Will you donate $3 or more
right now to elect new leadership in this state?

These massacres aren't natural disasters, acts of God, or random. They are
totally predictable, direct consequences of the choices made by Greg
Abbott and the majority of those in the legislature.

We need a Governor who listens to the people. Who cares about the people.
Who will act to keep all of us safe.

Together, we can make that our reality while saving lives.

—Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=197073%2E444211%2EhD9t-z

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Troy=20Carter?=
subject: Survivors deserve this
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Troy Carter for Congress
body:
In a world filled with so much doom and gloom, I choose to make progress where I can. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/congressmantroycarter.com/backlog-justice-act?e=dd5c2df611)
---
| | [ ](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=d5fd9f2cac&e=dd5c2df611)
---
| | Friend,

In a world filled with so much doom and gloom, [I choose to make progress where I can](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=2dfc6f48c0&e=dd5c2df611).

That's why I'm proud to co-author the bipartisan Backlog Justice Act, which aims to bring an end to the backlog of rape kits across the nation.

Once passed, the legislation will establish a National Sexual Assault Kit Backlog Database, increase training opportunities for DNA analysts, incentivize states to utilize electronic tracking systems, and more.

All in all, this bill will help survivors get the justice they deserve.

[__**I'm up for re-election THIS NOVEMBER. Can I count on you to join me in the fight to help survivors by chipping into our campaign?**__](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=66b1cce285&e=dd5c2df611)

With hope,
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Gibbs=20for=20Congress=20=2D=20MI=20=2D=2003?=
subject: Team Gibbs - Upcoming Events!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN GIBBS FOR CONGRESS, INC_
body:
Volunteers needed! | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

We hope you had a wonderful July 4th holiday! Team Gibbs was out in full force yesterday walking in the Grandville, Cascade, and Allendale parades. Thank you to everyone who joined us, we had a very successful day!

Below you will find all upcoming events and volunteer opportunities. This Saturday our team will be taking a day of rest in order to finish out the remaining 24 days strong. We will postpone the Plainfield and Grand Rapids Township door knocking events to the following Saturday, July 16th! Please RSVP [here](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=b5fce2e1e5&e=c238e8971e).

Thank you all for the support - we've made it this far and together we will win!

Team Gibbs
---
| _**ICYMI**_
* [Click here](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=0053812254&e=c238e8971e) to read John's statement on CNN's Fake News Attack
* [Watch](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=b1ee47d39f&e=c238e8971e) WOOD TV8's 3rd Congressional District Roundtable with John Gibbs and Peter Meijer
* [Watch](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=db785c9179&e=c238e8971e) John on The Charlie Kirk Show

---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Volunteer Opportunities_**
**Saturday, July 16th | Door Knocking**
Plainfield | 10-1pm

Grand Rapids Township | 2-3:30pm

Learn how to use our door knocking app and knock doors with Team Gibbs! [Click here to RSVP](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=d281632895&e=c238e8971e)

**Tuesday July 5th - Saturday July 9th | Yard Sign Distribution**
We are looking for volunteers who are willing to assist with yard sign distribution! We are specifically looking to target busy, public roads across the district. If you are interested in helping our team, please email Taylor at taylor@votejohngibbs.com for more information or with location suggestions!

**_Upcoming Events_**
**Wednesday, July 6th | Berlin Fair Truck & Tractor Pull**
John will be attending the Berlin Fair Truck & Tractor Pull! If you see us, come say hello!

Event details [here](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=00aa159ccd&e=c238e8971e).
---
| | |
---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=1362c589c6&e=c238e8971e&c=f722976614) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votejohngibbs.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=125d68a9918858e87dbc3c37d&id=1362c589c6&e=c238e8971e&c=f722976614).

https://www.votejohngibbs.com

_PAID FOR BY JOHN GIBBS FOR CONGRESS, INC_

name: Eric Greitens
subject: Exactly what RINO McConnell wanted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U

clean_body: We’re falling behind. | Peter – I have some good news and some bad... First, the bad: We took a serious hit after pausing our fundraising over the holiday weekend. We’re pacing $31,090 behind for our FINAL month of the election, all while Mitch McConnell’s RINOs continue to spend millions through their Super PAC to throw this race to a Soros-funded Democrat. But now, for the good: With just WEEKS to go until Election Day, generous pro-Trump patriots have offered to 700% MATCH YOUR contributions for the next HOUR to help us make up this shortfall. As a Navy SEAL, I’ll never give up – but now more than ever, I need the help of grassroots Americans like you to continue this fight all the way through Election Day. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Gerrymandering Update
subject: “Supreme Court’s Abortion Ruling Shows What Happens When Democracy Is Thwarted” – Brennan Center Analysis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
They’re catching on to what we’ve been saying for years.
|
---

---
Did you see this from the Brennan Center, friend? | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/47444278/354336878/-1032289709?amount=20&refcode=20220705.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1OTczODU3LWNmZmMtZWMxMS1iNDdhLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KsoiCOMNChUi9ImesqLc8qdh5NM_mspbp--ESa1JjhQ=)

And this was written BEFORE the Supreme Court decided to hear a case about a radical theory that could hand redistricting and election power to state legislatures.

We’ve been saying this for years: Winning the fight for fair maps is going to be critical to making progress on every single issue Democrats care about, **including abortion rights**.

That’s because gerrymandering their way into near-unbreakable majorities has allowed the GOP to **straight up ignore public opinion** on every issue under the sun, with very little fear of consequences at the polls. After all, if a majority of statewide voters can choose Democratic candidates and the GOP still ends up controlling the legislature, what do they have to lose?

This stark reality is exactly why it’s so important that we invest in the highly-contested races on our list of democracy targets this November. **We’re targeting races in 17 states** , and we’re working to help pro-choice, pro-fair-maps candidates win in all of them.

**But we can’t do any of our work without the help of donors like you. So with Election Day getting closer and closer, will you pitch in right now to help us keep up the fight?**

clean_body: They’re catching on to what we’ve been saying for years. | Did you see this from the Brennan Center, friend? | = And this was written BEFORE the Supreme Court decided to hear a case about a radical theory that could hand redistricting and election power to state legislatures. We’ve been saying this for years: Winning the fight for fair maps is going to be critical to making progress on every single issue Democrats care about, including abortion rights. That’s because gerrymandering their way into near-unbreakable majorities has allowed the GOP to straight up ignore public opinion on every issue under the sun, with very little fear of consequences at the polls. After all, if a majority of statewide voters can choose Democratic candidates and the GOP still ends up controlling the legislature, what do they have to lose? This stark reality is exactly why it’s so important that we invest in the highly-contested races on our list of democracy targets this November. We’re targeting races in 17 states , and we’re working to help pro-choice, pro-fair-maps candidates win in all of them. But we can’t do any of our work without the help of donors like you. So with Election Day getting closer and closer, will you pitch in right now to help us keep up the fight? Friend,

DID YOU SEE MY LAST MESSAGE?

Soon, I will be taking the stage in ALASKA for my upcoming rally.

Your unwavering support has never gone unnoticed. Despite everything the Left and the Fake News media have thrown at us, you've always been by my side. I want to show you just how much your loyalty means to me, so I have something special for you. _**This is ONLY for you, Friend._

**DURING MY RALLY, I WANT _YOUR NAME_ DISPLAYED LIVE FOR THE ENTIRE NATION TO SEE.**

subject: Thank you, Clawson!
disclaimer_text:

body:
On the 4th of July I visited Clawson, Michigan where we celebrated the holiday with some amazing Team Benson supporters. Learning about the fight to preserve and protect democracy is an important lesson to learn at an early age, and it was great to see so many children celebrating the freedoms that our nation guarantees them!

secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=070522

I hope to see you out on the campaign trail soon, friend.

-Jocelyn

body:
Enclosed.

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Governor Hogan has failed

Did you hear what Governor Hogan did, friends? Governor Hogan just decided to drop the requirement that gun owners present a “good and substantial” reason for a wear and carry permit. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-Dzupz9jFGsMw6eZcQlXYXw8fii3xEaiMhGbxYqVbyb5Mrl50rgbD_Qax6gOzLK_iZXTxfzZXF6Y3IXF2c5_I9ReSDeaPPLzrxuc7jslyN-YLkZDLYlVHCyGT-VYgwOzhbH9pREkvNBVUCU5pfK9wdcCkbKHz1lRSL5CGT6daJEiBskNF_AwDyuPdkVd-FiqEDZXW-QbE-DlORARUoC9nLEk7JT_a8SKdz1akEVzHeXztdRKPl8dhVmRVddN4AWcZaBGP_2YLr_Chy8ClP_8eIxLk3R-odEf3wcbFMB7KlTC9e9/3nh/nqOVjfelT-Gi2HXxZN7F4g/h0/dlrE1rtL05cNDtECeM2XXeFEQNI0tWenlruIIMDK9k8)

Did you hear what Governor Hogan did, friends? He just decided to drop the requirement that gun owners present a “good and substantial” reason for a wear and carry permit. At a time when crime and gun violence is on the rise, we need a governor that will implement common-sense gun safety regulations, not loosen them further. The number one job of government is to keep people safe, and Governor Hogan has failed at that job. Maryland deserves better leadership. **There is _no_ other candidate in the field **who has received an ‘F’ from the NRA, personally put hundreds of gun-carrying violent criminals behind bars and spearheaded legislation to get guns out of the hands of criminals. If we want to keep Marylanders safe from gun violence, **we must nominate a pro-business, pro-law enforcement, moderate Democrat who can win the general election in November.** Polls show I am that candidate. The race is wide open, it will be won or lost in these final few weeks. **[Will you help us win this race by donating what you can today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTj9hmS-8LvnA8qY7ch-DzuoCvTxhzoLLA6wL-p8K8stkgYyaXdPxHVFFjHzSdCHeSrtd5-PzuZk1ReVKiAmWjAS6vejJipXgw1ba3godbGLLmDtghbPb1kFoj3ZC0njIeWDKnOoUEWj5Ta3CvoJRB4acA_MD8_BMhzohK9Lb1HXO9Kzv_g9r-G6k-OkrZqYauscaACtAQAz3xH1JbFww_ghJnN6n-5kGzM7nG_mQQPt4UziZf5IAIxhY-mhm_wy2UBNjbfWC7nVGRL_Reyc__jq7O2lCgiL_8N2EntPAcYpgbEAkiv72fw4dWlNzffLEi/3nh/nqOVjfelT-Gi2HXxZN7F4g/h1/8TZIaHcsXjChwD3x74vXUA84ByDfjqo5UcSu9ljXj_I)**

name: New Hampshire Republican State Committee
subject: Who is your pick for President?
body:
New Hampshire Republican State Committee
Vote Today!

| Derek -- As National Democrats seriously consider taking away New Hampshire’s First in the Nation status for Democrats, we thought it would be worthwhile to remind everyone that the Republican’s primary is safe and sound. [](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbP1czPuSIpu-3ZXKHYxhDGiMbKhiKq1KwZNKnwa2Jyn3g&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fitn_poll_tier_3_1&n=1) In fact, we are conducting our very first GOP Presidential Online Straw Poll! **You can vote for your pick here:[https://secure.winred.com/new-hampshire-gop/fitn_poll](https://www.nh.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYom_5iV1ML7OCl3CFwBmGbP1czPuSIpu-3ZXKHYxhDGiMbKhiKq1KwZNKnwa2Jyn3g&e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fitn_poll_tier_3_1&n=2)** Please feel free to share with your fellow Republicans and Conservatives and polling closes Thursday! We will publish the result next week. \--Team NHGOP

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.nh.gop/unsubscribe?e=3b759f8f09083dafc3b676ab7322a136&utm_source=nhgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fitn_poll_tier_3_1&n=3). |

clean_body: We’re falling behind... | Friend, There’s no easy way to say it, so I’ll cut right to the chase: We took a serious hit after we paused our fundraising over the holiday weekend. Just 5 days into the month, and we’re already pacing $38,175 behind for our July goal. At a time when George Soros has been caught buying up radio stations right here in Houston and Pelosi is making ad reservations worth more than $200 MILLION, we simply can’t afford to fall this far behind. Pelosi and Soros both know grassroots campaigning is a nonstarter for their radical candidates. Why? Because voters aren’t buying a single one of their positions on the issues. The Left knows the only way they can get a vote this year is to flood the airwaves with deceptive ads and vicious attacks. It’s why Pelosi and Soros are pouring millions of dollars into not only running endless lying attacks ads, but to also BUY the media outright. They’ll do whatever it takes to stop us from winning this final seat needed to flip the House. But while the Democrats are plotting how to use Soros’ fortune to spread lies to voters, we’re struggling just to get back on track to hit our July goal. We can’t continue to give the Left the upper hand and allow them to outspend us. But I’m counting on YOUR help to continue getting the TRUTH out to voters – and that all starts by ensuring we get back on track to hit our monthly goal. name: GavinNewsom.com
subject: Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
Freedom is under attack in Florida.

Friends -
Ron DeSantis likes to talk a lot about “freedom.” He signed a “Freedom First Budget.” His hashtag is #KeepFloridaFree. His team even released a tortuous rock ballad about Florida’s freedom.
But the truth is, Freedom is under attack in Florida.
They ban books in Florida.
They restrict speech in Florida.
They make it harder to vote in Florida.
They criminalize women and doctors in Florida.
No, we are not going to let Republicans like Ron DeSantis own the word “freedom” in the political debate. This is the most anti-freedom party, and one of the most anti-freedom governors in the nation.
Unless, of course, you are talking about freedom to die from COVID where under Ron DeSantis’ leadership Florida has 1.5x the COVID deaths per capita compared to California.
Unless you are talking about the freedom to get shot, where under Ron DeSantis’ leadership, Florida has 1.6x the firearm deaths per capita compared to California.
Unless you are talking about the freedom to live without health care, where almost 1 in 5 non-elderly Floridians live without health care compared to California which is the first state to provide access to health access for everyone, no matter their immigration status.
You may have heard we set aside a small amount of money to run an ad in Florida about freedom being under attack in that state. We hope you’ll watch it:
[**Please use this link to watch the campaign ad we ran in Florida yesterday and consider making a small donation to Gavin Newsom’s re-election campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-florida-ad?source=&refcode2=876_4767699_ZRpqes&akid=876%2E4767699%2EZRpqes)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-florida-ad?source=&refcode2=876_4767699_ZRpqes&akid=876%2E4767699%2EZRpqes)
[WATCH THE ADD](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gcn-em-florida-ad?refcode=em220705-1-30&refcode2=876_4767699_ZRpqes&akid=876%2E4767699%2EZRpqes)
Thank you,
Team Newsom
* * *
**Gavin Newsom is up for re-election this November. Please consider making a contribution — of any amount you can afford — to help him win. It all adds up when we are all chipping-in. Let’s keep California blue in 2022.**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1120?refcode=em220705-1-30&t=1&akid=876%2E4767699%2EZRpqes)

PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=876%2E4767699%2EZRpqes).

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We leave millions of dollars on the table
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

When we go up against the political establishment, we know that we’ll
almost always be outspent. Entrenched incumbents take corporate PAC
contributions and we leave millions of dollars on the table by refusing to
do the same.

Jessica Cisneros lost by less than 300 votes. We came up just short.
Jessica’s race would’ve been different if Nancy Pelosi hadn’t campaigned
for an anti-abortion incumbent and the establishment hadn’t spent millions
to stop a progressive women of color.

If we had just a little more money, there’s a real chance we could have
lifted Jessica to victory.

We’ll be transparent with you, we had a tough month on fundraising last
month and now we need to seriously pick up the pace before Cori Bush,
Jamaal Bowman, and Rashida Tlaib have their primary elections.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110986?refcode=em20220705-24157&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=24157%2E1203867%2EHAiBMF ]There has never
been a more important time for you to step up and make your first
contribution,
Peter. Can you pitch in just $3
to help us catch up on our fundraising downturn last
month?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/110986?refcode=em20220705-24157&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=24157%2E1203867%2EHAiBMF ]Contribute

We need more Democrats in Congress like AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush
who will fight for policies and legislation that match the scale of the
crises we face. We don’t need any other Democrats who will side with the
NRA or vote against codifying Roe v. Wade into law.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, When we go up against the political establishment, we know that we’ll almost always be outspent. Entrenched incumbents take corporate PAC contributions and we leave millions of dollars on the table by refusing to do the same. Jessica Cisneros lost by less than 300 votes. We came up just short. Jessica’s race would’ve been different if Nancy Pelosi hadn’t campaigned for an anti-abortion incumbent and the establishment hadn’t spent millions to stop a progressive women of color. If we had just a little more money, there’s a real chance we could have lifted Jessica to victory. We’ll be transparent with you, we had a tough month on fundraising last month and now we need to seriously pick up the pace before Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Rashida Tlaib have their primary elections. [ ]There has never been a more important time for you to step up and make your first contribution, Peter. Can you pitch in just $3 to help us catch up on our fundraising downturn last month? [ ]Contribute We need more Democrats in Congress like AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Cori Bush who will fight for policies and legislation that match the scale of the crises we face. Things are rapidly heating up in this race, team. **With just two weeks left until the Maryland gubernatorial primary election, a new poll shows Wes in a DEAD HEAT with Peter Franchot for first place, and Tom Perez trailing just behind them.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47441542/354300519/-980145796?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220705poll_tw_120da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDYxMTQwNy1iMmZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zxygz0Ea7LcTL8FAUw3s5SKnZJNIOcjZQ7wp3sGpTjc=)
---
We only have 14 days left to get out the vote and reach undecided voters to ensure Wes comes out on top, which is why **we’re releasing two new ads today to spread the word about our movement.**

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: re: Highland Park
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Peter,

I was looking forward to walking in yesterday's 4th of July Parade in East Moline. It was canceled due to heavy downpours, but we soon learned that it likely wouldn't have gone on anyway after the shocking and senseless mass shooting in Highland Park, IL -- just a two-hour drive to the east.

At least six are dead and dozens are injured because a 22-year-old got his own hands on an assault rifle and turned it on his own community as they celebrated the Fourth. Witnesses recounted hearing the local marching band play “Yankee Doodle” as gunfire rang out.

On a day we recognize our independence and what makes this nation so special, we were given a stark reminder of something else that's uniquely American: our gun violence epidemic. Highland Park now joins Uvalde, Buffalo, Aurora, Newtown, Sandy Hook, and far too many other communities across the country exposed to this horror.

One eyewitness told reporters,_“these shootings are happening all the time. I guess we are just supposed to stay at home now." That’s a grim, but completely reasonable response._

What are we supposed to do when we can’t shop in a grocery store without fear of being shot? How should we respond when we can’t go to church, school, the theater, concerts, the doctor’s office, and now -- a Fourth of July parade -- without fear of being shot?

We need to do more to keep guns out of the hands of people wanting to do harm. That means an outright ban on assault rifles and investing more in mental health access. Doing nothing is not an option.

If there’s any silver lining, it's that bipartisan progress is being made in Washington to keep the American people safe through stronger background checks and red flag laws – but more needs to be done. I hope for all our sakes that yesterday's shooting will be the wake-up call that we need.

In the meantime, my heart is with the victims and their families, and I am praying for peace in our country.

\- Eric

\--
Eric Sorensen
Meteorologist | Candidate for Congress (IL-17)
309-306-1717

clean_body: | | | = Peter, we’re just one week out from my biggest fundraising deadline of the election year. Next Monday, July 11, is my official public reporting deadline.** This is the SINGLE biggest test that my campaign for re-election has faced. My team set a goal to raise $10,000 by midnight tomorrow so I can head into my public reporting deadline in a strong place, but I need your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = The moment my fundraising numbers become public, my GOP opponent, the Republican Attorneys General Association, and the most powerful special interests in the country will pore over my numbers to look for any weaknesses in my campaign. We can’t afford to show them any.** When I made history and became the first Black woman ever elected to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that I would do everything in my power to fight for the voiceless and vulnerable. And, Peter, this fight has never been more important. With Roe v. Wade overturned, voting rights on the line, and a nationwide assault on LGBTQ+ rights, I simply CANNOT allow my Republican opponent to take control of New York. So please, before midnight tomorrow: = | | = Thank you for being on my team. Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY P.O. Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

| | | **_Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.

subject: We don’t have to live this way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, Yesterday as I walked in the Fourth of July parade on Bainbridge Island, I saw someone standing on a roof. My mind immediately flashed to the Highland Park Fourth of July shooting, where a shooter opened fire from a roof, murdering seven people and wounding dozens more. I can only imagine the pain of the victims’ family members and the terror of the people running for cover. We don’t have to live this way. We can break free of the hold the NRA has over our politics. We can break free of the cowardice of politicians who offer thoughts and prayers while doing nothing. We can do things like:
* Raise the age for buying a firearm to 21.
* Enact nationwide waiting periods for purchase of all firearms.
* Mandate universal background checks, including at gun shows.
* Provide full federal funding to modernize and optimize existing background check systems, and make them compatible across all 50 states.
* Increase funding for mental health services as part of Medicare for All, as over half of gun deaths are by suicide.

I will never cower before the gun lobby. I will fight for these reforms. I hope you’ll [send me to Congress](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47444414/354337356/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWI1N2NhOC1kYWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E0-Uzyyaa6n-1qAvB4ddDwDT8jZtResh4hIEbPN7ik4=) to do that. Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christian=20Nascimento?=
subject: You Won't Believe This
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Friends of Christian Nascimento, All rights reserved
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/838cc99b476c/madeleine-dean-is-desperate-9044577?e=0a4d873a55)
---
| | [ ](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=ced2625ecc&e=0a4d873a55)
---
| | **Last night two police officers were shot in Philadelphia. What was city mayor Jim Kenney's response? Keep reading...**
**_“ I’ll be happy when I’m not here — when I’m not mayor, and I can enjoy some stuff.”_**

A reporter followed up, asking:_**“ You’re looking forward to not being mayor?” **

**“ Yeah,” Kenney said with a smirk, “as a matter of fact**.**”**_
******THIS IS THE FACE OF TRULY SHAMEFUL LEADERSHIP**
Jim Kenney has given up on stopping crime. He has given up on Philadelphia. He has given up on police officers and their families.

**_Today I call on Mayor Kenney to resign his seat as Philadelphia mayor. And if Congresswoman Dean has a shred of integrity - even the smallest amount of concern and support for police and for the safety of district families - she will join me in calling for Kenney’s immediate resignation today_.**

**Instead of pursuing tough criminal charges against violent criminals and locking them up, Kenney and the radical liberal law enforcement community in Philadelphia again and again have refused to convict criminals**. Southeastern Pennsylvania has become a safe haven for criminals of all stripes as the bodies of innocent victims continue to pile up.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** It is time for Jim Kenney, Larry Krasner, and politicians like Madeleine Dean who pledge support to them, to be gone for good. [](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=b0b3b0915f&e=0a4d873a55)
It's time to take back Pennsylvania AND our great nation!

For Pennsylvania,

Christian Nascimento
Republican Nominee for Congress, Pennsylvania

clean_body: Will you regret this? | Friend, We NEED your help, and we need it today! Olivia from the Budd Finance Team just texted me. She told me we are NOT where we need to be right now for Ted Budd to win the general election this November. The election is shaping up to be super close, and unfortunately, we’re still short on funds. The clock is ticking, and we need to reach every single fundraising goal to beat Cheri Beasley. | November is around the corner and we cannot risk falling short of our goals. We cannot let down Congressman Ted Budd – we’re counting on him to bring America First policies back for North Carolina. Ted is endorsed by President Trump, Lieutenant Governor Mark Robinson, Senator Thom Tillis, Senator Ted Cruz, Senator John Kennedy, Newt Gingrich, and so many more.Ted Budd is the right choice for North Carolina. We can’t afford to hand this Senate seat over to Cheri Beasley. If she wins in November, would you wonder what more you could’ve done? Would you regret not chipping in for Ted Budd? For North Carolina, Tyler, Team Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: Millions of people are living with Long Covid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dppOfkuedm5o3Dq0Eo0eOo4MVpTylYbEqofAZNGp1j3g4WDRuU_ms-tfk1saBwztmy6H_OrOrVYODS8NIqhAk9l-EoWd6NHlt47CX3cVjQ6Ebylm0PKmDHM5WhlWG14q23-ifPOe8m8vOdPDsMnHQQ-maaO6EfSc8lNjDD9yH_AcJeBzek3uxejzNAMdKX5w7/3nh/FoaVYpQqSeKqszzPgltJCw/h0/tDewd2DMULt4GUIH9oYXl_ncoPU-oOWDWfjLl3Y1bxA)
---
Peter, a just and equitable pandemic recovery must include the millions of people living with Long COVID, a community whose voices and suffering have been ignored for too long. Across the country, millions of people have been living with the physical and mental anguish of Long COVID for months or even years. **Long COVID has had a prolonged impact on many of our most vulnerable individuals and families** — particularly in Black, brown, and historically marginalized communities. It’s past time that these people get the care they deserve and need. body:
**The Supreme Court’s decision to hobble the EPA will impact our futures and the entire globe!**
**[Tell Congress - The Supreme Court just tanked our effort to mitigate climate change. We need action!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443176/354307387/1626319941?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220705_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmEyOTE2MS1iZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fb9EFAIP6J8ABa_lZ7Z9ogvoAAjLHtzB3hWjl27sMnw=&emci=0a602a16-bdfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4fa29161-befc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**
Five or six people should not decide the fate of an entire country.
The Supreme Court just attacked the EPA's authority to regulate greenhouse gas emissions from power plants asthe climate crisis is ravages our communities.
**SCOTUS has sided with the fossil fuel industry over the health and safety of the Americans they serve. **
**[Sign our petition DEMANDING that Congress enact REAL climate legislation! Harmful carbon emissions have never been higher, and it is _now or never_ to stop climate change.
The rogue Supreme Court must be checked if we are going to stand a chance. Corporate interests and dark money should never trump the lives of Americans.
**The human race cannot survive without our planet. Climate change is a crisis that cannot wait.**
**[Add your name to our petition URGING Congress to think of the future and our children. Enact climate legislation that protects our planet!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/47443179/354307390/1626319941?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220705_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmEyOTE2MS1iZWZjLWVjMTEtYjQ3YS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fb9EFAIP6J8ABa_lZ7Z9ogvoAAjLHtzB3hWjl27sMnw=&emci=0a602a16-bdfc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=4fa29161-befc-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)**

Marshall for Congress

clean_body: The Supreme Court’s decision to hobble the EPA will impact our futures and the entire globe! Five or six people should not decide the fate of an entire country. The Supreme Court just attacked the EPA's authority to regulate greenhouse gas emissions from power plants asthe climate crisis is ravages our communities. SCOTUS has sided with the fossil fuel industry over the health and safety of the Americans they serve. Harmful carbon emissions have never been higher, and it is now or never to stop climate change. The rogue Supreme Court must be checked if we are going to stand a chance. Corporate interests and dark money should never trump the lives of Americans. The human race cannot survive without our planet. Climate change is a crisis that cannot wait. Thanks for your support, Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O.
